Peter,

Like so many others, my family came to America looking for freedom. _Like so many others, my family’s story is filled with tragedy, sacrifice, and hope._

My grandparents and my mother escaped the Nazis in Europe.

My parents, my sister and I, escaped Castro and the communists in Cuba.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Five
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ][IMG]

Folks, it’s absolutely critical that we elect Tim Ryan to the
Senate—here are five big reasons why making a $5 donation right now is so
important:

1. Tim’s facing off against 5 GOP millionaires who can self-fund their
campaigns.

2. Republicans have already spent more than $80 million in this race—and
it’s sure to ramp up in the coming weeks and months.

3. Tim’s out-of-touch GOP opponents don’t give a damn about hardworking
Ohioans.

4. Electing Tim is Democrats’ best shot at expanding our Democratic Senate
majority.

5. If Tim wins he’ll join me in the Senate and together we’ll give Ohio
the most pro-worker delegation in the country.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10477?t=1009&amount=5&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]Tim’s GOP opponents are millionaires backed by billionaires that think
they can buy this open seat—can I count on you to chip in just $5 to Tim’s
campaign to prove them wrong?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10479?t=1007&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]Chip in $5

I know a thing or two about tough races—and I’ve proven that Democrats can
win in Ohio.

When I first got elected to office, I would spend my weekends visiting
union halls and factories, because if you want to fight for workers, you
need to show up and talk to them directly. That’s also how I’ve been able
to fend off my own GOP challengers in every one of my Senate campaigns.

Whether it’s in Congress or on the campaign trail—Tim has proven time and
time again that he’ll go to bat for hardworking Ohioans.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10477?t=1010&amount=5&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]Tim has what it takes to win and flip this seat blue, but I’m counting
on you to help him. Will you chip in $5 or more to elect him to the
Senate?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10477?t=1011&amount=5&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]Donate $5 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10477?t=1012&amount=25&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10477?t=1013&amount=50&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10477?t=1014&amount=100&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10477?t=1015&amount=250&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10477?t=1016&amount=30&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]Other Amount

The last thing Ohio needs is an out-of-touch millionaire in the Senate.

With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown
Senator, Ohio

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.timforoh.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3250%2E3611125%2Eyo627b

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Tax Day is Approaching!
body:
Everyday is tax day for Democrats [](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjthjkt-yddjllujiu-r/) [>> Did You Pay Too Much in Taxes? <<](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjthjkt-yddjllujiu-j/) Fellow Republican, _**With tax day coming up, h**_**[ow are you feeling about this year's tax filing? Did you pay too much? Do you feel like you could pay more?](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjthjkt-yddjllujiu-t/)** Joe Biden doesn't think you paid enough. It may not be on your official tax documents, but his spending has boosted inflation to historic heights and gas is nearing apocalyptic prices. **Whether you like it or not, you're paying for his radical agenda. ** [](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjthjkt-yddjllujiu-i/) [>> Crippling! <<](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjthjkt-yddjllujiu-d/) [>> Burdensome! <<](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjthjkt-yddjllujiu-h/) [>> Just Right! <<](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjthjkt-yddjllujiu-k/) The government is spending way too much and leaving you to foot the bill. You deserve a break. As your voice in Congress, I'm fighting to lower taxes and enact policies that curb rising prices.Ronald Reagan once said,_**" Republicans believe every day is the 4th of July, but Democrats believe everyday is [tax day]."**_They will squeeze you for every last penny as long as it pays for their woke agenda. [_**Take our poll and let me know how you felt about your taxes this year!**_](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjthjkt-yddjllujiu-u/) Thank you,
Glenn Grothman [](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjthjkt-yddjllujiu-o/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-u-qjthjkt-yddjllujiu-b/)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Have you seen the Michelle for Governor hats?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Check out our new merch store!

https://www.michelle4mn.com
Dear Fellow Republicans,

Last week was so energizing on the campaign trail meeting with folks across the state! Our campaign continues to gain momentum because of YOU!

STATE SENATE & OUTREACH

In the Senate last week, I voted to eliminate the tax on Social Security income and cut the first-rate income tax nearly in half. If enacted this would be the largest tax cut in the history of the state of Minnesota.

Tuesday night we had a wonderful turnout for a meet and greet in Tonka Bay. I enjoyed speaking with everyone there and hearing what they are looking for in our next Governor.

http://https//www.michelle4mn.com/

Wednesday I stopped by a business in St. Cloud where we discussed inflation and the impact it is having on their bottom line. Then went on to the Wright County monthly meeting where there was a great turnout! I did a Facebook Live after the meeting if you want to head over to (http://www.facebook.com/michelleforminnesota) Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/michelleforminnesota) to check it out.

http://https//www.michelle4mn.com/
Thursday there was a lot of energy at the Liberty Tea Party meeting in Champlin! They are excited and driven to beat Tim Walz this fall.

http://https//www.michelle4mn.com/

VIRTUAL TOWNHALL

Team Benson hosted a virtual town hall meeting Friday evening. Attendees got answers to their questions and discussed our shared Republican priorities for Minnesota and my vision for the state.

CONVENTION SATURDAY

It was a beautiful spring day on Saturday across Minnesota and my team attended conventions starting in Duluth for CD8, on to Lakeville for CD2, and finishing in Minneapolis for the Young Republicans Convention. We heard you loud & clear that you are ready to end the DFL control in St. Paul.

http://https//www.michelle4mn.com/
Thank you for attending my events and conventions. It’s clear to me: Republicans are ready for a change. I am the most principled, prepared, and electable candidate and am ready to serve on Day 1.

Chip In To Help Michelle. Every little bit helps! We have a long road to get through the endorsing convention in FIVE weeks. If you can help please visit
https://secure.winred.com/michelle-for-minnesota/donate

Thank you!

In the meantime, please don’t hesitate to visit my website at www.michelle4mn.com or to reach out via email: Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com (mailto:Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com) or by phone at (612) 356-2256 if you have any questions or would like to volunteer to help my campaign.

Sincerely,

https://www.michelle4mn.com
Michelle Benson
Candidate for Governor (http://https//www.michelle4mn.com/) . (http://https//www.michelle4mn.com/)
https://www.michelle4mn.com/volunteer
INTERESTED IN VOLUNTEERING AT STATE CONVENTION (mailto:Maddie@Michelle4MN.com?subject=State%20Convention%20Volunteer%20)
VOLUNTEER FOR MICHELLE (mailto:Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com?subject=I%20would%20like%20to%20volunteer%20to%20help%20Michelle)
SUPPORT MICHELLE BY DONATING (https://secure.winred.com/michelle-for-minnesota/donate)

============================================================

clean_body: Check out our new merch store! Dear Fellow Republicans, Last week was so energizing on the campaign trail meeting with folks across the state! Our campaign continues to gain momentum because of YOU! STATE SENATE & OUTREACH In the Senate last week, I voted to eliminate the tax on Social Security income and cut the first-rate income tax nearly in half. If enacted this would be the largest tax cut in the history of the state of Minnesota. Tuesday night we had a wonderful turnout for a meet and greet in Tonka Bay. I enjoyed speaking with everyone there and hearing what they are looking for in our next Governor. Wednesday I stopped by a business in St. Cloud where we discussed inflation and the impact it is having on their bottom line. Then went on to the Wright County monthly meeting where there was a great turnout! I did a Facebook Live after the meeting if you want to head over to () Facebook () to check it out. Thursday there was a lot of energy at the Liberty Tea Party meeting in Champlin! They are excited and driven to beat Tim Walz this fall. VIRTUAL TOWNHALL Team Benson hosted a virtual town hall meeting Friday evening. Attendees got answers to their questions and discussed our shared Republican priorities for Minnesota and my vision for the state. CONVENTION SATURDAY It was a beautiful spring day on Saturday across Minnesota and my team attended conventions starting in Duluth for CD8, on to Lakeville for CD2, and finishing in Minneapolis for the Young Republicans Convention. We heard you loud & clear that you are ready to end the DFL control in St. Paul. Thank you for attending my events and conventions. It’s clear to me: Republicans are ready for a change. I am the most principled, prepared, and electable candidate and am ready to serve on Day 1. Chip In To Help Michelle. Every little bit helps! We have a long road to get through the endorsing convention in FIVE weeks. If you can help please visit Thank you! In the meantime, please don’t hesitate to visit my website at www.michelle4mn.com or to reach out via email: Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com (mailto:Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com) or by phone at (612) 356-2256 if you have any questions or would like to volunteer to help my campaign. Sincerely, Michelle Benson Candidate for Governor () . () INTERESTED IN VOLUNTEERING AT STATE CONVENTION (mailto:Maddie@Michelle4MN.com?subject=State%20Convention%20Volunteer%20) VOLUNTEER FOR MICHELLE (mailto:Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com?subject=I%20would%20like%20to%20volunteer%20to%20help%20Michelle) SUPPORT MICHELLE BY DONATING () ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () YouTube () Website () PREPARED & PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE OUR MAILING ADDRESS P.O. BOX 549 2168 7TH AVE ANOKA, MN 55303 (You're receiving this email because you've attended an MNGOP caucus) Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences () or ** unsubscribe from this list () .

subject: To: Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
CONGRATULATIONS! >>
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK)._
---
We’re overjoyed at the HISTORIC confirmation of Ketanji Brown Jackson! **So we’re sending a letter DIRECTLY to her to congratulate Justice Jackson on her monumental confirmation, and to thank her for her bravery in the face of such objectionable MAGA maniacs.**[**We’re sending this letter tomorrow at 10 AM SHARP and it’s bound to go viral – so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8581?t=7&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8582?t=8&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK) | [DONATE $1 TO SIGN NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8581?t=9&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK)
---
TO: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson FROM: A grateful Democrat Subject: CONGRATULATIONS
**_Dear Justice Jackson – CONGRATULATIONS!_**
**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we had when your nomination was FINALLY confirmed last Thursday!**
It has been a “pinch-yourself” moment for all of us as we all bear witness to your historic nomination (_and now confirmation!_) as the first Black woman appointed to the Supreme Court!
**We know it has been an incredibly challenging time for you and your family as you were so aggressively and unceremoniously ATTACKED and belittled by political hacks trying to appease Donald Trump.**
**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations.**
[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $1 to Voter Protection Project to show that we will continue to fight for Senate Democrats and help dismantle the illegally stolen MAGA-Majority Supreme Court!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8581?t=10&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8582?t=11&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK) | [**DONATE $1 TO SIGN NOW** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8581?t=12&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK)
---

_Justice Jackson, we know you will help to deliver the transformative justice that has been eroded by the Trump-appointed MAGA court, and we cannot wait to cheer you on while you do it._

[**Congratulations again on your historic nomination. We are so, so, so proud of you!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8581?t=13&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK)

**X A GRATEFUL DEMOCRAT**

[DONATE $1 TO SIGN NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8581?t=14&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK)
---

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1817%2E878179%2Eh68OaK) to request fewer emails. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Praying banned on Good Friday?
body:
It's been over 45 days since we sent the Spreckels Union School District a letter demanding immediate injunctive relief for the twisted gaslighting they did to Jessica Konen's 12-year-old daughter...

|
I apologize for being so abrupt, but I urgently need your help.

Unelected bureaucrats and corrupt politicians in Washington D.C. are threatening to shred the First Amendment to pieces by deciding when, where, and how you can exercise your God-given freedoms.

And my team of attorneys at the Center for American Liberty is trying to stop them with a critical lawsuit being heard this week at the Court of Appeals in Washington, D.C.

But with less than a week to secure a crucial victory in court before Good Friday, I'm relying on you and every other American patriot who cares about the unalienable rights enshrined in our constitution to help me today.

[**Will you please help us defend religious liberty by supporting our emergency appeal against the United States Capitol Police Board today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60116931:Jq4jcloXN:m:1:3317145305:04015F200A0F75320C19DFE0879BDFEC:r)

Let be briefly explain what this lawsuit is all about.

For the past 32 years, a local pastor - Reverend Patrick Mahoney - gathered his faithful parishioners on the steps of the United States Capitol on Good Friday to give thanks to God and to pray for our nation.

[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60116931:Jq4jcloXN:m:1:3317145305:04015F200A0F75320C19DFE0879BDFEC:r)
That was until last year when unelected bureaucrats intervened and shut the whole thing down.

For the first time in three decades, Rev. Mahoney was DENIED a permit to worship in public.

Then, a few months later, he applied for a permit to hold a prayer vigil at the U.S. Capitol on the anniversary of September 11 to pray for healing for our nation.

Again, his permit was DENIED.

_Never mind the fact that simply being required to get a permit to exercise the right to pray in public is a gross violation of the Constitution ..._

The feckless, unelected bureaucrats at the United States Capitol told Rev. Mahoney and his peaceful worshipers that they couldn't pray on the public grounds outside the Capitol.

But the Capitol Police Board didn't stop far-left Congresswoman Cori Bush from camping out on the Capitol steps for several days in protest.

[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60116931:Jq4jcloXN:m:1:3317145305:04015F200A0F75320C19DFE0879BDFEC:r)
The Capitol Police Board even granted a large organization a permit to protest with massive stage, sound equipment, and media presence.

And when asked, the Capitol Police Board admitted that they granted these and at least one other permit application at the request of a member of Congress.

There was never a real concern for "public safety."

**The U.S. Capitol Police Board denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray in public because he didn 't have the support of AOC, Nancy Pelosi, or any other member of Congress.**

THAT'S UNCONSTITUTIONAL.

It's not up to unelected bureaucrats or politicians to pick and choose who can speak, pray, or assemble in public.

That's why the Center for American Liberty is suing the United States Capitol Police Board on behalf of Rev. Patrick Mahoney for unconstitutionally denying him and his parishioners the right to exercise their First Amendment freedoms.

[**Will you help us win our lawsuit and hold these violators of the Constitution accountable with a tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60116931:Jq4jcloXN:m:1:3317145305:04015F200A0F75320C19DFE0879BDFEC:r)

The reason I need your help is because the Center for American Liberty - the public interest law firm I founded a few years ago to defend the liberties of Americans left behind by civil liberties legacy organizations - is a non-profit organization with limited means.

So, the only way we can afford to pay for this lawsuit and others like it is with the help of patriots like you.

**This lawsuit is going to cost $50,000. But that 's a small price to pay to protect our freedoms.**

I'm asking for your help because our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board represents so much more than just one man's right to pray in public.

This lawsuit represents your right, my right, and every American's right to exercise their freedom of speech, freedom of religion, and freedom of assembly...

...no matter what you have to say, when you want to say it, and how you express it.

Even if you never personally experienced it, I'll bet you know someone who was told that they couldn't go to church or leave their homes over the past few years under the totalitarian edicts of far-left governors in the name of "public safety..."

... while those very same elites attended lavish dinner parties at Michelin starred restaurants and turned a blind eye to abject anarchy by their far-left activist base.

And if they aren't held accountable for their hypocrisy and illegal restrictions, they'll continue to spur up "crisis" after "crisis" to gain further control of your life.

The constitutional rights of every American are on the line with our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board.

[**Please help us win this critical lawsuit by making a tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60116931:Jq4jcloXN:m:1:3317145305:04015F200A0F75320C19DFE0879BDFEC:r)

For Freedom,

[
](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60116931:Jq4jcloXN:m:1:3317145305:04015F200A0F75320C19DFE0879BDFEC:r)
Harmeet K. Dhillon

P.S. Like I mentioned, we have less than a week to win this case before Good Friday.

Earlier this week, the district court ruled against our original request for a preliminary injunction.

But I'm not taking "no" for an answer.

The Bill of Rights states plain as day that, "Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof..."

And the Center for American Liberty is feverishly working to preserve that guarantee for you, your children, and your grandchildren.

[**I hope that I can count on you to help us defend that right by contribution $35 or more to our emergency appeal against the U.S. Capitol Police Board today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60116931:Jq4jcloXN:m:1:3317145305:04015F200A0F75320C19DFE0879BDFEC:r)

Thank you in advance for your support!

[ DONATE ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60116931:Jq4jcloXN:m:1:3317145305:04015F200A0F75320C19DFE0879BDFEC:r)
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60116931:Jq4jcloXN:m:1:3317145305:04015F200A0F75320C19DFE0879BDFEC:r)
---
[**Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60116931:Jq4jcloXN:m:1:3317145305:04015F200A0F75320C19DFE0879BDFEC:r)

The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
| (C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60116932:Jq4jcloXN:m:1:3317145305:04015F200A0F75320C19DFE0879BDFEC:r)
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

---

## **Elevate Your Life With Better Hearing**
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | **This Device Does More Than Just “Aid” Your Hearing**
The world's leading online provider of hearing aids, hear.com, just launched its smallest and most powerful weapon against hearing loss. And it’s completely crushing the market with powerful Bluetooth and German technology.

In the last couple of years, many of the world's best hearing aid engineers have been working restlessly on this top-secret project to develop a new technology that is so small and sophisticated that it truly changes people's lives.

**The result:** In 2021, hear.com finally revealed its ultimate secret weapon that is smaller, stronger, and smarter than ever before! The device is called the horizon — **and it will change your life.**

It’s really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's 45-day no-risk trial.

The device is called the horizon — and it will change your life. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Limited No-Risk Trials Now Available | | | | | | As of today, hear.com has partnered with over 2,000 hearing care specialists to ensure the horizon is available across the U.S. It’s really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's 45-day no-risk trial. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- P.O. name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: Sign the Petition - Elon Musk can save free speech!
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDMtNTUyZjZjYjViY2U0NGU0OGIwMmE5ZTk1ZjJkZWUzMzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1QTTI2OTEwIn0/e3uM3t0f4HIChWzdjyX3Fw)
---
|
---
Fellow free speech lover, A few days ago, Twitter announced that Elon Musk, the electric car-making, rocket-launching, tunnel-drilling, flamethrower-wielding, richest man on Earth, had recently become its largest shareholder. That's great news for free speech-and great news for us here at the Babylon Bee. You see, my team has been locked out of our Twitter account for several weeks now because we dared to state the shocking truth that a man is a man. You may have read about it in the news, or seen me talking about it with Tucker Carlson on Fox News. Right now, Twitter is holding our account hostage and demanding that we delete our "offensive" tweet in order to regain access. But I promise you - that's not going to happen. Instead, we're standing our ground. We're standing for the truth. And with Elon Musk now holding a sizable portion of Twitter's stock, it looks like our window of opportunity may be opening. [**Will you take a moment right now to stand with the Babylon Bee for free speech by signing this petition to Elon Musk and urging him to reinstate our account?**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDMtNTUyZjZjYjViY2U0NGU0OGIwMmE5ZTk1ZjJkZWUzMzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1QTTI2OTEwIn0/NAQU1i5ZThGmDy1CtaOPgQ)
---
[**Sign the Petition**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDMtNTUyZjZjYjViY2U0NGU0OGIwMmE5ZTk1ZjJkZWUzMzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1QTTI2OTEwIn0/3QVBizfn6JDDHctjT7qwOA)
---
The Babylon Bee is Twitter's number-one target right now - and all because we dared to mock their left-wing orthodoxy.
---
| [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDMtNTUyZjZjYjViY2U0NGU0OGIwMmE5ZTk1ZjJkZWUzMzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1QTTI2OTEwIn0/1ro1QzkrwMzTEOcvxdrbSg)We posted this tweet a few weeks back, naming Dr. Rachel Levine, a transgender member of the Biden administration, our "Man of the Year." It was our satirical response to USA Today's decision to name Dr. Levine their "Woman of the Year." Shortly after, I received an email from Twitter letting me know that they were locking the Babylon Bee team out of our account for violating their "hateful conduct" policy. Since then, a few of our editors have been locked out of their accounts. Tucker Carlson was locked out of his account after expressing support for us. Charlie Kirk received the same treatment.
---
And all of this backlash comes because we dared to state the truth: That Rachel Levine, a biological male, is not a woman. [**We will NEVER surrender to Twitter's woke agenda. And with Elon Musk becoming their largest shareholder, it looks like we may finally get the reprieve we've been looking for. But if he's going to use his new influence to take action, Elon needs to hear from millions of concerned Americans. Will you stand with us by signing the petition right now?**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDMtNTUyZjZjYjViY2U0NGU0OGIwMmE5ZTk1ZjJkZWUzMzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1QTTI2OTEwIn0/spF2qtSYsH7kEhCIL3XW8A) Here's the good news - Elon Musk is a fan of the Bee. He has expressed his support for us in the past, and he was even a guest on our podcast last year. But that doesn't mean that our case is a slam-dunk. He has bylaws, legal constraints, policies, and other shareholders to think of. If we're going to stand any chance of getting his attention, we need to assemble _MILLIONS_ of concerned Americans, all urging him to stand up for free speech online by reinstating the Bee on Twitter. [**You can join that call now by signing the petition.**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDMtNTUyZjZjYjViY2U0NGU0OGIwMmE5ZTk1ZjJkZWUzMzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1QTTI2OTEwIn0/BPZ9-MGlBA5QfcXaN0qVAg) Right now, the Babylon Bee is paying the price for daring to speak the truth. Tomorrow, it could be you. But if we can get Elon in our corner, we can turn back the censorship offensive at Twitter and gain a major foothold in the fight to defend free speech online. Please help us show Twitter and Elon Musk that the Babylon Bee isn't standing alone. Help us show them that we're standing with MILLIONS of Americans who believe that the truth is not hate speech - and who REFUSE to let the truth be censored. [**Click here to sign the petition right now.**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDMtNTUyZjZjYjViY2U0NGU0OGIwMmE5ZTk1ZjJkZWUzMzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1QTTI2OTEwIn0/ei00HjZtVa9xqgp-Lk1kCA)
---
[**Sign the Petition**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDMtNTUyZjZjYjViY2U0NGU0OGIwMmE5ZTk1ZjJkZWUzMzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vcHhsLmlzdC9wcjl6c2Z6aG9sP3NyYz1QTTI2OTEwIn0/7b6Zp4CyD25KCr1pw2-wWQ)
---
Twitter can silence us, but as long as we stand together, they can't silence the truth.
---
| | Seth DillonCEO, The Babylon Bee
---
|
---
_Copyright © 2022 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._
**Our mailing address is:**
The Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box 546
Jupiter, FL 33468
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.net/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzMDk2NTg1IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIxMDMtNTUyZjZjYjViY2U0NGU0OGIwMmE5ZTk1ZjJkZWUzMzQiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/FU0A45nH8GPWDkFgSJgINQ) to unsubscribe.
---

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9899%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qNTgI9jJMpdHnC0%2blMDdrg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28255%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GhR0tQxAED6oMBkYYs2IVg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28256%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UybfuTxazji9AKBuOTpTjA&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28256%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UybfuTxazji9AKBuOTpTjA&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9899%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qNTgI9jJMpdHnC0%2blMDdrg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9899%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qNTgI9jJMpdHnC0%2blMDdrg&sysid=1)

name: Glenn Beck
subject: How to help in Ukraine right now:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z85928et9uvmmtt0k5e1re5t5dm1opcrd7uukikg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o35c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s34espn6crhecq78c9j6ep7cp70m2p61chmemq72chjm5hrfchkegpjapb0s9gefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5l6hjr4d366hibbcb7m2qmash5u)
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbq17uql5kthhvvaedshu1oq2mnb888t7pl9hrh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o35c9h2bs)
---
|
---
Fellow American,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3br8u9gtaej2i7hdgg20b96fhlanfh6o0k9t2to_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o35c9h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zti756v5fkhuhudrkps6vgfsan548s8hamvg1dc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o35c9h2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf3bjt7673l98s11akvgrftlhfl0uv1i3u1u0jio_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o35c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---

body:

I'm proud to endorse **[Josh](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6t6i6pjj8c6kah0nhrh6jqtgb1jtmqigsfqmmv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o34c1h2bs)** , and I'm looking forward to halting the disastrous agenda of the Biden Administration with him in the U.S. Senate next year. name: Greg Stamps
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zab93sjme791l2s753d914tsti9hk6b7coalr5og_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o32c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfbdhkshr3bdj16hge1o75e2o6cp5lecr32p9m6kr61db7m3i64cj56gor9otlesrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9d9kcup38phkc2pm4ptgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ggc2k8571g28qf95pv8e67vn6f6b3c0jlt5f98_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o32c5h2bs)
---
Dear Friend, I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people—and you may be among them—I’m thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z457kdsum9muhrvfaj0uoetunm1fv0ajipf7u9to_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o32c5h2bs) “Tax cuts for the rich” is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_“_**** _Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_”_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd3ile9stvperrsh3jbud0hm44p2s9lsemllulko_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o32c5h2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge. [**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ “Trickle Down” Theory and “Tax Cuts for the Rich” _****now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6lp8tu1sslfk1tbb18786lm3jep0pct2ac1pago_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o32c5h2bs) Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

name: Tim Scott
subject: I know how much $5 is.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I know that asking for money is hard. I know that asking for something as little as $5 can be even harder. To a lot of people $5
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvsup0o0vr9ofvamfrkm1rmq6g2hue4np65j6jgg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq6fcbnmsrb9ctn63g67cj0e6p7cdtl65g7fc3lm6p7dcr2mupbadjlceo7fd9gcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti65j7cpplm9jrcpj66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5ie1ob1c1hm2oh5u)

|
---
| | |
Friend,

I know that asking for money is hard. I know that asking for something as little as $5 can be even harder. To a lot of people $5 is a lot.

It was a lot for me growing up. I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13.

**I understand the value of a dollar.**

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

With that being said, it would mean so much to me if you could chip in $5 to make sure we beat our goal.

---
| | | [Chip in $5](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziss3stvj8uk8c9021rhr74mc39bn095s2g7piho_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o33c5h2bs)
---

Thank you so much. I know that chipping in any amount can be hard - but if I meet my goal, I can continue this fight for folks like you.

-Tim
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr45dj3io86v58v8i10qn1of5kftluq876b8udug_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3gm2o33c5h2bs)
---
Friend, the difference between flipping just ONE more seat in the Senate means more than you might think.

Without taking the Senate back from the hands of the dangerous Democrat agenda, I'm worried that the American Dream is going to become nothing but a distant memory. The direction this country is going under the Democrats is _**frightening**_.

If Republicans have enough support to take back the Senate, we can secure hope, prosperity, and American values for generations to come.

**But we can only do that with YOUR support**. There is **no one else** we can rely on at this point. You've been such a valued member of our team since Day 1 - can you take this one crucial step with us?
---

---
Thank you for saving America with me today, Friend.
---

name: Great America Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6876%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=eBAvlXQJPL1p4la3HovHeA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60661%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EFXWF81sAHHWx6m8EXQZGw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60662%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sf0CxfNz1f%2bTpHyHSMl%2boQ&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60663%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gJiyRGEE3mE4%2bnbKxgUj%2bg&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

subject: In Case You Missed It

body:
I am fighting to put Alaska First. | I am honored to have the endorsement of President Donald Trump. He fought to put America First for four years as our President, and I plan to do the same for Alaska as your next Member of Congress.
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osj9Ab4HNq)
**[IN CASE YOU MISSED IT:](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59959535:sj9Ab4HNq:m:1:2532013465:946F2BCBE9127AB7545ACCE268D03B12:r)
[PRESIDENT TRUMP ENDORSED SARAH PALIN FOR THE NEXT MEMBER OF CONGRESS FROM ALASKA](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59959535:sj9Ab4HNq:m:1:2532013465:946F2BCBE9127AB7545ACCE268D03B12:r)**

Friend,

I am honored to have the endorsement of President Donald Trump.

He fought to put America First for four years as our President, and I plan to do the same for Alaska as your next Member of Congress.

I'm ready to get to Washington to FIGHT for our values, but I can only do that with YOUR support, Friend.

While this race is just beginning, we only have about two months until the election. I have President Trump's support, and now I need yours.

_**[Please rush in a donation of ANY AMOUNT to publicly stand with President Trump and me as I fight to put ALASKA FIRST.>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59959535:sj9Ab4HNq:m:1:2532013465:946F2BCBE9127AB7545ACCE268D03B12:r)**_

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59959535:sj9Ab4HNq:m:1:2532013465:946F2BCBE9127AB7545ACCE268D03B12:r)

Your support is critical right now, Friend.

_Personally, I've got nothing to lose, but Alaska and our nation do._ Public service is a calling, and I would be honored to represent the men and women of Alaska in Congress, just as Congressman Young did for 49 years.

This is your chance to be one of my first supporters. I know you won't let me down.

**[Please donate $10 or more IMMEDIATELY to help me put Alaska First.>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59959535:sj9Ab4HNq:m:1:2532013465:946F2BCBE9127AB7545ACCE268D03B12:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59959535:sj9Ab4HNq:m:1:2532013465:946F2BCBE9127AB7545ACCE268D03B12:r)
Sarah Palin
Candidate for Congress for Alaska

name: Genesis 123 Foundation
subject: Passover 2022
body:
**
URGENT PASSOVER APPEAL** As Passover approaches, Jews around the world celebrate our redemption from slavery in Egypt, and the return to Israel. Sadly, due to the current state of global affairs, far too many Jews have been displaced and won't be home to celebrate. Most of the Jews of Ukraine will be celebrating in exile, or attempting to live through the Festival of Freedom in a war zone. For a Jew, not being home on Passover is of tremendous significance, akin to a Christian not being home for Christmas. **[The Genesis 123 Foundation established a fund to support people in Ukraine, and the millions of refugees who have fled. We need your help to provide urgent Passover supplies to the many thousands of Jews, celebrating the Exodus in exile.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60120164:6DyYBloNU:m:1:3317145305:44917DA0A18A6A934E49237211FB6549:r "The Genesis 123 Foundation established a fund to support people in
Ukraine, and the millions of refugees who have fled. We need your help to provide urgent Passover supplies to the many thousands of Jews, celebrating
the Exodus in exile.")** In Poland, there have been so many refugees that the Jewish population in Poland has increased by hundreds of percent. The Jewish community there has been working tirelessly to provide for the needs of all refugees, Jews and non-Jews. The rabbi in Krakow said they are so overwhelmed that they haven't begun to prepare for Passover which usually takes time, because they're just so busy finding food, warm clothes and places for the refugees to sleep. **[In these dire times, please join us in helping to make Passover possible for the tens of thousands of Jews suffering as a result of the war in Ukraine.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60120164:6DyYBloNU:m:1:3317145305:44917DA0A18A6A934E49237211FB6549:r "In these dire times, please join us in helping to make Passover
possible for the tens of thousands of Jews suffering as a result of the war in Ukraine.")** I hope you can find it in your heart to provide urgent support for the citizens of Ukraine, those who are still fighting for their country and those who have become refugees, Jews and non-Jews. All of them are desperately seeking to survive this atrocity and we are doing our part to ease their suffering now, and for Passover. **[Please help us today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60120164:6DyYBloNU:m:1:3317145305:44917DA0A18A6A934E49237211FB6549:r "Please help us today!")** May the Lord Bless You and Keep You, Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation
---

Team,
New reporting from the Washington Post puts far-right extremist Jim Marchant squarely in the middle of a push from the ‘big lie’ extremists to hand-count all election results.
Here’s what they had to say about why that was such a bad idea: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041322_B1_AC_30D]
“Experts say hand-counting ballots is so impractical that, if adopted, election results would be thrown into unimaginable chaos, inviting mass human error and delaying results — and potentially giving bad actors more time to slow or even block certification.”
We cannot let Jim Marchant destroy Nevada’s elections. Chip in $10 right now to help us hit our 1,000 mid-month donation goal and defeat ‘big lie’ extremists like him >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041322_B1_AC_30D]

This isn’t about ‘security’ – we know the 2020 election was one of the safest, most secure ever.
This is all about laying the groundwork for unilaterally overturning any election results that they don’t like.

We need principled leadership and experience in our nation’s capital to make sure we are prepared in the face of crisis. Matt is just the person we need to represent the Buckeye State. Thank you, Dolan Campaign Team

subject: you ever heard the term “tracker?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44073002/339989296/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTVkMjJhMy0yOWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dCXYyJ6O5ksh13gVBe13nCX5se-sbgUhPz4HRy1e9eM=&emci=f89add14-e9ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b95d22a3-29bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44073008/339989302/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTVkMjJhMy0yOWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dCXYyJ6O5ksh13gVBe13nCX5se-sbgUhPz4HRy1e9eM=&emci=f89add14-e9ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b95d22a3-29bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office.
“Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News.
Well, the first tracker of the campaign has been showing up to my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.”
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. **And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority.**
And we can win: The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley!
**I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against the GOP’s lies and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $250,000 before our mid-month deadline if we’re going to win, but right now, we’re still $68,032 short.**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford before our critical mid-month deadline to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44073017/339989310/-42398318?refcode=em20220413am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTVkMjJhMy0yOWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dCXYyJ6O5ksh13gVBe13nCX5se-sbgUhPz4HRy1e9eM=)

clean_body: Hello, Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office. “Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News. Well, the first tracker of the campaign has been showing up to my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.” Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority. And we can win: The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley! I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against the GOP’s lies and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $250,000 before our mid-month deadline if we’re going to win, but right now, we’re still $68,032 short. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m running for Senate because I care about the people of Iowa. I want to help Iowans achieve their potential and make our state a leader again in manufacturing, education, and clean energy. And I believe I’ve got the experience to get the job done. But the only way I can get that message out and correct the lies they’re going to tell about me is with your donation now to my campaign. Thank you for being a part of the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

Friend,

I’ve always believed that when a person shows you who they are, believe them the first time.

And here’s what Ron DeSantis has shown us:
* He’s signed hateful, extremist bills into law like the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, which silences teachers and bans all discussion of LGBTQ+ issues from Florida’s classrooms.

* He signed voter suppression laws making it harder to vote and trying to silence the voices of our seniors and communities of color.

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Endorsement Alert: John McGuire for State Senate 10
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
Bishop E.W. Jackson
---
| | | | | | VA Delegate John McGuire Running for State Senate D10 in 2023 Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner)
---
| Endorsement Alert! Bishop E.W. Jackson Endorses John McGuire For State Senator for Virginia's 10th District

---
|
---
| "The Commonwealth of Virginia has experienced a decade of poor leadership in our statewide Constitutional offices and several years of Democrat control of our legislature. We need representatives who not only have a vision for change, but the courage to undo the damage which the Left has done. That is why I am honored to endorse Delegate John McGuire for Virginia State Senate in District 10.
As a Navy SEAL, John has demonstrated the courage to wade into the most difficult and dangerous situations imaginable. While some shrink back from the fray, he does not hesitate to confront the most difficult legal and cultural issues of our time. He will defend our God-given rights and liberty against all enemies, foreign and domestic. When he goes to the State Senate, he will continue to fight for the right of the unborn to life, the right of the people to keep and bear arms, the right to freedom of speech and religion and the right of parents to choose to educate their children with the values they hold and in the school of their choice.
John has the consistent conservative voting record to prove where he stands and that he does not wither in the face of opposition. As a family man, John not only fights for our shared ideals, but for his wife and children.
We need John in the 10th Senate District. I am asking my friends and fellow Republicans to join me in supporting a conservative we can count on in this time of crisis. Let's vote, contribute and work to get John McGuire elected to to Virginia State Senate. Let's send a Navy SEAL." -[Bishop E.W. Jackson](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017d8pIG00bXL5ORlGgCOreZ9Vu57bcxtn0aS6-0iXaepaALy-VK6sBv41rcFSwmTVn2n2aurc8oHBuT6jgcx5yYUrpP3iBLr2MWAlq3OsmfkBx6hpeTehycGfYYGjkBr0DAMNhIzvoScGmgBgtxVhFNHJoygTiHVDi9ChX3tvhqY=&c=8no8m6Kk0OR-mwXeUxuAfZZ5y9x4BfsjUJe2DJXZG0l_ek4NWkMgVA==&ch=_4YezLZeCMDV4xIGbY2EL_76Ot4KmpAFHrORvsZqJo954-EZOD5HNg==)

As a current Member of the Virginia House of Delegates with one of the highest conservative scores in Virginia each year since 2017, I know first-hand how radical leftist policies are dividing us and making the world less safe at the federal, state, and local levels. Our children have less freedom today than we had growing up. For a better future for Virginia, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and pass Governor Glenn Youngkin's Agenda. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Please spread the word and I hope to see you around the district!

name: Greater Georgia
subject: SHOT/CHASER: FOLLOWING REPORTS OF LIBERAL INDOCTRINATION, ATLANTA’S LARGEST HIGH SCHOOL DOUBLES DOWN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, APRIL 13 SHOT/CHASER: FOLLOWING REPORTS OF LIBERAL INDOCTRINATION, ATLANTA'S LARGEST HIGH SCHOOL DOUBLES DOWN ATLANTA - Atlanta Public Schools (APS) has doubled down on its partnership with the New Georgia Project (NGP), reaffirming its commitment to working exclusively with liberal organizations in the effort to indoctrinate students and recruit them for far-Left activism. On April 1st, North Atlanta High School [advertised](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018C12Homt8UeZ0xnCI0cxjSL6sHMmmX3vuGXQumkuftVhYMCgr-Jq87ZX2Fka0v0WJyP0xC5oDj5RYTvxmP0lt61Ga3FkCfnAKZ-OSFoZm6X4IReUWSSyHCjQ-WCJHXCJFknmkOFWmnK-lHx0g8Rse-pgSAgeZC-hxAEubNK9qG0m80ix6KMo2l2LkCW7xhMk_F6NC8HEg_ziZsj1v47e8elXIC3op4I-ycy3V2O8ltW14tki0vb3cN7lEgmvJWloZyCshGQyTU3I4uJWZ_AZBjWQP9vG4d5UopEEwa9jVmbgf0cDuTVjLu7f0HCRJ15MYf05zXRiS532ug2uj4Vsz4cHfrPYNJYW&c=FfxOwt2SvFlpFul5tzyZmFTslXeX5tGW7VuCJ16Rn4jrBb0CY9mm6w==&ch=uXrHUAC_NJ4oC2DQW2JlD8YTVXOTAdX4iiIIkEL4GPDAEDs0TTkPLA==) that NGP would be on its campus registering students to vote. When Greater Georgia reached out and asked for the same access to support registration efforts, the school refused - citing the existing partnership with NGP and declining to allow Greater Georgia on campus to register students for the remainder of the school year.
This development comes after Greater Georgia [exposed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018C12Homt8UeZ0xnCI0cxjSL6sHMmmX3vuGXQumkuftVhYMCgr-Jq87ZX2Fka0v0WRqbPtu7E1Upckq8p8bKpydniY7guyQi9yuOZ6BKtMt-qPtRyeT9JiSoS-N7ImRN--noE74uNpOTsBMrRhlDm7zPa8Ns3rJL2NlW_6GOFcBN141-r_iRWiHF2o6ERi382EWFvOJzK5yq63imGLvU9Xt_xJE0YPM2jZL2S384FlYTwmtdocSoOu92KfKmdvb2u&c=FfxOwt2SvFlpFul5tzyZmFTslXeX5tGW7VuCJ16Rn4jrBb0CY9mm6w==&ch=uXrHUAC_NJ4oC2DQW2JlD8YTVXOTAdX4iiIIkEL4GPDAEDs0TTkPLA==) a coordinated effort with APS and NGP to indoctrinate students with a radical "voting rights" curriculum. The lesson plans in "Democracy Class Atlanta" are [intended](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018C12Homt8UeZ0xnCI0cxjSL6sHMmmX3vuGXQumkuftVhYMCgr-Jq87iBx777WHk_SLu-KURuGj-Y5YfIdcXxHrDEOD2tpWNm8j6LOVXOxFqZKeHtQHEb116puBnEXj524k4iLv2Eu7kTbQMV41dIFo7441-6dKUJtZAxnDR1Qhbe5JwlRUcVfaXv3miUk42b3eaXef1IWeVR9HI2Uw_wqnMAjlCCzX6F24WRb7htWTygXzRsHVrqR7pArBV1ivJg&c=FfxOwt2SvFlpFul5tzyZmFTslXeX5tGW7VuCJ16Rn4jrBb0CY9mm6w==&ch=uXrHUAC_NJ4oC2DQW2JlD8YTVXOTAdX4iiIIkEL4GPDAEDs0TTkPLA==) to "train up the state's next generation of progressive champions." Students are [encouraged](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018C12Homt8UeZ0xnCI0cxjSL6sHMmmX3vuGXQumkuftVhYMCgr-Jq87iBx777WHk_jeE0atAGAAc8VHW6uPH6d6-CnlZKSAgxU-SxnCocJw5YNNtg6bO6IWqzFHwiQ_lbBrF6wqjUtN5aiPOOyXxa-UnMMPtgwcDLiNIE-cUCCIPGzI7GGEUCJ5G-wTAuMV5d2Mc6NWg8Pe0dIRc0c6qRVA==&c=FfxOwt2SvFlpFul5tzyZmFTslXeX5tGW7VuCJ16Rn4jrBb0CY9mm6w==&ch=uXrHUAC_NJ4oC2DQW2JlD8YTVXOTAdX4iiIIkEL4GPDAEDs0TTkPLA==) to adopt partisan views based on organizers' [goals](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018C12Homt8UeZ0xnCI0cxjSL6sHMmmX3vuGXQumkuftVhYMCgr-Jq87iBx777WHk__A_CqTJD9rbiLuGrt0l36nUMkcn99ntPAqSCWx9ilxA0qmY-ze453O8hhjXGgiXckeAMcchwVJT0bSejwtivIvMuvIBlumUJ-Sq1N2tysubOff6qOWRixkRssvzlZcsln_aebLlRdHn9c03IhL0EUw==&c=FfxOwt2SvFlpFul5tzyZmFTslXeX5tGW7VuCJ16Rn4jrBb0CY9mm6w==&ch=uXrHUAC_NJ4oC2DQW2JlD8YTVXOTAdX4iiIIkEL4GPDAEDs0TTkPLA==) to "convert these people into members, activists and organizers who show up with us on our campaigns." "With over 2,000 students, North Atlanta High School is the largest public high school in Atlanta. If they truly cared about civic engagement, school administrators would invite a range of groups to help register this tremendous number of future voters, instead of turning groups away," said Kelly Loeffler, former U.S. Senator and Chairwoman of Greater Georgia. "The truth is, Atlanta Public Schools are not interested in civics, or basic voter registration. Instead, they are working with the liberal New Georgia Project to indoctrinate and transform students into progressive activists. In their quest to turn Georgia blue, APS and NGP will silence those that don't promote their ideology. Every parent deserves to know what is being taught to their kids - and reject the partisan indoctrination that is replacing real civics education."

## [Mike Blasi Sides with NJ Parents Against Masking Kids](https://MikeBlasiForCongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed3ab556783898df4fb1eb6a1&id=360067b81f&e=5c7b109522)
_By Blasi for Congress on Apr 12, 2022 09:30 pm_
Mike Blasi had the opportunity to appear on the Todd Starnes Show. Mike was able to clearly and effectively elaborate his position on masking children. "They’re [Parents] not happy with their kids being masked, they’re not happy with what’s going on in their schools today, because I attend several boards of education meetings every week throughout the district, and nothing is more fierce than a mama bear." Mike Blasi has the courage to stand up for medical freedom.
[Read in browser »](https://MikeBlasiForCongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed3ab556783898df4fb1eb6a1&id=e1b4af3fc0&e=5c7b109522)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We’re not caving to their demands
body:
[****](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60123066:65iuxloNU:m:1:3317145305:7848C5C1C171EDDF20B4D883C0DC8AB1:r)
You may have heard about how Disney tried and failed to launch a smear campaign against a piece of legislation that I signed into law that protects 5-, 6-, and 7-year-olds from sexualized lesson plans in school.

Disney is continuing to lie about the bill, and their executives are continuing to smear me for defending the rights of parents and students.

**No one should be surprised. This once family friendly entertainment company that used to make dreams come true for generations of Americans is now little more than a woke corporation fighting to inject radical sexual orientation and gender identity theory into our children 's classrooms. **
_**[FIGHT BACK- ACT NOW >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60123066:65iuxloNU:m:1:3317145305:7848C5C1C171EDDF20B4D883C0DC8AB1:r "FIGHT BACK – ACT NOW >>>")**_
The company that gave us Mickey Mouse and Donald Duck has not only decided that this inappropriate content should be injected into kindergarten through third-grade classrooms, but they also think it should be streamlined into kids' movies and television shows.

I have news for the California executives at Woke Disney: **Florida parents will not stand idly by -** _**and neither will I.**_

As long as I'm governor, I will always fight for Florida families and our kids. I will never cave to the demands of a corporation that tries to inject sexualized lesson plans into Florida classrooms.

**Woke corporations do not run the state of Florida and they never will.**

**_[Help me continue the fight against the liberal machine's anti-parent agenda. Chip in $50, $25, or $15 now >>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60123066:65iuxloNU:m:1:3317145305:7848C5C1C171EDDF20B4D883C0DC8AB1:r "Help me continue the fight against the liberal machine’s anti-parent agenda. Chip in $50, $25, or $15 now
>>>")_**

Thank you for your support,
Ron DeSantis

[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60123066:65iuxloNU:m:1:3317145305:7848C5C1C171EDDF20B4D883C0DC8AB1:r)

| Peter \-
As I'm sure you've heard, President Trump publicly endorsed Mehmet Oz. However, YOU have made it clear that this campaign must continue to move forward!
In the days since Trump's endorsement, the numbers have been working out FOR us -- FOR YOU (because this is OUR campaign). Our presence on social media more than DOUBLED over the weekend. The messages and emails we received are absolutely amazing and your support fuels me to keep fighting.
So thank you for your continued support, because we need your help now more than ever.
Pennsylvania CAN go red, but we can't elect a RINO. RINOs do nothing but take up a seat that could be a vote in favor of legislation that aims to actually conserve the American way of life. Oz is a Liberal in a Republican's clothing -- but you already know that. And we also have a hedge fund billionaire to contend with -- one who's built a career on strengthening his Chinese investments while sidelining the wants and needs of the American people.
The choice is clear. With less than 35 days left in this race, it is critical that we do all we can to push and reach our fundraising goals. There is no doubt that with YOUR help we can win this Primary in an overwhelming victory! But I need you But I need you [to chip in whatever you can right now!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LloSBL7-TU3hA14yZtjj0TUJVhKtgUCs4HrAop04fmBB1lLmOrTehJQlK7Pgipdyr7dciLfQQ2h0RaBrWsC0X8VC--VdFxmhGEfgRFyZA1ld0XEoR1ZjWlN7kyzsDhmzfY9NRNF4UEA861Mc7dIWO-Yckwr3jsTGwJZAOUZixkAZ9-Fon06D6Q==&c=d1PHrkxVuBrubQ6qnoFSZ9co2hNRqnAJsz2zc1xkiNwFSwSXSUiWFA==&ch=81OMN0YW96Us3xOHA48Y3c1rb-2M-CuTD6h5p3NNdZ5oCN96KxkZTg==)
Please rush in a donation today for Pennsylvania and America.
