name: Cindy Rose
subject: They left me no choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
You and I haven't met. But if you're a patriot who's outraged by the horrors of Critical Race Theory and "transgenderism" being
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z25p5u3f5u5mkkn0t02v4klu8kva7i4e5bl6f8co_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpb9ctjc3gr0t1icaom4sble1gj8oj26urrashjejin6s73mkon7cjmc3ie0pjn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libad30e8o6ctb4mdiefc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ie1pb0s5i69oh5u)
Last minute... |
You and I haven't met.

But if you're a patriot who's outraged by the horrors of Critical Race Theory and "transgenderism" being forced upon our kids in public schools, I hope you'll lend me a few minutes of your time.

My name is Cindy Rose and I'm a 100% unapologetic conservative running for my county school board in Frederick County, Maryland.

I'm a proud mom to five kids and a grandma to five more, with another on the way. Three of my children graduated from Frederick County Public Schools, while my youngest child and two of my grandkids are still there.

I should be giving my family all the time in the world. Instead, I'm busy planting yard signs and knocking on my neighbors' doors to beg for their votes.

Because the truth is, it's now or never.

You and I either take back our schools or we'll surrender our kids to be brainwashed by the radical Left. You and I either preserve freedom for the next generation or we lose America for good.

[**That's why I hope you will please consider making a gift to the 1776 Project PAC today to elect conservatives like me to take back school boards across the country from the radical Left.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7bpgimiqvk610kaov28nan9k22mrol8rqsnida0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3im1ob4cjh2bs)

To the Left, our children are nothing more than future foot soldiers for their Marxist and socialist agenda.

They think they have final say in how our children are raised, and they get to decide what values to teach them.

But it's not a teacher, principal, or administrator's job to decide our children's belief system, sexuality, or gender – AND IT NEVER WILL BE!

I'll be honest with you. The last thing I thought I'd ever have to do in my life was run for office. But I love my family, my community and my country.

I've been an activist in the politics of education for years, so I know full well how the radical Left has been poisoning our schools with their indoctrination programs for decades.

They're teaching kids that white people, and only white people, are racists. That people of color are perpetually oppressed.

In the county next door to mine, they're telling kids the phrase "Make America Great Again" is a step below lynching and hate crimes.

They're teaching kids younger and younger with explicit and obscene sexual content that no child of any age should ever hear.

All while they're grooming kids to become "transgender" and lining library shelves with pornographic books.

And if you call them out for any of this, they'll lie and say it isn't happening, call you a conspiracy nut, or worse, have the Department of Justice label you a "domestic terrorist."

This isn't who we are or what we stand for as Americans.

We aren't hateful. We are tolerant, integrated, and in agreement that malicious racial theories of all kinds should stay out of the classroom.

So why does the Left keep trying to divide us and teach our children to hate each other?

Because they are trying to socially engineer a generation by instilling hate for America, the Constitution, and the values that have made us great in the most impressionable generation.

[**And if you agree with me with must put a stop to this before it's too late, I hope you'll act with a gift of $25 or more to the 1776 Project PAC today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziq3aq18l96vnelservap3aq9o2t2nft52adf0q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3im1ob4cjh2bs)

You are really needed now more than ever.

The 1776 Project PAC is supporting me, along with three other sane conservative candidates in my county, to take back a majority on our school board...

...That's not even to mention the roughly 300 other school board races the 1776 Project PAC is targeting across the country this year.

The bad news is, the Left has been building entrenched majorities on school boards for decades. They have the teachers' unions and billionaires like George Soros propping them up.

**But the good news is, for every school board race they've been involved in, the team at 1776 Project PAC has an astonishing 75% win rate!**

**And it costs them only $3,000 to elect one conservative school board member – a mere fraction compared to any other political campaign!**

So you can see, the gift you make now, no matter how large or small, can make an immediate and lasting impact for freedom and our children's education.

Maybe that's why patriots like Laura Ingraham and Donald Trump Jr. have endorsed the 1776 Project PAC. **Maybe that's why Tucker Carlson has said you should write them a check.**

I'm proud to have 1776's endorsement. But for me to win, for other conservatives running for school board to win, I need you and they need you to make it possible.

[**America is the last, best hope on Earth. Your donation of $25 or more, given right now to the 1776 Project PAC, will put patriots who believe those words back on our school boards.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7t8v6vv6kpau7qpk8m4kdn96riar8qq4jkal1oo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3im1ob4cjh2bs)

Michelle Obama said the quiet part out loud a few years back...

_"That's why we start with the kids...so we can affect who they'll be forever."_

As much as it scares me to say, she's right.

It's going to take dedicated patriots like you and me to make sure sane, America-loving conservatives are the ones affecting our children's future.

Because our children's future is our country's future. And if we still want a country in 50 years, we're going to have to fight harder than ever right now.

Will you let me know if I can count on you?

Sincerely,

**Cindy Rose
Conservative Candidate,
Frederick County Public Schools**

P.S. Thank you so much for taking the time to read my message. I'd like to share one more thing about why I got involved in education in the first place.

Years ago, my medically-fragile child was forced to sit in a sweltering hot bus just because he lacked the "proper paperwork." No child should ever have to endure that.

Every day we send our kids off to school with the trust that they will be taken care of, but this tragically isn't always the case.

But this exposes one critical fact – the Left is simply too busy pushing their ideological agendas and brainwashing our children to truly care about the actual wellbeing of our kids.

That's why they covered up a sexual assault by a "transgender" student in Loudoun County, Virginia, and a rape in Alexandria.

We have to stop the madness and insanity. Right here. Right now.

[**So please, stand with me and the 1776 Project PAC in taking back our school boards with a gift of $25 or more today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0jmi9ug4om2re85u39mjvm25vjt6cg2mojm4ino_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3im1ob4cjh2bs)
[ TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS DONATE NOW ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb9d0g8vv0do60bs2nnlicqflt1pkq6akb57sn3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3im1ob4cjh2bs)

# THE AMERICA FIRST CANDIDATE
-SAVE AMERICA-

###

**IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Mike Blasi For Congress [info@mikeblasiforcongress.com](mailto:info@mikeblasiforcongress.com)

1-(470) 645-3724 **-Veterans For America First endorses Mike Blasi-**
**FREEHOLD, NJ** (April 9, 2022) - Saturday Mike Blasi, Republican candidate for Congress in New Jersey's 4th District, "So honored to be endorsed by such a prestigious and Patriotic organization as VETERANS FOR AMERICA FIRST."

ABOVE IS THE PRESS RELEASE GRAPHIC FROM VETERANS FOR AMERICA FIRST:

God Bless America ###
#### WE'RE CLEANING HOUSE
Any further inquiries can be directed to the **Campaign Management Team** by responding to this email or by calling our campaign offices and asking for our Press Secretary at 1-(470) 645-3724

The Momentum of our campaign is undeniable. We are poised for Victory!

Peter,

[**Can you chip in to help us meet it?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44083249/340030159/-1747990279?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.13_b1_nescm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDczMDA3My0zN2JiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMg81LvUg5RvxSU3ZhN2s887lFQZ_vIGErFWQWAlpFI=) | [**Chip in**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44083250/340030160/-1747990279?refcode=em_fr_2022.04.13_b1_nescm_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDczMDA3My0zN2JiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMg81LvUg5RvxSU3ZhN2s887lFQZ_vIGErFWQWAlpFI=)

_Here are three reasons why reaching this goal is so crucial:_
1. **Voting in Ohio’s primary election is underway,** and this is the first time many voters will be seeing Emilia’s name on the ballot. We want to make sure voters have all the information they need to vote in this election, and this is our chance to show off the excitement around Emilia’s candidacy.

2. **Emilia’s GOP opponent is a Trump-backed extremist,** and as one of the key districts that will decide the fate of the House Majority, we know that we’re in for a tough fight.

3. **Grassroots contributions are the backbone of this campaign,** so we’re relying on everyday folks giving what they can, when they can to ensure we can build out our TV and digital ad fund, expand our field operation, and continue building on our momentum.

Voting in Ohio’s primary election is underway, and this is the first time many voters will be seeing Emilia’s name on the ballot. We want to make sure voters have all the information they need to vote in this election, and this is our chance to show off the excitement around Emilia’s candidacy. 2. # Local leaders discuss rural broadband funding heading to WNC, and I was there to learn how to best help you!
###

To spend funds effectively and efficiently, NC Broadband Division is creating detailed maps, and they need your help to know where the nearly 800 million dollars are!

Take the 5-minute survey to bring these dollars to your area.

The survey can be taken online for users with internet access and by phone for users without service and will be available in both English and Spanish.

Participants can take the survey by phone to report locations without internet service.

Residents without internet service but with phones capable of text messaging can text "internet" to 919-750-0553
Standard text messaging rates will apply.

| Peter, I’d first like to say how appreciative I am of your support throughout the last week. Thanks to supporters like you, our campaign just did something I’m so incredibly proud of: **today we’re on the air with our very first TV ads.**

The best part? We didn’t just launch one. We launched TWO ads highlighting my family history in Maryland and how public schools literally saved my life after my parents passed away when I was a kid. _**[Both ads share my vision to build a more equitable Maryland, and I hope you’ll take a minute to take a look – and if you can, pitch in to help us keep them on the air.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44083931/340031619/-301395487?source=email-ngp-20220413-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&refcode=email-ngp-20220413-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&utm_campaign=20220413&utm_content=b1_fr_full&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&amount=25&refcode2=eefb0c01-39bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWZiMGMwMS0zOWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TJ1iKgFIfoI6hvMn5atyqjs_9VnoVmprNQdPH8yZ3Gg=)**_

The first ad, “Three Generations,” tells the story of how my family went from being enslaved in a cabin in Gaithersburg to serving in the cabinet of the first Black president and why my story of generational progress has shaped my vision to guarantee opportunities for all Marylanders.

In our second ad, “Education is the Difference,” I share how public school saved my life after my parents passed away when I was a kid and how, as a public school parent, I understand the supports Maryland families, students, and educators need to not just to survive, but to thrive after two very difficult years.

**Both ads make clear that, as governor, I will work to ensure every Marylander has access to the same opportunities that public institutions afforded to me. And I will make it my mission to lead state government as a true transformative force for good.**

However, in order to fully fund and share these ads as widely as possible, we need your help to keep them on the air. _**[Will you contribute $500, $50, $5, or whatever amount works for your budget now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44083936/340031624/-301395487?source=email-ngp-20220413-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&refcode=email-ngp-20220413-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&utm_campaign=20220413&utm_content=b1_fr_full&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&amount=25&refcode2=eefb0c01-39bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWZiMGMwMS0zOWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TJ1iKgFIfoI6hvMn5atyqjs_9VnoVmprNQdPH8yZ3Gg=)**_

clean_body: Today we’re going on the air with not one, but TWO new TV ads. | = | Peter, I’d first like to say how appreciative I am of your support throughout the last week. Thanks to supporters like you, our campaign just did something I’m so incredibly proud of: today we’re on the air with our very first TV ads. The best part? We didn’t just launch one. We launched TWO ads highlighting my family history in Maryland and how public schools literally saved my life after my parents passed away when I was a kid. = = | = = | = The first ad, “Three Generations,” tells the story of how my family went from being enslaved in a cabin in Gaithersburg to serving in the cabinet of the first Black president and why my story of generational progress has shaped my vision to guarantee opportunities for all Marylanders. In our second ad, “Education is the Difference,” I share how public school saved my life after my parents passed away when I was a kid and how, as a public school parent, I understand the supports Maryland families, students, and educators need to not just to survive, but to thrive after two very difficult years. Both ads make clear that, as governor, I will work to ensure every Marylander has access to the same opportunities that public institutions afforded to me. And I will make it my mission to lead state government as a true transformative force for good. body:
this is a race to watch
| | |
---
Friend, political experts across the board agree: **Senate control will come down to Florida – and with Val Demings statistically TIED in the polls with Marco Rubio, there is zero room for error.**

**That's why legendary Democratic strategist James Carville is ALL IN on this battleground race: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44084229/340032155/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2898-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2UxODBmYS0zOGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XoNJyyftloROv-O5eaaAzG74DpouIXKE7oYdXXlPz6Q=)
James Carville knows that with Florida's last Senate race having been decided by just 0.12% of the vote, and polls showing Val Demings within the margin of error, this race will come down to resources. **Marco Rubio is _already_ sitting on a multimillion-dollar campaign war chest, so every fundraising goal, deadline and donation to Val Demings right now is truly make or break.**
The stakes simply could not be higher: If Democrats lose just ONE seat, Mitch McConnell will retake Senate control – so Republicans are laser-focused on doing _whatever_ it takes to defeat Val Demings. **They've already dumped tens of millions of dollars into on-the-ground organizing in Florida to flip this state red permanently and regain Senate control. **
Friend, if Val Demings is going to defeat Rubio and defend Democrats' Senate majority, she MUST keep up her momentum,** and with time running out before tonight's midnight deadline, she cannot catch up without your immediate grassroots donation.**
**[Please, rush $5 or more right now to stand with James Carville in this battleground race – whatever you can contribute will help Val Demings flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44084230/340032156/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2898-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2UxODBmYS0zOGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XoNJyyftloROv-O5eaaAzG74DpouIXKE7oYdXXlPz6Q=)**

subject: Bill McSwain releases digital ad and microsite focused on law and order
body:
The new digital ad and microsite promote McSwain's plan to uphold law and order as Governor. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-releases-digital-ad-and-microsite-focused-on-law-and-order?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**April 13, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain Releases Digital Ad and Microsite Focused on Law and Order

**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, today released a new digital ad and microsite focused on addressing law and order.

The ad, titled "Bill McSwain for Law and Order" highlights McSwain's record as U.S. Attorney appointed by President Trump, including putting rioters and looters in jail, prosecuting perpetrators of election fraud, and taking down corrupt public officials. The ad also sends a message to would-be criminals: As Governor, Bill McSwain will stop at nothing uphold law and order.
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=a5ab606805&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| The corresponding microsite, [McSwainStandsforLawandOrder.com](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=72e668e6c0&e=b1ec95759b), promotes McSwain's plan to be the Law and Order Governor, as well as his pledge to support police, stop violent crime, and hold criminals accountable:
---
|
---
| The site also lays out McSwain's Plan to Restore Law and Order to Pennsylvania, including a promise to implement bail reform, aggressively pursue the death penalty for anyone convicted of killing a law enforcement officer, and stop rioting, looting, sanctuary cities, and heroin injection sites.

The full site is [available here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=4cf33a9e6a&e=b1ec95759b).
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as U.S. Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming a prosecutor, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=964db523e7&e=b1ec95759b)
###
---
| |
---

---
| | [](billmcswain.com)
---
|
---
| Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=368406a766) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=368406a766).

name: Senate Control Alert
subject: Did you hear about what just happened in Iowa?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
**If you care about protecting our Democratic Senate majority, please keep reading for this critical update on the race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) in Iowa.**
**Bad news** , Peter: An Iowa judge just sided with Republicans in their attempt to remove Democrat Abby Finkenauer from the ballot. This is their _second_ desperate and partisan attempt to set vulnerable Sen. Grassley up for a cake walk of a reelection.
**But there's also good news:** Grassroots momentum to help Abby fight back is _SURGING –_ and her campaign and the state of Iowa are appealing this ruling before the Iowa Supreme Court _TODAY._ Abby refuses to be intimidated by these GOP attacks, and she's building the coalition that WILL defeat Chuck Grassley in November.
Republicans are attacking Abby because they know that this is Democrats' best chance in decades to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley. He is facing record-high disapproval from Iowans, and if Abby wins, it will virtually _guarantee_ that Democrats will hold on to our Senate majority.
**But right now, we need your help meeting the $50,000 emergency goal we set to fight back. Take a look:**
| | **EMERGENCY GOAL SUPPORTER RECORD **
---
**Email: **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Progress to Goal:** 42%
**Donation Status: _MISSING_**
**Suggested Donation:** $5

| Friend
The leading cause of death for Americans 18-45 is fentanyl.
It's not climate change...it's not COVID...it's fentanyl.
Narcotics are flooding communities across the country and innocent people are dying. Cartels are using our southern border as a trading post for cocaine, methamphetamine, heroin, and fentanyl. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We’re not caving to their demands
body:
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60124292:6jaRSloNN:m:1:3299561967:959B1599CD5C4D743DB2FF4A447C7718:r)
You may have heard about how Disney tried and failed to launch a smear campaign against a piece of legislation that I signed into law that protects 5-, 6-, and 7-year-olds from sexualized lesson plans in school.

Disney is continuing to lie about the bill, and their executives are continuing to smear me for defending the rights of parents and students.

**No one should be surprised. This once family friendly entertainment company that used to make dreams come true for generations of Americans is now little more than a woke corporation fighting to inject radical sexual orientation and gender identity theory into our children 's classrooms. **
_**[FIGHT BACK- ACT NOW >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60124292:6jaRSloNN:m:1:3299561967:959B1599CD5C4D743DB2FF4A447C7718:r "FIGHT BACK – ACT NOW >>>")**_
The company that gave us Mickey Mouse and Donald Duck has not only decided that this inappropriate content should be injected into kindergarten through third-grade classrooms, but they also think it should be streamlined into kids' movies and television shows.

I have news for the California executives at Woke Disney: **Florida parents will not stand idly by -** _**and neither will I.**_

As long as I'm governor, I will always fight for Florida families and our kids. I will never cave to the demands of a corporation that tries to inject sexualized lesson plans into Florida classrooms.

**Woke corporations do not run the state of Florida and they never will.**

**_[Help me continue the fight against the liberal machine's anti-parent agenda. Chip in $50, $25, or $15 now >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60124292:6jaRSloNN:m:1:3299561967:959B1599CD5C4D743DB2FF4A447C7718:r "Help me continue the fight against the liberal machine’s anti-parent agenda. Chip in $50, $25, or $15 now
>>>")_**

Thank you for your support,
Ron DeSantis

[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60124292:6jaRSloNN:m:1:3299561967:959B1599CD5C4D743DB2FF4A447C7718:r)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Mark needs to have a strong showing today. Will you pitch in anything you can?
body:
Derek,
Mark is my best friend, my partner, and my rock. I feel so lucky to have him by my side every day.
He has helped me through my darkest moments and he always fights for what is right.
At war, he flew in combat, and at peace he joined NASA and commanded the space shuttle twice.
Mark never planned to be a Senator, but he knows when it’s time to serve. He’s served his family, our country, and now the great state of Arizona.
But if he’s going to win re-election, he needs your help. And the next 48 hours are critical. Because tomorrow at midnight, we end our April, mid-month fundraising drive.
And we need a strong showing today to catch up to where we need to be. So, please.
If you are able, will you please split a $25 contribution between Mark’s people-powered campaign and CommonGood? He can’t afford to fall short again this month. Not when Mitch McConnell’s allies are spending millions to defeat him. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220413_CGVA_Kelly]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220413_CGVA_Kelly&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220413_CGVA_Kelly&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220413_CGVA_Kelly&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220413_CGVA_Kelly&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220413_CGVA_Kelly&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220413_CGVA_Kelly]
I can’t thank you enough for the amount of support you’ve shown so far — now let’s keep up the momentum!
In courage,
Gabby Giffords
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

clean_body: Derek, Mark is my best friend, my partner, and my rock. I feel so lucky to have him by my side every day. He has helped me through my darkest moments and he always fights for what is right. At war, he flew in combat, and at peace he joined NASA and commanded the space shuttle twice. Mark never planned to be a Senator, but he knows when it’s time to serve. He’s served his family, our country, and now the great state of Arizona. But if he’s going to win re-election, he needs your help. And the next 48 hours are critical. Because tomorrow at midnight, we end our April, mid-month fundraising drive. And we need a strong showing today to catch up to where we need to be. So, please. If you are able, will you please split a $25 contribution between Mark’s people-powered campaign and CommonGood? He can’t afford to fall short again this month. Not when Mitch McConnell’s allies are spending millions to defeat him. [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $35 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Donate ANY [] I can’t thank you enough for the amount of support you’ve shown so far — now let’s keep up the momentum! In courage, Gabby Giffords (This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.) subject: I need your support now more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
New Hampshire is shaping up to be one of the most competitive Senate races of 2022.
| | |
---
I'm worried, team.
**New Hampshire is shaping up to be one of the most competitive Senate races of 2022.**
In 2016, I won by just 1,017 votes, and in 2020, Joe Biden won New Hampshire by a single-digit margin. This battleground state has a long history of swinging between parties, and this year will be no different.
**Before I go any further, can I ask you to make a donation towards my reelection campaign today? My team created personalized donation links for our top supporters, including you, friend. Here's yours:[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maggiehassan/refcode=personal-dpwillis67@gmail.com_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44090221/340047576/-947982778?amounts=3,25,50,100,250&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk884-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmE4NDc1Zi00MWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jeVOfEd6MS3wJ2xyLRYPZJhcJHZFblAZrdfWHnc7M10=)**

name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: Mr. President: What About America?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
As Biden jet sets off to Europe for an
international conference, our own border remains unsecured and
continues to serve as a super highway for criminals and drug and
human traffickers.
This isn't an illegal immigrant crisis; this
is an invasion on a massive scale. 1.9 million invaders crossed
the border last year… that we know about!
Just for context, Russia's invasion force for
Ukraine is 150,000. The southern invasion is 12 TIMES that size.
As intelligence reports say that there's
another 70,000-large migrant caravan heading up through Central
America, I'm sick and tired of politicians who only give lip
service to border security. The time is long past for ACTION!
That's why, as Co-Chair of the House Border
Security Caucus, I've introduced the Stopping Border Surges Act
to address the loopholes in U.S. immigration law that are serving
as magnets for surges of aliens at the border.
My bill fixes problems caused by the Flores
Settlement Agreement that prevents DHS from detaining family
units for more than 20 days, ensures that unaccompanied alien
children are quickly and safely returned home, and promotes
increased integrity in the asylum system.
Can I count on your contribution of $25, $50,
$100, $250, or any amount up to the Federal Maximum Amount of
$2,900 so I can champion border security legislation that will
keep America safe?
President Biden's new budget proves that's
he's abdicating his responsibility to secure our borders by
diverting money from border wall construction. Actions like his
invite the invaders to take the dangerous journey to our southern
border.
They take this risk to take advantage of the
loopholes in our immigration laws. Too often illegal aliens are
victims of human trafficking by the cartels that dominate the
U.S.-Mexico Border.
Border security is critical to America's
security, and it's personal for me.
Since Joe Biden entered the White House, our
nation has endured a massive influx of invaders at a rate that
far surpasses the four prior years and due to the failures of the
Biden Administration to enforce our laws, cartels continue their
drug and human trafficking schemes and inflict more harm and
danger to our country.
This. Must. Stop.
Please donate $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or
whatever you can afford to help me keep up the fight to enforce
and modernize our immigration laws.
America will never truly be free until
America is truly secure and that's why I'm standing up to the
Biden Administration's dangerous policies every day.
The time is long overdue to update our
immigration laws and secure our border and with your support, I
will get the job done. Please join me today!
For our security,

Andy Biggs
Congressman, Arizona's 5th District

Secure Our Borders
NOW!

PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS

Please take a minute to read the special message from our
sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service
free of charge.
The sponsorship above reflects the opinions &
representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion
of USA Freedom Fighters.

© 2022 USA Freedom Fighters

name: Ashley Ward
subject: Last Post Card Writing Party:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
https://ashleywardforcongress.com/ [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/]
LAST CHANCE!
This is the last post card party of the primary! Come on out and join us as we make this final push!
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/PostCardParty_April.jpg]
Hi Peter,
Join us for the final post card writing party! We have quite a few post cards to finish up before Early Voting! We'd love to have your help.
These have been great fun! We provide food, post cards, writing supplies - you provide your time and handwriting.
Request: If you'd like to contribute, please consider bringing post card stamps. These can be purchased at any U.S. Post Office in sheets of 20 or rolls of 100.
This is our final push to get our post cards written to be mailed just before Early Voting begins. I hope you can join us for this final, fun event!
Location:
Duke Memorial United Methodist Church
504 W. Chapel Hill St., Durham, NC
The Commons Room
(Park in the back parking lot and enter through the door at the green awning)
April 14th, 6pm - 9pm
LET US KNOW YOU CAN COME [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Post%20Card%20Party&body=Count%20me%20in%21]

A new text message unveiled by Special Counsel John Durham against Hillary Clinton's lawyer is being called a new smoking gun in the investigation, Peter.

name: Cindy Rose
subject: They left me no choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Last minute... [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9800%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=YXY2Gh4%2fOH4RDMVeaspaCA&sysid=1)
Last minute... |
You and I haven't met.

But if you're a patriot who's outraged by the horrors of Critical Race Theory and "transgenderism" being forced upon our kids in public schools, I hope you'll lend me a few minutes of your time.

My name is Cindy Rose and I'm a 100% unapologetic conservative running for my county school board in Frederick County, Maryland.

I'm a proud mom to five kids and a grandma to five more, with another on the way. Three of my children graduated from Frederick County Public Schools, while my youngest child and two of my grandkids are still there.

I should be giving my family all the time in the world. Instead, I'm busy planting yard signs and knocking on my neighbors' doors to beg for their votes.

Because the truth is, it's now or never.

You and I either take back our schools or we'll surrender our kids to be brainwashed by the radical Left. You and I either preserve freedom for the next generation or we lose America for good.

[**That's why I hope you will please consider making a gift to the 1776 Project PAC today to elect conservatives like me to take back school boards across the country from the radical Left.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28286%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kxMnvRrFyTq42U6LqMwyQg&sysid=1)

To the Left, our children are nothing more than future foot soldiers for their Marxist and socialist agenda.

They think they have final say in how our children are raised, and they get to decide what values to teach them.

But it's not a teacher, principal, or administrator's job to decide our children's belief system, sexuality, or gender - AND IT NEVER WILL BE!

I'll be honest with you. The last thing I thought I'd ever have to do in my life was run for office. But I love my family, my community and my country.

I've been an activist in the politics of education for years, so I know full well how the radical Left has been poisoning our schools with their indoctrination programs for decades.

They're teaching kids that white people, and only white people, are racists. That people of color are perpetually oppressed.

In the county next door to mine, they're telling kids the phrase "Make America Great Again" is a step below lynching and hate crimes.

They're teaching kids younger and younger with explicit and obscene sexual content that no child of any age should ever hear.

All while they're grooming kids to become "transgender" and lining library shelves with pornographic books.

And if you call them out for any of this, they'll lie and say it isn't happening, call you a conspiracy nut, or worse, have the Department of Justice label you a "domestic terrorist."

This isn't who we are or what we stand for as Americans.

We aren't hateful. We are tolerant, integrated, and in agreement that malicious racial theories of all kinds should stay out of the classroom.

So why does the Left keep trying to divide us and teach our children to hate each other?

Because they are trying to socially engineer a generation by instilling hate for America, the Constitution, and the values that have made us great in the most impressionable generation.

[**And if you agree with me with must put a stop to this before it's too late, I hope you'll act with a gift of $25 or more to the 1776 Project PAC today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28287%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JQt5ck8c2tD9eQ%2fjB0zirA&sysid=1)

You are really needed now more than ever.

The 1776 Project PAC is supporting me, along with three other sane conservative candidates in my county, to take back a majority on our school board...

...That's not even to mention the roughly 300 other school board races the 1776 Project PAC is targeting across the country this year.

The bad news is, the Left has been building entrenched majorities on school boards for decades. They have the teachers' unions and billionaires like George Soros propping them up.

**But the good news is, for every school board race they've been involved in, the team at 1776 Project PAC has an astonishing 75% win rate!**

**And it costs them only $3,000 to elect one conservative school board member - a mere fraction compared to any other political campaign!**

So you can see, the gift you make now, no matter how large or small, can make an immediate and lasting impact for freedom and our children's education.

Maybe that's why patriots like Laura Ingraham and Donald Trump Jr. have endorsed the 1776 Project PAC. **Maybe that's why Tucker Carlson has said you should write them a check.**

I'm proud to have 1776's endorsement. But for me to win, for other conservatives running for school board to win, I need you and they need you to make it possible.

[**America is the last, best hope on Earth. Your donation of $25 or more, given right now to the 1776 Project PAC, will put patriots who believe those words back on our school boards.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28288%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8sj2HmMX1S%2f6Ofb6Tp8bqQ&sysid=1)

Michelle Obama said the quiet part out loud a few years back...

_"That's why we start with the kids...so we can affect who they'll be forever."_

As much as it scares me to say, she's right.

It's going to take dedicated patriots like you and me to make sure sane, America-loving conservatives are the ones affecting our children's future.

Because our children's future is our country's future. And if we still want a country in 50 years, we're going to have to fight harder than ever right now.

Will you let me know if I can count on you?

Sincerely,

**Cindy Rose
Conservative Candidate,
Frederick County Public Schools**

P.S. Thank you so much for taking the time to read my message. I'd like to share one more thing about why I got involved in education in the first place.

Years ago, my medically-fragile child was forced to sit in a sweltering hot bus just because he lacked the "proper paperwork." No child should ever have to endure that.

Every day we send our kids off to school with the trust that they will be taken care of, but this tragically isn't always the case.

But this exposes one critical fact - the Left is simply too busy pushing their ideological agendas and brainwashing our children to truly care about the actual wellbeing of our kids.

That's why they covered up a sexual assault by a "transgender" student in Loudoun County, Virginia, and a rape in Alexandria.

We have to stop the madness and insanity. Right here. Right now.

[**So please, stand with me and the 1776 Project PAC in taking back our school boards with a gift of $25 or more today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28289%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DVsG3FRkHJ5KFXEwf9jQQA&sysid=1)
[ TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS DONATE NOW ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28280%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2EPXZTLRsHtgW45XeCt4hg&sysid=1)

---

[**Will you consider joining them and making a donation to support us today?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28282%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RPhP0pWKSfU5cniRehKVwA&sysid=1)

| | [Did you know that some of the top Republican fundraisers are those who objected to the election results? You don’t have to take my word for it – here’s what Open Secrets had to say:

“Many of the House members who objected to the election results are some of the top fundraisers in the Republican House conference... House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-Calif.) raised nearly $9.1 million in the first nine months of 2021 – he’s the highest fundraiser in the House Republican conference, and third highest fundraiser in the House overall.” _\- Open Secrets_

This is our greatest competition – these people who won’t just be in Congress if they keep raising boatloads of money; they’ll be in the Majority, making laws and repealing progress.

It’s a horrifying thought that should motivate you to do anything and everything in your power to stop the Republicans and save the Democratic Majority. I know after seeing this news, I resolved to work even harder to make sure we preserve our House Majority. name: Greg Casar
subject: Abbott’s latest cruel attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,
Today, Greg Abbott chartered a bus of immigrants and sent them to Fox News’ DC headquarters. This isn’t public policy— it’s just cruel, made-for-TV, anti-immigrant theatrics.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=04.13_email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=04.13_email]
Now more than ever we need Texas voices who unapologetically embrace immigrant rights as human rights. That’s why I’m committed to being one of the most pro-immigrant members of Congress – because our country needs solutions and empathy, not bigots and fear mongering. Can you chip in $35 today to help us fight back? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=04.13_email]
HELP US BUILD A BETTER TEXAS >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=04.13_email]
We’re going to use every dollar we raise today to talk to our community about how immigrants make our communities stronger. Thousands of families in Texas’s 35th district, and millions of people in Texas, would benefit from having their rights fully recognized and protected by the federal government through a pathway to citizenship.
We can fight back against Abbott’s latest political stunt. We must make sure the voices of reasonable, caring, and welcoming Texans are heard.
- Greg

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: It's OFFICIAL! Game-Changer
body:
It's OFFICIAL! Today, I officially filed for the US Senate race in the Oklahoma Republican Primary against James Lankford. It was 13 months ago that
| | |
---
## It's OFFICIAL!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5221.1.b0551d300443e20c5c4097f3555eafaf) Jackson Lahmeyer filing for US Senate
---
Today, I officially filed for the US Senate race in the Oklahoma Republican Primary against [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5222.1.b2af398b8fee70da7262ca8b83b0f0c8). It was 13 months ago that **General Michael Flynn** called me and nudged me to run and since then amazing things have taken place. We have had **over 8000 individuals donate** to the campaign, **rallies with thousands** of Oklahomans in attendance and **national endorsements** from _Roger Stone_ , _Mike Lindell_ , _Sebastian Gorka_ , _OKGOP Chairman John Bennett_ and others. A recent poll was released that surveyed 867 _likely_ Oklahoma Republican primary voters: [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5223.1.5bb8a6be480779fbdd2c22ce8833ca16) received 46.83%, [Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5224.1.814ce458b87d9159edf6dbf28a4637ac) 35.87% and 17.3% were undecided. We have gained so much ground in such a short amount of time. We have shocked the political world with what we have accomplished over the last year and we will close the 10 point gap in this final stretch as more and more people learn the **REAL** truth about [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5225.1.9f13a4f44599d511039796e4dadc943b) and the incredible things I pledge to do in DC. Every week we gain ground and I promise you that [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5226.1.864739d8f122c9e5597166dc6370bb84) will not outwork me over these next few months. But... I need your help in this final stretch leading up to Election Day on June 28th. **\- Please pray for me and my family.** **\- Please make a post on social media showing your support.** **\- Please make a $20[donation](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5227.1.72921b589c68edb8467e7294c8606c32) today to the campaign so we can take our efforts to the next level.** You can contribute at [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/donate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5228.1.3fcf56c683b162d2120574b482549387) **Let's go WIN!** Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on TruthSocial, GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5229.1.07c9c73e6c1b467fa805e2783da91aaf), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5230.1.4ea7b1f348df83ad365702dc9523dc4e), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5231.1.6671b373c21418b8471126008d09976b), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5232.1.1b8eec020f66d1c718d4d9aab92d7e3e), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6927279.5233.1.3352d4fdb931bfb3bf56c20dd5793894)).
---

| | Peter, I’m used to being the only woman in a room full of men. As an entrepreneur, I was often the only woman in the boardroom. In a crowded Democratic gubernatorial primary field of ten candidates, I’m the only woman running. |

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44072710/339988109/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzVhOGE5Yy0yOWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=91irPTc0Wr5WvuBCQa1qQkHka17qPknNfTMU7a_q9aw=)

| | I’ve had a lot of titles in my day, folks – Naval Commander, Entrepreneur, Veteran, Congresswoman – but my favorite has got to be ‘Mom.’ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44072711/339988112/1980268870?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220413_FR_BioMom_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzVhOGE5Yy0yOWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=91irPTc0Wr5WvuBCQa1qQkHka17qPknNfTMU7a_q9aw=) _(Does 20 years in the Navy give me an unfair advantage in the game Battleship?)_ To me, there is nothing more rewarding or inspiring than watching my daughter grow into a confident, smart, young woman. Everything I do, I do for my daughter – being a mom is what compelled me to run for Congress in 2018. And in Congress I’m fighting for a bright future for all of our kids, but I’m one of the most vulnerable House Democrats running for re-election. **[Can I count on you to rush a $25 donation today? Every dollar is crucial in a race as close as mine.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44072712/339988113/1980268870?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220413_FR_BioMom_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzVhOGE5Yy0yOWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=91irPTc0Wr5WvuBCQa1qQkHka17qPknNfTMU7a_q9aw=)** | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44072715/339988115/1980268870?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220413_FR_BioMom_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzVhOGE5Yy0yOWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=91irPTc0Wr5WvuBCQa1qQkHka17qPknNfTMU7a_q9aw=)
---
When I retired from the Navy, I thought my time serving the federal government was over.
But after two decades of protecting my country in uniform, I couldn’t sit idly by and watch Trump and his Republican allies in Congress move our country backwards and stoke division.
I wanted to be able to look my daughter in the eye and say that I stepped forward when my country needed me most.
And thanks to this team’s help in 2018, we were able to flip this seat blue and regain control of the House majority – putting an end to Trump’s supermajority in Congress.
Now, I want my daughter to know that I didn’t back down from serving my country in the face of Republican smear tactics or millions in GOP outside spending.
That’s why I’m emailing you today. I’m ready to go up against whatever national Republicans throw my way, but I can’t do it without your help.
Republicans spent $3 million trying to unseat me last cycle – and now that my district is a pure toss-up, I’m expecting them to spend even more.
I don’t want to let my daughter down – **[so will you chip in $25 or more to my re-election campaign to help me defend my seat? We have so much more work to do.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44072716/339988120/1980268870?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220413_FR_BioMom_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzVhOGE5Yy0yOWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=91irPTc0Wr5WvuBCQa1qQkHka17qPknNfTMU7a_q9aw=)**

clean_body: | = | | I’ve had a lot of titles in my day, folks – Naval Commander, Entrepreneur, Veteran, Congresswoman – but my favorite has got to be ‘Mom.’ = (Does 20 years in the Navy give me an unfair advantage in the game Battleship?) To me, there is nothing more rewarding or inspiring than watching my daughter grow into a confident, smart, young woman. Everything I do, I do for my daughter – being a mom is what compelled me to run for Congress in 2018. And in Congress I’m fighting for a bright future for all of our kids, but I’m one of the most vulnerable House Democrats running for re-election. = | | | = When I retired from the Navy, I thought my time serving the federal government was over. But after two decades of protecting my country in uniform, I couldn’t sit idly by and watch Trump and his Republican allies in Congress move our country backwards and stoke division. I wanted to be able to look my daughter in the eye and say that I stepped forward when my country needed me most. And thanks to this team’s help in 2018, we were able to flip this seat blue and regain control of the House majority – putting an end to Trump’s supermajority in Congress. Now, I want my daughter to know that I didn’t back down from serving my country in the face of Republican smear tactics or millions in GOP outside spending. That’s why I’m emailing you today. I’m ready to go up against whatever national Republicans throw my way, but I can’t do it without your help. Republicans spent $3 million trying to unseat me last cycle – and now that my district is a pure toss-up, I’m expecting them to spend even more. I don’t want to let my daughter down – = | | = | | = Thank you, Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: I want to share this deeply personal story with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
My insurance didn’t want to pay for the blood thinners I needed to stay alive | | | Team, Black women are 3-5 times more likely to have a maternal death than white women in the United States. I was nearly one of them. **This week is Black Maternal Health Week and I want to share my story with you.** When I was pregnant with my daughter Maddie, eight years ago, I experienced consistent shortness of breath. I was repeatedly dismissed and turned away. Eventually, I refused to leave until they figured out what was wrong. At that point, I was diagnosed with deep-vein thrombosis. **But my insurance didn’t want to pay for the blood thinners I needed to stay alive.** On the brink of having a pulmonary embolism, I had to stay in hospital for two weeks. Thankfully, I survived. But it was a close call — and one I’ll never forget. I wouldn’t give up the time I have with my two kids for the world, but I was nearly forced to. Getting life-saving medication covered was a huge struggle, and that was WITH health insurance. As a Black mother, I’ve seen first hand how little value big corporations place on my life. **I’m running for Congress so others don’t have to go through that. Nobody should have a value put on their life like that. Health care is a right, period.** This week, I’m thinking of all those Black mothers who weren’t so lucky. Those who don’t get to cuddle up with their now-seven year old daughter and watch action movies on a [Friday night.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w9E982IBg-U2hMoT3dmJWgY9GjPDi6iXnyJO7OG8B8vpcXx0D40dY9OuIVT-B4xZRvlySefFPlmGd_52rTPe5ZzDZ9xHxWfRJxS8OdOqiMfnkqmZ4je_Ne-H13EdbXe59aowLqJrt3GzuVpSEvevZL7x8Yx2XnxjJjcGqAZX8KbX7qKsygRKuJfakKtXqyrtePgkWzRLNjyp63tE2QZ52XztbuSBxHQBMC50-aS1WnB6XZkgY-MzGZ2ho0oBkhXvmmOjJQPKByJ402SGLj9WtDnoRZG3N3gsIkas5EimtX-skBXfy05xWjiP9R4eZapJg2h0Edm8uR63pphh7XbzxYXA0SemnrMCGV2mhCgeCZLQvY9h47xzLPnMc2c_YaNC0/3l6/N4k51KCUQQ-UyHBFGkpUCA/h0/3N2LAwZgZGKloG7OgKDTBvlwFfSbaOjsN7JAE4vhiPE) My heart breaks for our broken health care system and all those lost within it. I pray for change. It can’t wait any longer. Mckayla | [ DONATE

Hey Peter Willis - As Lou Barletta’s campaign manager, it is part of my duties to ensure we have the necessary resources to win while Lou is out on the trail working nonstop to secure this nomination.

clean_body: | | | | Team Barletta does not lose. | Hey Peter Willis - As Lou Barletta’s campaign manager, it is part of my duties to ensure we have the necessary resources to win while Lou is out on the trail working nonstop to secure this nomination. I just found out from our finance team that we are pacing behind our April Mid-Month goal, and frankly, I’m starting to get a little concerned. We still need to raise $1,492, before 11:59 PM on the 15th, or else we could lose all this momentum we built together. Remember our deadline is this Friday. Look, I know times are tough with Bidenflation driving up the cost of everything from gas to groceries, but we cannot afford to get complacent. There is too much on the line, and we need your help. If every supporter chipped in at least $5 within the next hour, we would beat our goal. , Jeremy Campaign Manager Lou Barletta for Governor, Inc. | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 =

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: It only took TWO YEARS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am furious.
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125343:6yeGUloWN:m:1:3317145305:1BE0CDBD23CE049771A778F68A85656A:r)
I am furious.
After TWO ENTIRE YEARS, radical Democrats in blue states are "suddenly" coming around to ending lockdowns, mandates, and masking kids in schools. They claimed the science changed...
**But let me say this loud and clear: the science didn 't change -- THE POLITICS DID!**
Democrats are panicking as Joe Biden's approval ratings hit all-time lows. The polls are against them. And free states like Florida are thriving while lockdown states are still masking their kindergarteners.
_But I know you -- the American People -- see right through their lies. _
**If Democrats win in November, they will re-establish lockdowns, mandates and masks. **
I won't let them get away with it. They must be punished at the ballot box in November.
[**That 's why I'm rushing to you now. I need at least 2,500 Patriots to help hold these Democrats accountable for playing political games with our freedoms, our businesses, AND our children.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125343:6yeGUloWN:m:1:3317145305:1BE0CDBD23CE049771A778F68A85656A:r)
**[STAND WITH RON DESANTIS >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125343:6yeGUloWN:m:1:3317145305:1BE0CDBD23CE049771A778F68A85656A:r)**
This is the most important thing any of us will ever do.
If these radical Democrats get away scot-free, they'll know they can walk all over the American People without suffering any political consequences.
**But today, you have the power to be their judge and jury.**
[**Will you join my mission to hold these radical Democrats to account, or will you give them a free pass?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125343:6yeGUloWN:m:1:3317145305:1BE0CDBD23CE049771A778F68A85656A:r)
I hope you're with me on this.
For America,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125343:6yeGUloWN:m:1:3317145305:1BE0CDBD23CE049771A778F68A85656A:r)
**Ron DeSantis**
_Governor of the Free State of Florida_

clean_body: I am furious. I am furious. After TWO ENTIRE YEARS, radical Democrats in blue states are "suddenly" coming around to ending lockdowns, mandates, and masking kids in schools. They claimed the science changed... But let me say this loud and clear: the science didn 't change -- THE POLITICS DID! Democrats are panicking as Joe Biden's approval ratings hit all-time lows. The polls are against them. And free states like Florida are thriving while lockdown states are still masking their kindergarteners. But I know you -- the American People -- see right through their lies. If Democrats win in November, they will re-establish lockdowns, mandates and masks. I won't let them get away with it. They must be punished at the ballot box in November. This is the most important thing any of us will ever do. If these radical Democrats get away scot-free, they'll know they can walk all over the American People without suffering any political consequences. But today, you have the power to be their judge and jury. I hope you're with me on this. name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: BIG PETITION ANNOUNCEMENT!!
body:
| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petitionthanks&n=1)
---
Friend -- Good morning Team Ralph Rebandt for Governor- Ralph was quoted in a **Detroit Free Press article yesterday outlining that we have submitted over 16,000 signatures to be on the ballot!!** We want to say Thank You to each and every one of you who have obtained each and every signature. We really **need your help for 3,000 more signatures** to cover the Rejection Rate-not every submitted signature is accepted. We are very thankful for every good and perfect gift that comes from above, because, without the Lord, there would be no light, no good gifts, no opportunity to make anything better. But, because of Him, we all have an opportunity to shine the Light that He has put in us, and Together, We Will Make Michigan a Lighthouse to the Nation! We are grateful, and always looking to make the most of every opportunity. For this reason we have this final 6 days of ASK from you- **1) DEADLINE WITH FILING IN MICHIGAN IS APRIL 19th-** Help us obtain **3,000 more to cover the rejection rate** between now and **Monday, April 18th** so they can be turned in on the very last day. **LET US KNOW IF YOU NEED MORE SHEETS.** **2)** Please mail or drop off to either of the below addresses anytime, by Monday the 18th. **You can also come by to sign a petition or have your friends come sign. Please text 248-761-8342 with any questions.** **DROP OFF OR SIGN LOCATIONS** \- 35886 Castlemeadow Dr., Farmington Hills, MI 48335 \- 20806 Deerfield, Farmington Hills, MI 48335 **\- Wednesday 10:00-5:00 pm, Monday 11:00-3:30 pm:** 1902 Star-Batt Drive, Rochester Hills MI 48302 ***ask for Lana or Jenni Have a wonderful day! \- _**Adam Rebandt**_ , Son of the next Governor, Ralph Rebandt Ralph Rebandt For Governor
[http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petitionthanks&n=2)
Ralph Rebandt For Governor · MI 48094, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petitionthanks&n=3).
You can also keep up with Ralph Rebandt For Governor on [Twitter](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNOLWyCuYNiwV9ZFyY__b-ZA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petitionthanks&n=4) or [Facebook](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6uhbeqVmbeXGs-kYC9NuYd-tJTgdOC5xFCeUG_TRnUZF&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petitionthanks&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petitionthanks&n=6), software for leaders.

name: Glenn Beck
subject: An emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60122121:6g2HOloQN:m:1:3253819041:786B0AD4DDBF5188CFDBE02E6AA7AF77:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60122121:6g2HOloQN:m:1:3253819041:786B0AD4DDBF5188CFDBE02E6AA7AF77:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60122121:6g2HOloQN:m:1:3253819041:786B0AD4DDBF5188CFDBE02E6AA7AF77:r)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60122121:6g2HOloQN:m:1:3253819041:786B0AD4DDBF5188CFDBE02E6AA7AF77:r)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60122121:6g2HOloQN:m:1:3253819041:786B0AD4DDBF5188CFDBE02E6AA7AF77:r)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: top to bottom
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
Governor Youngkin sent exciting news from Richmond this morning. This November, we could have the opportunity to defeat not just Jennifer Wexton, but | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/53a15faf2923/top-to-bottom-5395318?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=c1e26c5185&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

We have some exciting news out of Richmond.

[Governor Youngkin is pushing to require the Loudoun County School Board elections to be held THIS YEAR, instead of in 2023.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=ded1207cba&e=fc83fb200d)

This is amazing news. Not only will we have the opportunity to replace the woke and corrupt school board, it also means that I could be running on the same ticket as our Republican School Board candidates.

In one swoop, we can get rid of Jennifer Wexton _and_ replace the school board that has ignored parental rights, silenced our voices, and pushed woke ideology on our children.

This November, everything could be on the line. I'm going to need your help to bolster our ticket of Republican candidates across the 10th district and defeat the radical Democrats top to bottom on the ballot.

[Will you make a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to fund our Republican cause and flip the 10th district top to bottom?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=b7bbd320bd&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=cc5e8186dc&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=cb86ef6a7d&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=5c9f20e047&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=dc5041c181&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=2a6c9684d5&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
I'm counting on you to bring the change that we need to our community. Democrats from the local to federal level are destroying the country that we love, and this November is our opportunity to put an end to it.

I'm excited about this opportunity, and I hope that you'll join me in this movement.

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District

Our team is fighting back ...
| | |
---
Hey there, Peter, it's Amanda – Abby's campaign manager. Abby and I are about to head into our appeal before the Iowa Supreme Court to fight these Republican attempts to kick Abby off the ballot.
Last week, after the bipartisan panel rejected a Republican challenge trying to kick Abby off the ballot, the GOP filed a lawsuit against our campaign in _another_ desperate attempt to take her out of the race.** ****Even though this lawsuit is total B.S., a state judge sided with the Republicans – meaning we've been forced to continue defending our campaign and spend critical resources on costly legal fees, including at the Iowa Supreme Court today.**
Our team is fighting back, and we're going to keep on fighting as hard as we can until we defeat Grassley on Election Day – but we can't keep up this fight without you by our side. **[Please, will you rush $5 right now to help us fight these attacks, and so that we have the resources to send Abby to the Senate? During a moment like this, every single dollar makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44094569/340068095/888067044?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk932-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTVlZTUwYy01MGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__lW1bO2Ws-lgW6OoTZ_0XSHbNlBVyOcWvy1vpyWxAM=)**

This is about so much more than keeping Abby's name on the ballot. **This is about the Republican Party and their corporate megadonors undermining democracy in Iowa.** Abby is a serious candidate with a powerful grassroots backing right here on the ground. She's met with hundreds of voters all across this state, supporters from all 99 counties have chipped in to fight for our democracy.
**Folks here in Iowa have made it clear: after seven terms with Grassley – who is facing RECORD-LOW approval with Iowans – we want the opportunity to choose new leadership.** Grassley and the GOP are trying to take that choice away from us, and it's painfully obvious why.
They know that grassroots movements like ours have the power to take out even the most entrenched incumbents. They've seen the polling data that showed nearly two-thirds of likely Iowa voters DO NOT want to reelect Grassley. **Instead of challenging Abby head-on and making their case to voters, however, they've launched a desperate legal scheme to avoid facing her at the ballot box.**
We refuse to let them get away with undermining the democratic process. **[So please, I need you to rush an emergency donation of $5 – or more if you can spare it – to fight this bogus lawsuit, defeat Grassley and protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44094574/340068100/888067044?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk932-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTVlZTUwYy01MGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__lW1bO2Ws-lgW6OoTZ_0XSHbNlBVyOcWvy1vpyWxAM=)**
Thanks for having Abby's back – especially during moments like this.

Amanda Sands
Campaign Manager, Abby for Iowa

---

**[_President Obama and I worked too hard to let Republicans tear away all the progress we’ve made. >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44094758/340068728/1694517773?refcode=20220413_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWM2MmM5Yi01MGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFLi3W_fIjb03m6Qh8p68DcYTILTJpmkdPPr7u52quw=)**

But if we lose our Democratic Majorities, it’s all at risk.

\-- The Affordable Care Act...

\-- The Medicare and Medicaid expansion...

\-- The protections for people with pre-existing conditions...

_[**All of it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44094759/340068729/1694517773?refcode=20220413_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWM2MmM5Yi01MGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFLi3W_fIjb03m6Qh8p68DcYTILTJpmkdPPr7u52quw=)_

**[_So here’s my plan. To honor President Obama’s legacy, I’m going to work day and night to PRESERVE our Democratic Majority so we can PROTECT the healthcare of millions of families. But I can’t do it without you. So will you step up to President Obama’s challenge and make an immediate impact with a $15 contribution?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44094760/340068730/1694517773?refcode=20220413_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWM2MmM5Yi01MGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFLi3W_fIjb03m6Qh8p68DcYTILTJpmkdPPr7u52quw=)**

Thank you for fighting with me and President Obama,
Nancy

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Biden's Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Dear Peter:

Joe Biden MUST be impeached!

Never before has that been more clear.

**The disaster at our southern border is now, well..._treasonous._**

As if it wasn't bad enough, Joe Biden just ended Title 42, a policy put in place by President Trump.

President Trump enacted Title 42 to help protect all Americans from millions of illegals streaming across our border without any safeguards against disease.

_To end this policy is an outright attack on American lives_.

And one thing is clear - Joe Biden has no plans to deal with the millions of illegal immigrants who will now flood across our borders.

It's not just me saying it.

**Leading experts in BOTH parties have said the Biden administration is in no way prepared to deal with the massive increase in the number of illegal aliens at the border.** [_**Impeach Joe Biden
Click Here to Sign Your Petition**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59962223:WTqav4HGN:m:1:2365227053:6E70476BEED2A1920DAC81ACA5862458:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59962223:WTqav4HGN:m:1:2365227053:6E70476BEED2A1920DAC81ACA5862458:r) **[And when you do, I hope you will join me today to help IMPEACH JOE BIDEN and stop his illegal, unconstitutional attacks on America by chipping in $17.76 and helping me IMPEACH Joe Biden](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59962223:WTqav4HGN:m:1:2365227053:6E70476BEED2A1920DAC81ACA5862458:r).**

The stakes are simply too high to let Joe Biden and his radical open border policies continue unchecked.

As it is, hundreds of thousands of illegals stream across the border, bringing crime, disease, drugs, and even terrorism.

**And under the Biden administration, they aren 't even subject to the same laws you and I must follow!**

That's why it's time to IMPEACH Joe Biden, FIRE the democrats, and bring back the Constitution to our government.

And it's time we made these criminals pay for their illegal, unconstitutional actions that threaten our very nation.

Joe Biden's actions in opening our borders to our very enemies are a direct violation of his oath of office and a clear impeachable offense.

**That 's why I am leading the charge to have Articles of Impeachment drawn up to remove Joe Biden from office.**

Before it's too late.

Please join me today **[by chipping in $17.76 and helping me IMPEACH Joe Biden](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59962223:WTqav4HGN:m:1:2365227053:6E70476BEED2A1920DAC81ACA5862458:r).**

Because I simply can't do this alone.

The Democrats and their allies in the corporate liberal media and Big Tech aren't just going to sit there and take it.

**But I won 't be stopped.** [_**Impeach Joe Biden
Click Here to Sign Your Petition**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59962223:WTqav4HGN:m:1:2365227053:6E70476BEED2A1920DAC81ACA5862458:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59962223:WTqav4HGN:m:1:2365227053:6E70476BEED2A1920DAC81ACA5862458:r) **Holding Joe Biden accountable for allowing an invasion of millions of illegal aliens makes me a marked man in D.C.**

But putting the country I love first is more important than threats and intimidation from the inside-the-beltway swamp dwellers.

But to do it, I need your help.

I'm not going to let Joe Biden get away with his unconstitutional actions that have put our nation at risk.

**I am going to do everything in my power to IMPEACH Joe Biden, remove him from office, and arrest and file criminal charges for all involved with the acts of Treason committed against our nation.**

**[Will you please chip in a contribution of $17.76, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even the legal maximum of $2,900 per individual TODAY to help me IMPEACH Joe Biden](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59962223:WTqav4HGN:m:1:2365227053:6E70476BEED2A1920DAC81ACA5862458:r)?**

I must have your support right away to keep speaking the truth and speaking up for our America First values.

Please stand with me in this all-important fight today! **[Chip in your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59962223:WTqav4HGN:m:1:2365227053:6E70476BEED2A1920DAC81ACA5862458:r)!**

**WE MUST IMPEACH Joe Biden and defend our borders** [_**HELP MATT GAETZ IMPEACH BIDEN
ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59962223:WTqav4HGN:m:1:2365227053:6E70476BEED2A1920DAC81ACA5862458:r) Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59962223:WTqav4HGN:m:1:2365227053:6E70476BEED2A1920DAC81ACA5862458:r)
