name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Michigan is a political grab bag
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220413&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220413&amount=28]
Team,
In Michigan, there is no way to live without getting along with people who have different political views than you.
Growing up in Michigan – that’s just how things worked. My dad was a Republican, my mom was a Democrat. Most of us across the state didn’t talk about politics at the dinner table. If anything, our most fervent fights were about MSU vs. Michigan football.
Serving in the national security field was no different. During my time in national security, I served Presidents of both parties. In fact, I was there in the White House the day George W. Bush left office, and the day Barack Obama began his term. I worked side by side with people for 15 years and had no idea what their political persuasion was. It would have been strange to even ask.
Every day, I try to bring that same philosophy to Congress. I work across the aisle with people I may not see eye-to-eye on everything with, but those who I can find enough common ground with to forge a compromise. It’s why I’ve found some of my closest legislative partners in the Problem Solvers Caucus, the only truly bipartisan caucus in Congress made up of equal parts Democrats and Republicans dedicated to the way Washington is supposed to function.
Ultimately, it’s how I’m able to succeed in such a tight district. I’m the Democratic only member of the House that won in a district that voted for Romney in 2012, Trump in 2016, and Trump again in 2020. And that makes me an independently minded member representing an independently minded district.
Now, I’m heading into my toughest election yet, and I’m going to need resources to compete. Contributions you make now will help me plan a strategic campaign [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220413&amount=28] , and ultimately help me do what I do best: working with anyone serious and ready to work to improve the lives of Michigan families.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220413&amount=28]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

clean_body: We wanted to give you a weekend recap on what Jessica and the team were up to this past weekend! | | | Peter, With a movement growing as fast as ours, it can be hard to keep up with all of our plans and what we’re doing. So we want to give you a quick weekend recap on what Jessica and the team have been up to lately! But before we do, we’ve received a few questions on how people like you can get involved in growing our momentum. This past weekend, Team Cisneros went out to San Antonio for the annual Fiesta! We met so many community members and young people who were fired up to support Jessica and our progressive movement. Here are a couple of action shots we wanted to share with you! Team Cisneros pumped up to talk to voters at the Fiesta! Jessica spent Friday morning at the Battle of the Flowers parade! 🌸🌼 This is what organizing on the ground looks like – young people ready to talk to other young voters about the importance of our upcoming runoff. We love our amazing volunteers! Things are rapidly ramping up for us and we’re excited to be on this journey with you! As we get closer to the runoff, we are plugging in more folks across the district to join our campaign and fight for much-needed change. Gracias, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

Hello,
Facebook just took down Chuck Grassley’s ads against us – but not before they were seen by tens of thousands of people and targeted over one million:
This is what we’re up against. Chuck Grassley is running ads so misleading that they’re being taken down – but they were still running for over a week. Come on, Facebook!
I’m going to be facing millions of dollars ads full of lies and twisted disinformation. In my last campaign, a Super PAC ran over $1 million in ads attacking my military record. I’m a hard target to attack, but with Senate control at stake, they’ll make up and say anything.
**In order to fight back, we need to raise another $250,000 before our mid-month deadline, but right now we’re still $60,791 short with time running out. I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if I’m going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue:**

I’m a hard target to attack, but with Senate control at stake, they’ll make up and say anything. In order to fight back, we need to raise another $250,000 before our mid-month deadline, but right now we’re still $60,791 short with time running out. body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoqg3l3tun46goj2pk7g9oi4hkcn8dtrqafa0ulo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm4o74cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfepr2mcr6bc5nchjm6oj2map36cblchom9cdn6oqbcp1gm4pneolks5o62p3icurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omctj2mmomfdr1coo71cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8dfbsrre46u63nqtmb57uel54o786705pcrg2cg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm4o74cph2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1muv41aar7bs7ij7dpjurqcreufa030u7upuqa8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm4o74cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6rcrjbggm3aeoqe4hlnjd297pcqata59brqa4a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm4o74cph2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: I am honored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
I’m extremely honored to share that the Congressional Black Caucus has endorsed our campaign for Congress!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44095636/340072799/2085084876?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220413-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IwOGRlNy01M2JiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ur2KfFmyzLUxIvJZyjbfwPT6ajkgwqxDhOBq99Tv2Wo=)
---
| Peter, I’m extremely honored to share that the Congressional Black Caucus has endorsed our campaign for Congress!
---
| | “We are proud to endorse Valerie because **she is a proven leader who has always put the needs of her constituents above political in-fighting** and is ready to get to work in the halls of Congress to **ensure a livable wage, affordable childcare, and economic forward agenda**. We can not wait to welcome her in November, and I know the people of North Carolina’s 4th will have a true advocate in her.”
\- **Congressman Gregory Meeks, CBCPAC Chair**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44095639/340072802/2085084876?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220413-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IwOGRlNy01M2JiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ur2KfFmyzLUxIvJZyjbfwPT6ajkgwqxDhOBq99Tv2Wo=)
---
Peter, this endorsement means so much to me. I got my start in public service when I saw that my sons and other Black boys and girls needed another champion on the school board.

I admire the Congressional Black Caucus’ long history of fighting to ensure African Americans and other marginalized communities have the opportunity to achieve the American Dream. I am prepared to join that fight in Congress and be the champion our community deserves. [_**So, please, join the CBC and all of us on #TeamFoushee in the fight to uplift our community by pitching into my campaign today!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44095645/340072809/2085084876?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220413-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2IwOGRlNy01M2JiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ur2KfFmyzLUxIvJZyjbfwPT6ajkgwqxDhOBq99Tv2Wo=)

subject: "Sens. Chuck Morse & Jeb Bradley - Fighting inflation with state surplus revenues"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Jeb Bradley Chairman

| |

| |

| **Sens. Chuck Morse & Jeb Bradley: Fighting inflation with state surplus revenues**
---
| | | THANKFULLY, New Hampshire’s economy is growing. But inflation is at a 40-year high, and soaring gas and energy prices are taking a big bite out of the wallets of New Hampshire families. Over the past decade, Republicans in the state Senate have safeguarded the New Hampshire economy by limiting spending growth and cutting taxes, resulting in booming revenues that we can now use to help Granite Staters fight inflation. As the Union Leader recently wrote, our plan “is more akin to the fiscal responsibility that Granite Staters expect.” Thanks to fiscal discipline and our sound conservative budgets, New Hampshire businesses have come roaring out of the pandemic. In March alone, state tax revenues were more than $50 million ahead of our budget estimates. For Fiscal Year 2022, which ends in June, we estimate that revenues will exceed projections by at least $250 million. We project additional surplus revenues next year. The Senate has found a way to get this surplus back to New Hampshire taxpayers. It’s your money. Rather than permanently ramp up state spending, we can distribute the surplus as one-time funds sent back for local schools and construction projects. Cities and towns can use this additional state aid to replace local spending and lower their local property tax rates. This is the prudent, conservative approach that Senate Republicans have taken to managing our state’s budget. And it has delivered tremendous results. New Hampshire has long been ranked one of the safest in the nation. In fact, recent FBI data rank us the safest. U.S. News says New Hampshire is the top state for livability, and we have among the highest levels of per capita income. We have the lowest poverty rate in the nation, and one of the lowest unemployment rates. The Cato Institute recently crowned New Hampshire as the freest state in America. We have focused spending on our most vulnerable populations, emphasizing education, public safety, mental health, and substance abuse prevention. At the same time, we have lowered tax rates to help encourage job creation, helping New Hampshire grow. That has resulted in booming state revenues. Let’s make sure New Hampshire families can share directly in those benefits. The Senate Republican property tax relief plan includes $24.3 million over the next two years in Extraordinary Need Grants for New Hampshire schools. These grants will be targeted to districts with the greatest economic need, supplementing the Adequate Education Aid tied to every student in the state. The House and Senate have already approved $12.65 million in state funding for local waste water projects, relieving some of the burden on local taxpayers. The Senate has also approved $5 million to increase nursing homes rates, helping to lower county property taxes. Our latest package of property tax relief includes $36 million for the State Aid Bridge program, $30 million for municipal road projects, and an additional $1 million for local police departments to purchase body-worn and dashboard camera systems. In total, we’re proposing $109 million in new state aid to lower local property taxes. That’s in addition to the increases in state education funding in last year’s budget, the $31 million annual increase in Rooms and Meals revenue sharing, and the $100 million cut to the Statewide Property Tax going to every taxpayer in the state next year. When we began the process of lowering New Hampshire’s high business tax rates in order to make our economy more competitive, opponents claimed that cutting taxes would “blow a $90 million hole in the budget.” On the contrary, the Josiah Bartlett Center for Public Policy found that over the past decade, as we were steadily lowering the rates of the Business Profits Tax and Business Enterprise Tax, New Hampshire business tax revenues exceeded projections by $650 million. Lowering rates created jobs and helped companies grow and thrive, generating higher revenues than if we had left tax rates high. Contrary to claims of those who wanted higher taxes, the Department of Revenue Administration reports that nearly 90% of BPT taxpayers are companies headquartered in New Hampshire. When we lower the cost of government in Concord, we can help lower the cost of living for everyone in New Hampshire. We are proud to have gained broad, bipartisan support for this property tax relief plan. It shows that good government can still happen when we do things the New Hampshire way. By sending surplus revenues to our cities and towns, we hope to lower property taxes again for everyone in the Granite State. Sen. Chuck Morse (R-Salem) represents District 23 and is president of the state Senate. Sen. Jeb Bradley (R-Wolfeboro) represents District 3 and is the Senate’s majority leader.

# **URGENT: Inflation Is Reaching A Forty Year High In America. **
We're conducting a straw poll of folks like you to determine how you feel about inflation. **We belive that in order to control inflation, Congress needs to:**
* Stop passing multi-trillion-dollar spending bills that are nothing but partisan wish-lists and increase our national debt
* View inflation for what it is—a tax that falls hardest on the lower and middle-class
* Reduce the number of handouts to special interest groups that skyrocket the cost of legislation and only benefit the connected few
Please take a moment to answer this one-click survey today.

body:
I am fighting to put Alaska First. | I am honored to have the endorsement of President Donald Trump.
**[IN CASE YOU MISSED IT:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125642:6whH0loSN:m:1:3317145305:CB643B8D82FDE4651E1C97EEEC6DD542:r)
[PRESIDENT TRUMP ENDORSED SARAH PALIN FOR THE NEXT MEMBER OF CONGRESS FROM ALASKA](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125642:6whH0loSN:m:1:3317145305:CB643B8D82FDE4651E1C97EEEC6DD542:r)**

Peter,

I am honored to have the endorsement of President Donald Trump.

He fought to put America First for four years as our President, and I plan to do the same for Alaska as your next Member of Congress.

I'm ready to get to Washington to FIGHT for our values, but I can only do that with YOUR support, Peter.

While this race is just beginning, we only have about two months until the election. I have President Trump's support, and now I need yours.

_**[Please rush in a donation of ANY AMOUNT to publicly stand with President Trump and me as I fight to put ALASKA FIRST.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125642:6whH0loSN:m:1:3317145305:CB643B8D82FDE4651E1C97EEEC6DD542:r)**_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125642:6whH0loSN:m:1:3317145305:CB643B8D82FDE4651E1C97EEEC6DD542:r)

Your support is critical right now, Peter.

_Personally, I've got nothing to lose, but Alaska and our nation do._ Public service is a calling, and I would be honored to represent the men and women of Alaska in Congress, just as Congressman Young did for 49 years.

This is your chance to be one of my first supporters. I know you won't let me down.

**[Please donate $10 or more IMMEDIATELY to help me put Alaska First.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125642:6whH0loSN:m:1:3317145305:CB643B8D82FDE4651E1C97EEEC6DD542:r)**

Thank you,

Sarah Palin

| | Fellow Patriot:

**We have no idea who is running our country.**

It was crystal clear even during the 2020 campaign that Joe Biden had left the building.

He has no idea who he is, where he is, or what he is saying at any given time.

He is a danger to our national security, blurting out things about chemically attacking Russia, overthrowing the Russian government, and even sending American troops to Russia.

His own White House has to backtrack every time the man opens his mouth.

_Senile is an understatement._

_To add insult to injury, Joe Biden wasn't even elected President. He was installed by an illegitimate coup in the most fraudulent, corrupt "election" in US history._

Republicans had a chance to stop the 2020 Coup on January 6th. They failed.

Even worse, they show up to work every day like nothing is wrong. Like it's still business as usual.

They shouldn't even give Joe Biden the respect of calling him "President."

_As for Joe, his family should be ashamed. What they're doing to him is elder abuse._

**He should be on his porch watching the birds and feeding the squirrels, not making a fool of himself and our country every day.**

[It's time for leaders in D.C. who aren't afraid to call a spade a spade.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=f12097a579&e=eda539b26b)

**[_Our RINO incumbents are failing us every day, sometimes out of spite, sometimes out of cowardice, and sometimes out of sheer stupidity. Any way you slice it, enough is enough_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=2e094454df&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me_ _ defeat the Bipartisan Establishment __\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=cfdc7c98f6&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=4ae7cbc5b6&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=378d2fe476&e=eda539b26b)** _._**

Team, **President Biden is showing us what real leadership looks like** \-- _and the world is taking notice._

A new Gallup poll shows that after **_years_** of Trump undermining America's allies abroad, our country's standing in the world is finally SOARING again!

But while President Biden works to secure our nation and democracy, **Republicans are still slamming him and obstructing his agenda at every turn.**

We need to show President Biden that Democrats are standing with him during this pivotal moment -- _but we’re still missing 49 responses from Pennsylvania!_

**Please, lock in your response before midnight:**

clean_body: Marjorie’s pro-Russia votes are inexcusable = Peter, Marjorie Taylor Greene claims that she does not support Putin or his war against Ukraine, but her pro-Russian actions speak far louder. From spreading Russian propaganda to voting against an investigation into their war crimes or sanctioning them, Putin could not ask for a more supportive official than Marjorie Taylor Greene. = = Marjorie, who foreign policy experts say has “[swallowed] Russian propaganda hook, line, and sinker,” and who was one of only a handful of legislators to vote against recent legislation targeting Russia’s war crimes, is digging herself into a deeper and deeper hole. It’s a bad look for Marge, a bad look for Georgia, and embarrassing to the U.S. to have someone like this in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = In solidarity, Holly McCormack for Congress || || Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States ** | Paid for by Holly for Congress

body:
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today. Yes, just $5.
#

Friends -
$5.
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today. Yes, just $5.
$5 to celebrate our victory in persuading the ATF to stem the tide of ghost guns in the United States.
$5 to help us win our next federal victory to make our communities safer from gun violence.
$5 to help us report a HUGE number of donations that will send an unmistakable message that the movement to act on gun violence is strong.
So please. We know that $5 may not seem like the kind of money that can take on the NRA, but by the time you read this, a few people have already added their $5.
Now they hope you’ll do the same. Because that’s how we win. Together.
[**Can you please make a contribution of just $5—or whatever you can afford—to help Giffords continue the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr22?refcode=em220413-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1796_3935704_y8SHXe&akid=1796%2E3935704%2Ey8SHXe)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Republicans are scared I’m challenging Sen. Chuck Grassley – and they should be.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8584?t=6&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd) Friend - in the dead of night, a judge sided with the GOP establishment's desperate and meritless attempt to remove me from the ballot. This is nothing but a gift to Washington Republicans and a mockery of our democracy, which is why we are fighting back: **Today, my campaign and the state of Iowa will go before the Iowa Supreme Court to appeal the decision.**

I want to make one thing crystal clear here and now: **I promise you that no matter what the GOP throws at our campaign, I will _never_ , ever stop fighting for Iowan families. I refuse to give Chuck Grassley a free pass at the ballot box - and I refuse to let national Republicans' anti-democratic attacks say who is and isn't on the ballot.**

**So right now, my friends at Voter Protection Project and I have never needed your grassroots support more.[Please can you split a donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to help me fight these GOP attacks and defeat Sen. Grassley?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8584?t=7&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8574?t=8&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8575?t=9&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8576?t=10&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8577?t=11&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8578?t=12&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd)
This decision is blatantly partisan and undermines the bipartisan panel that already ruled in FAVOR of our campaign's right to be on the ballot. The entire lawsuit against us is bogus - more than 5,000 Iowans said they wanted a chance to vote for our campaign!

**Make no mistake: The GOP establishment is launching an all-out assault on our democracy - and it's no secret why.**

You see, the GOP is absolutely terrified of our campaign. They've seen the polling numbers showing that Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. They've seen the data that showed only 27% of likely voters want to reelect him to an eighth term. **But more than anything else, they've seen the unprecedented grassroots enthusiasm on the ground for our campaign.**

The GOP knows that Sen. Grassley is vulnerable and that if we win here, Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority. **We can defeat the GOP's bogus lawsuit, and we can defeat Sen. Grassley at the polls, but only if people like you stand with us ahead of our crucial hearing at the Iowa Supreme Court.** [**That's why I have to ask: Can you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and Voter Protection Project so we can fight these GOP attacks? Every single dollar will help us secure our place on the ballot and flip this seat blue on Election Day.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8584?t=13&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd)
I really appreciate you standing with me during this critical moment.

- Abby
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1815%2E878179%2ESDxgXd)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: I Can't Do This Without You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=904cbc541c&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| Friends,

With just over a month until election day, I need to spread my message and I can't get the word out without your help.

**Running against better-funded opponents means every dollar helps to reach every voter.**

Over the past year, I have shared with you my plans to tackle the issues facing our district and the state of Pennsylvania – fully funding our public schools, improving public safety, and supporting our small businesses recovering from the pandemic.

We need representation with the lived experience that truly reflects the diversity of this city, this state, and this nation.**Let’s start electing people from our own communities to truly make a change at the legislative level.**

**[_Please make a donation of whatever you can offer to get us over the finish line May 17._](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=9acbbdb272&e=3f8e2ea1e3)**

_Deja_
---
| | | | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=58f7fd8d80&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: Sarah Palin
subject: I announced my candidacy for the U.S House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

Friend, Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C. America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing. I can’t do this without your support. That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an Official Founding Supporter. This is your chance to go down in history. This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder. name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The violent college Left
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics...
| | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125692:Jmwbj2oaN:m:1:3317145305:DDC29DEA68CFD65631D861CC97931EF6:r)
---
Peter,

Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system.

It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics.

That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today.

I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus.

Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others.

[ | [HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125692:Jmwbj2oaN:m:1:3317145305:DDC29DEA68CFD65631D861CC97931EF6:r)
--- ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125692:Jmwbj2oaN:m:1:3317145305:DDC29DEA68CFD65631D861CC97931EF6:r)
The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus.

It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share.
[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125692:Jmwbj2oaN:m:1:3317145305:DDC29DEA68CFD65631D861CC97931EF6:r)

Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders.

At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie.

School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance.

**The good news is the radical Left's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**

More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts).

This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America's Foundation (YAF).**

When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university -- **and won.**

But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken.

**Young America's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program.

Today YAF needs your help.

[**Will you make a TAX-DEDUCTIBLE contribution of $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125692:Jmwbj2oaN:m:1:3317145305:DDC29DEA68CFD65631D861CC97931EF6:r)

Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas.

Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness."

YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust.

YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are **#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America.**

Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer** , **Katie Pavlich** , YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence** , **Dinesh D'Souza** , **Lila Rose** , **Steve Forbes** , Lt. Col. **Allen West** , Speaker **Newt Gingrich** , **Michael Knowles** , **Dana Loesch** , **James O'Keefe** , NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens** , **Star Parker** , Fox News's **Jesse Watters** , and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_** across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America's Foundation.

**That's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events.**

They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers.

I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students.

But YAF can't do this alone.

As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders.

We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice.

**[Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125692:Jmwbj2oaN:m:1:3317145305:DDC29DEA68CFD65631D861CC97931EF6:r)**

Peter, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know.

The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today.

Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment.

Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds."

I look forward to hearing back from you.

-Ben
[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125692:Jmwbj2oaN:m:1:3317145305:DDC29DEA68CFD65631D861CC97931EF6:r)
Ben Shapiro

**[Will you support Young America's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country? All donations to YAF are TAX-DEDUCTIBLE!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125692:Jmwbj2oaN:m:1:3317145305:DDC29DEA68CFD65631D861CC97931EF6:r)**

[DONATE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60125692:Jmwbj2oaN:m:1:3317145305:DDC29DEA68CFD65631D861CC97931EF6:r)

Copyright (C) 2021 Young America's Foundation

**TO: SOUTH CAROLINA REPUBLICANS** This rendition brought tears to my eyes and gave me chills just listening to it! Some good ole-fashioned **fusion and CELEBRATION of Church and State**! It is the celebration of each of the critical elements of America!CLICK HERE TO BE BLESSED - [https://www.facebook.com/634844434/posts/10159540898914435/?d=n](https://lapierreforhouse.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=835cbcded606775ee123908e4&id=889bac2603&e=6582090d83)Our Framers design it that way. Church and State were put together as compatible pieces of the GREAT EXPERIMENT! Church and State were NEVER designed to be put at odds with one another with undo and unwarranted tension.Unfortunately, the secular Supreme Court has laid a legal precedent (Lemon vs. Kurtzman for one) that has the Church on guard like a night watchman constantly looking to "claw back" their unalienable rights found in our Constitution and Bill of Rights.SCOTUS has "effectively" ushered out religion from the public square (at great and overwhelming moral cost) and welcomed in with open arms the complete secularization of America.Establishment Republicans (William Timmons) have sat idly by and watched the implosion of our God given rights.As your Congressman I will write legislation (that will garner overwhelming support) to help fight for our religious freedoms and the moral compass of the **REAL America**.My opponent William Richardson Timmons IV stated in a recent Palmetto House Republican Women’s meeting that he felt that the discussion on Church and State is a "nonproductive issue"... his words.Candidate LAPIERRE believes that it is the very issue that will save America. A proper definition of what Separation of Church and State actually means is the forerunner to true and complete religious freedom.When we have religious freedom in America, our country will be strong and all of the other political issues will be put in their proper context and weighed/judged accordingly.VOTE Mike LaPierre for CongressSC District 4 - Greenville and Spartanburg CountiesI LIKE MIKEA future congressman who has both the political and spiritual discernment to lead.
God bless the beautiful state of SOUTH CAROLINA!

Friend,
Here are the facts. Nancy and I are the most qualified candidates in this race. We are experienced, and have proven track records for standing up for those left behind. We are fighting racism, we are fighting inequity and inequality, and we are fighting against dark money in politics.
We want to prove that you can run for office and win because of the quality of your candidacy – not how many corporate checks you’re willing to cash.
We want to be the next Governor and Lt. Governor of Maryland, because we believe we are the best choice for Maryland’s future.
Right now we are about $3,600 behind our mid-April goal. The support of people like you is how we win. Will you help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: No prayer on Good Friday?
body:
It's been over 45 days since we sent the Spreckels Union School District a letter demanding immediate injunctive relief for the
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zovgh604rpthep57nshrfp9rfvse6ierleap4q98_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5jjeolkstib8cj6m1pmdd75chir8s9icqprcdj6eapjcc5l6kp69p3i6dg6eppnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlciqj8o3iepj3ap5jcjjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cjgeeor1chie49fg)
It's been over 45 days since we sent the Spreckels Union School District a letter demanding immediate injunctive relief for the twisted gaslighting they did to Jessica Konen's 12-year-old daughter...

|
I apologize for being so abrupt, but I urgently need your help.

Unelected bureaucrats and corrupt politicians in Washington D.C. are threatening to shred the First Amendment to pieces by deciding when, where, and how you can exercise your God-given freedoms.

And my team of attorneys at the Center for American Liberty is trying to stop them with a critical lawsuit being heard this week at the Court of Appeals in Washington, D.C.

But with less than a week to secure a crucial victory in court before Good Friday, I’m relying on you and every other American patriot who cares about the unalienable rights enshrined in our constitution to help me today.

[**Will you please help us defend religious liberty by supporting our emergency appeal against the United States Capitol Police Board today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmmcm316ka6pl0la08q78mus23et4uli2u3lpn98_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm6ob4cjh2bs)

Let be briefly explain what this lawsuit is all about.

For the past 32 years, a local pastor - Reverend Patrick Mahoney - gathered his faithful parishioners on the steps of the United States Capitol on Good Friday to give thanks to God and to pray for our nation.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg20ckejs5hdqoqtj8fvdjjqtm6li4fuvggln9lg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm6ob4cjh2bs)
That was until last year when unelected bureaucrats intervened and shut the whole thing down.

For the first time in three decades, Rev. Mahoney was DENIED a permit to worship in public.

Then, a few months later, he applied for a permit to hold a prayer vigil at the U.S. Capitol on the anniversary of September 11 to pray for healing for our nation.

Again, his permit was DENIED.

_Never mind the fact that simply being required to get a permit to exercise the right to pray in public is a gross violation of the Constitution..._

The feckless, unelected bureaucrats at the United States Capitol told Rev. Mahoney and his peaceful worshipers that they couldn’t pray on the public grounds outside the Capitol.

But the Capitol Police Board didn’t stop far-left Congresswoman Cori Bush from camping out on the Capitol steps for several days in protest.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpnd0f0pir82hc0t9p85po3qehvm4naq0823q4q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm6ob4cjh2bs)
The Capitol Police Board even granted a large organization a permit to protest with massive stage, sound equipment, and media presence.

And when asked, the Capitol Police Board admitted that they granted these and at least one other permit application at the request of a member of Congress.

There was never a real concern for “public safety.”

**The U.S. Capitol Police Board denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray in public because he didn’t have the support of AOC, Nancy Pelosi, or any other member of Congress.**

THAT’S UNCONSTITUTIONAL.

It’s not up to unelected bureaucrats or politicians to pick and choose who can speak, pray, or assemble in public.

That’s why the Center for American Liberty is suing the United States Capitol Police Board on behalf of Rev. Patrick Mahoney for unconstitutionally denying him and his parishioners the right to exercise their First Amendment freedoms.

[**Will you help us win our lawsuit and hold these violators of the Constitution accountable with a tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvuk4kbj108qdh7oi3u4mk84m9e87h511hhajebo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm6ob4cjh2bs)

The reason I need your help is because the Center for American Liberty – the public interest law firm I founded a few years ago to defend the liberties of Americans left behind by civil liberties legacy organizations – is a non-profit organization with limited means.

So, the only way we can afford to pay for this lawsuit and others like it is with the help of patriots like you.

**This lawsuit is going to cost $50,000. But that’s a small price to pay to protect our freedoms.**

I’m asking for your help because our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board represents so much more than just one man’s right to pray in public.

This lawsuit represents your right, my right, and every American’s right to exercise their freedom of speech, freedom of religion, and freedom of assembly...

...no matter what you have to say, when you want to say it, and how you express it.

Even if you never personally experienced it, I’ll bet you know someone who was told that they couldn’t go to church or leave their homes over the past few years under the totalitarian edicts of far-left governors in the name of “public safety...”

... while those very same elites attended lavish dinner parties at Michelin starred restaurants and turned a blind eye to abject anarchy by their far-left activist base.

And if they aren’t held accountable for their hypocrisy and illegal restrictions, they’ll continue to spur up “crisis” after “crisis” to gain further control of your life.

The constitutional rights of every American are on the line with our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board.

[**Please help us win this critical lawsuit by making a tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z331ch63ulm8t7jrbvtnjf8f4k3au1g27rfih100_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm6ob4cjh2bs)

For Freedom,

[
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6lonsp5kapb2en9mc6m53rld3vghm983qbgov1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm6ob4cjh2bs)
Harmeet K. Dhillon

P.S. Like I mentioned, we have less than a week to win this case before Good Friday.

Earlier this week, the district court ruled against our original request for a preliminary injunction.

But I’m not taking “no” for an answer.

The Bill of Rights states plain as day that, “Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof...”

And the Center for American Liberty is feverishly working to preserve that guarantee for you, your children, and your grandchildren.

[**I hope that I can count on you to help us defend that right by contribution $35 or more to our emergency appeal against the U.S. Capitol Police Board today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zisbc611m5bkl6q9j6tnsodsujsan5j2mr6giab8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm6ob4cjh2bs)

Thank you in advance for your support!

[ DONATE ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb62a94qmvs11ksnmo82mc587pq26mgpb0aggll0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm6ob4cjh2bs)

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z69jce2otlj8h6d0i1v3t7co8nsnn3lrjsb5as7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm6ob4cjh2bs)
---
[**Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zde5nctvh2e0fk40t450q0knpu55luitsuibhsvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm6ob4cjh2bs)

The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
| (C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3mgepgvcepc4u08i2l7as2e10fo0has65h1nje0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s3jm6ob4cjh2bs)
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmdehq1t3jh47i7g4cae7asp36hckop5nf2gime8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cjgeeor1chie49fg)

The reason I need your help is because the Center for American Liberty – the public interest law firm I founded a few years ago to defend the liberties of Americans left behind by civil liberties legacy organizations – is a non-profit organization with limited means. So, the only way we can afford to pay for this lawsuit and others like it is with the help of patriots like you. This lawsuit is going to cost $50,000. But that’s a small price to pay to protect our freedoms. I’m asking for your help because our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board represents so much more than just one man’s right to pray in public. This lawsuit represents your right, my right, and every American’s right to exercise their freedom of speech, freedom of religion, and freedom of assembly... ...no matter what you have to say, when you want to say it, and how you express it. Even if you never personally experienced it, I’ll bet you know someone who was told that they couldn’t go to church or leave their homes over the past few years under the totalitarian edicts of far-left governors in the name of “public safety...” ... while those very same elites attended lavish dinner parties at Michelin starred restaurants and turned a blind eye to abject anarchy by their far-left activist base. And if they aren’t held accountable for their hypocrisy and illegal restrictions, they’ll continue to spur up “crisis” after “crisis” to gain further control of your life. The constitutional rights of every American are on the line with our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board. For Freedom, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. Like I mentioned, we have less than a week to win this case before Good Friday. Earlier this week, the district court ruled against our original request for a preliminary injunction. But I’m not taking “no” for an answer. The Bill of Rights states plain as day that, “Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof...” And the Center for American Liberty is feverishly working to preserve that guarantee for you, your children, and your grandchildren. Thank you in advance for your support! | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends. | (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44098112/340083832/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjc3NjQwMS01ZWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DVj-sKtu1pmbkIieFboYfWoQEpKMjkBS5KYWEY9QK2M=&emci=db120090-aaba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c6776401-5ebb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
Republicans have been shoving more and more extreme abortion bans through State Legislatures across the country this year, forcing people back into unsafe conditions for their medical care.
This headline may have been one of the first, but if Republicans get their way and overturn Roe --_**it will not be the last.**_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44098113/340083833/416963966?refcode=X_041222_WomanArrested&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjc3NjQwMS01ZWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DVj-sKtu1pmbkIieFboYfWoQEpKMjkBS5KYWEY9QK2M=)
---
This patient was arrested and charged after going to the ER to seek care for her miscarriage _and her medical team involved the police._**At one of the most vulnerable times of her life, this patient was callously arrested and charged with a serious federal crime.**
Anti-choice Republicans may claim they're not targeting women --_but we knew better._**Criminalizing abortion is a dangerous attempt to control pregnant people, and it will have grave consequences.******

Abortion is a reproductive health decision for a person to make with their family and doctor. clean_body: Friend, Republicans have been shoving more and more extreme abortion bans through State Legislatures across the country this year, forcing people back into unsafe conditions for their medical care. This headline may have been one of the first, but if Republicans get their way and overturn Roe --it will not be the last. = This patient was arrested and charged after going to the ER to seek care for her miscarriage and her medical team involved the police.At one of the most vulnerable times of her life, this patient was callously arrested and charged with a serious federal crime. Anti-choice Republicans may claim they're not targeting women --but we knew better.Criminalizing abortion is a dangerous attempt to control pregnant people, and it will have grave consequences.**** Abortion is a reproductive health decision for a person to make with their family and doctor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you for taking action, Kirsten Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please._

name: Fundraising Alert (via Team Ryan)
subject: sitting ducks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3266%2E3611125%2ECz1v24 ][IMG]

Folks, we just can’t seem to catch a break.

I’ll spare you the boring details, but the bottom line is that the GOP is
spending more than $4.5 million just this week on TV and radio ads, so
we’re going to have to increase our FEC fundraising goal a bit.

And by a “bit” I mean $25,000.

That means our already substantial $50,000 goal is actually $75,000—and
because this is the final FEC filing before the primary, this is a
make-or-break goal.

We’d nearly hit the original $50,000 goal, but now we’re scrambling to
scrape together the remaining $25,000 before midnight, or we’re sitting
ducks for GOP attacks.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10624?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3266%2E3611125%2ECz1v24 ]Folks, I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important—can you rush a
$25 donation to help us across the finish line? This is our best chance to
make a strong showing before the primary.

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: we're surging ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
one of the most consequential midterm elections of our lifetime
| | |
---
This is important, friend.

We are just months away from what could be one of the most consequential midterm elections of our lifetime. And with the last Florida Senate race being decided by just 0.12%, every goal is _critical_ to reaching voters and winning.

After I asked for your help yesterday, I was so heartened to see hundreds of supporters contribute to this campaign – **but I still need another 128 Election Year Members before midnight to hit my daily fundraising goal.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44098158/340084025/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2924-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjc3NjQwMS01ZWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFt9OzV4IQ8E2BqH2Pl9To0VKEvZID7NpF1NQdx76pU=)
This is a make-or-break moment: If I defeat Marco Rubio, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to control the Senate. Campaign strategists like James Carville say they have "zero doubt" that I can win – but ONLY if I amass enough resources to reach more voters right now.
**In a race as important as this one, falling short isn't an option. Missing tonight's goal could mean losing this race. Losing this race could cost Democrats our majority and enough votes to abolish the filibuster, safeguard reproductive freedom or strengthen voting rights. With so much on the line, I'm counting on you to become an Election Year Member right now:**
**[Please, friend, will you donate $5 or more immediately to become an Election Year Member, help me reach my daily fundraising goal and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44098159/340084026/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2924-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjc3NjQwMS01ZWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iFt9OzV4IQ8E2BqH2Pl9To0VKEvZID7NpF1NQdx76pU=)**
Thank you,

Val Demings

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. The establishment is getting nervous.
#

The establishment is getting nervous.
After Senator Sanders endorsed our campaign yesterday, a Super PAC allied with our opponent has reserved more than half a MILLION dollars in ad spending to try to come after Nina.
They’re seeing the momentum our campaign is building, and it’s making them very nervous.

Friend,

Many people are asking, and yes, **it 's true.**

While playing a round of golf with some of the greatest golfers in our country, _**I made a hole-in-one.**_

[](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxlUctu3DAM_BrvzcaGfh98SGqkh0X6ANKkN0Er0bYSPVxZzsZ_X8rYtAUKEAI4HA2GQ9mBaECIg-rgCHAsbvKbEkqospY6KKCRCOWxgXNSHC_KZtJZruVL8KuZM-HMYeo4niFvWglYnUUzSFnlopECRNsOdVmUB91NIcxLkt8mcE-1oFg9ZiTnUUaRiPE3TLlBrwRPX5yyIR1WKz1Xi7JjSiSjQkCMVDValOno9JDOkwsuqub3Pqp6Iid5T_aIWRlncWOzRjniX5Qbt9pAfV1StwbDDEq1GkLQcKXZNFzxxa1exJ9GMMuprrjgZubkgiYfqbH_XKVL4AEN2sD-DY3FTa-Lfsg5G3B3RLCYmJg3vzArNLRtTRxmtZI0fX_8_PT-lL9Njzs4KUmZ9sVz4X_cbg_fD76T80VprZaqpnONcZn9RmRXq2HrkvouAdj_AezngFNx9_NLdXo-9enrt19f074qi0ucwid6wzbjH-pVJdtDimjd_wZSEr18)

It was on the 7th hole, playing 181-yards into a slight wind. I hit a 5-iron, which sailed magnificently into a relatively strong wind with approximately 5 feet of cut, after which it bounced twice and then went _clank,_ into the hole.

This could not come at a better time, Friend. _I just released one of my favorite photos of me golfing, and I want YOU to have it._ _**I even SIGNED it for you.**_

_There are not many signed copies of these photos, and once they are gone, you will not get another chance._

Over the subsequent decade, foreign actors from UnAmerican nations, purchased millions of these homes, in schemes using our trade surplus money. China alone received over $5 Trillion dollars. You can buy a lot of houses with _5 million millions_ folks! That’s more money than the value of every acre of farmland in the entire United States **Here's the scheme:** Many of these homes, purchased by foreign entities, have been used to "gather votes". This is why mail in ballots are so important to our enemies, foreign and domestic. It’s treason on the part of many of our politicians. These homes have been strategically purchased across every county in the nation and the agents of foreign powers are actually communicating with each other via voter rolls, using fictitious registration names. You can actually see this when put into a translator! What I am now describing to you, I presented to military officers and senior NSA staff, in December of 2020. I’m sharing it now because **I’m EXTREMELY alarmed by Title 42 ending. That’s because many of these houses which had never been moved into, can now be backfilled using Biden’s “midnight flights” and other means...just in time to try to steal the next election.** **With your help, we can be agents of change and prevention!** **Will you help?**

In addition, many of the Communist sympathizers among us have been casting votes for their children who moved out, and/or their deceased parents.

It's sad when I think about the future of our children and the crimes being committed against their freedom...but it’s encouraging to see so many people have joined the fight with me. I'm not even waiting until I'm elected! As I run for Senate, I’m providing guidance on how to identify phantom voters and we need this work to continue to expand and I'm asking for your support. * Focus on identical phone numbers used across state lines as they signal who is a co-conspirator.
* Deep dive into registrations with PO Boxes. (You'll understand when you examine a few.)

Please consider sending support for my campaign. name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: Watch our first TV ad and help us keep it on the air!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We just released our first ad, and we wanted our top supporters like you to be among the first to see it.
#

We just released our first ad, and we wanted our top supporters, folks like you, to be among the first to see it.
“The Road” highlights Cheri’s lifelong commitment to justice and integrity and explains how those values have guided her throughout her service as a public defender, judge and eventually the first Black woman to serve as Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court.
[**Please take 30 seconds to watch our campaign’s first TV ad that hit the airwaves today. Then, if you can afford it, please consider making a $3 donation to help keep our ad live and get our message in front of as many voters as possible.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-firstad?refcode=em220413-1-T2T3&refcode2=707.357359.wNEMgg&noskip=true&t=1&akid=707%2E357359%2EwNEMgg)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-firstad?refcode=em220413-1-T2T3&refcode2=707.357359.wNEMgg&noskip=true&t=2&akid=707%2E357359%2EwNEMgg)
This is an important message for North Carolina voters to hear right now.
While Republicans and their super PACs are attacking each other, Cheri is offering a different kind of vision and message — a positive one that is centered on the values that have guided her life. Values that she will take to the United States Senate.
This ad is going to start airing across North Carolina today, but we wanted to make sure you got a first look.
[**So take a moment to watch our first television ad of this campaign, then make a $3 donation to help us make sure every voter in North Carolina hears Cheri’s message.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-firstad?refcode=em220413-1-T2T3&refcode2=707.357359.wNEMgg&noskip=true&t=3&akid=707%2E357359%2EwNEMgg)
**[WATCH + DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-firstad?refcode=em220413-1-T2T3&refcode2=707.357359.wNEMgg&noskip=true&t=4&akid=707%2E357359%2EwNEMgg)**
\- Team Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=707%2E357359%2EwNEMgg). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=707%2E357359%2EwNEMgg). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=707_357359_wNEMgg&akid=707%2E357359%2EwNEMgg) today to help us make history.

name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: Just heard, have to share...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
Some good news and some bad news to share.
I just heard from our team that there's been a drop in our fundraising numbers since the beginning April-- I am reaching out to ask for your help to get us back on track. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
That was the bad news.
Now, if you are still reading--thank you-- and let's get to the good part. The good news is that because of the generous donations we received from folks all around the country, we hit our Q1 fundraising goal—$34 over goal!
This means we were just one donation away from not reaching our goal, every dollar makes a difference.
I am asking you today to chip in what you can to help us get back on track. We need 79 supporters from your area to close the gap. Can you be one of the 79 supporters today who will help us get over this bump in April? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
We are just 30 days away from ballots dropping in California and this election is heating up.
We can't lose our Democratic House Majority and we can't afford to lose vulnerable seats in swing districts like Katie’s seat-- especially not to right wing Trump Republicans.
Will you chip in to help us close our fundraising gap so that our movement can have the resources that we need to get through these critical 30 days before ballots drop? Help us support Katie Porter's re-election to keep her fighting for us in Congress and stand with us to protect our majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Thank you!
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

name: Mark Kelly
subject: humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I know this grassroots team can come through when it matters the most.
#

Friends —
I am coming to you this morning with a humble request:
Can you please make a contribution to my re-election campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline ends on Friday at midnight? Please use this link to give:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/Mid-Month-Deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220413-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2562_6688874_VO2pMx&akid=2562%2E6688874%2EVO2pMx)
I know we ask a lot. But there’s a reason for it. You see: hitting these goals in the middle of the month is extremely important. It informs how the rest of our month is going to go and the spending decisions we can or can’t make.
So far, nearly 1 million people have contributed to either my first campaign or my re-election.
But now that we’re in an election year and attack ads are already running, I need YOUR support more than ever.
My team tells me we are aiming for a goal of 15,000 donations by Friday to keep up the pace this month. I told them I’d send this email to help out, because I know this grassroots team can come through when it matters the most. So, I have to humbly ask:
[**Can you please make your first contribution before this mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight on Friday?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220413-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2562_6688874_VO2pMx&akid=2562%2E6688874%2EVO2pMx)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220413-1-7&t=21&refcode2=2562_6688874_VO2pMx&akid=2562%2E6688874%2EVO2pMx)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220413-1-7&t=22&refcode2=2562_6688874_VO2pMx&akid=2562%2E6688874%2EVO2pMx)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220413-1-7&t=23&refcode2=2562_6688874_VO2pMx&akid=2562%2E6688874%2EVO2pMx)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220413-1-7&t=24&refcode2=2562_6688874_VO2pMx&akid=2562%2E6688874%2EVO2pMx)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220413-1-7&t=25&refcode2=2562_6688874_VO2pMx&akid=2562%2E6688874%2EVO2pMx)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220413-1-7&t=26&refcode2=2562_6688874_VO2pMx&akid=2562%2E6688874%2EVO2pMx)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in. It all adds up when we all do our part.
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=2562%2E6688874%2EVO2pMx).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. name: Team WisGOP
subject: Convention Deadline Approaching!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Early Bird Deals End This Friday

Hi Friend -- **The road to Republican majorities in the U.S. House and the U.S. Senate runs through Wisconsin – and this year, the fate of our state and country is on the line**. We absolutely must re-elect Senator Ron Johnson, defeat Governor Tony Evers, send a Republican from the third congressional district to Washington, and elect conservatives at every level to help get Wisconsin and America back on track. We hope you’ll join us at our 2022 Republican Party of Wisconsin State Convention in Middleton as we prepare to do just that. Don't forget to sign up for the Convention before this Friday! After Friday our early bird pricing ends, but we want to make sure you are able to take advantage of this deal! | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWRj2cMYkWVNJAvLz3dukgRI03s73cUlMp_-JMdenwImXcHmlm-nVIxFEoI4O3fslo-1WSz75GgaYgoPU4QX3CQWL2c-S7f4yo-9hgM15FKeh8wr_0BkIiHsfIq8nTdSeQg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conventionpush_1&n=1 "Sign up for Convention TODAY") [Sign up for Convention TODAY](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWRj2cMYkWVNJAvLz3dukgRI03s73cUlMp_-JMdenwImXcHmlm-nVIxFEoI4O3fslo-1WSz75GgaYgoPU4QX3CQWL2c-S7f4yo-9hgM15FKeh8wr_0BkIiHsfIq8nTdSeQg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=conventionpush_1&n=1)

clean_body: Early Bird Deals End This Friday Hi Friend -- The road to Republican majorities in the U.S. House and the U.S. Senate runs through Wisconsin – and this year, the fate of our state and country is on the line. We absolutely must re-elect Senator Ron Johnson, defeat Governor Tony Evers, send a Republican from the third congressional district to Washington, and elect conservatives at every level to help get Wisconsin and America back on track. We hope you’ll join us at our 2022 Republican Party of Wisconsin State Convention in Middleton as we prepare to do just that. Don't forget to sign up for the Convention before this Friday! After Friday our early bird pricing ends, but we want to make sure you are able to take advantage of this deal! | "Sign up for Convention TODAY" We also have blocked of rooms directly with the hotel, but they are filling up fast. If you are staying overnight, don't miss out on these deals! Hotel Information: When: Friday, May 20th & Saturday, May 21st Where: Madison Marriott West, 1313 John Q Hammons Dr, Middleton, WI 53562 Room Block: "Click here to check out the highlights of Convention" We look forward to seeing you at Convention this year! -Team WisGOP Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee. 148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

Team, we wanted to let you know just how important you are to our campaign.

When we think of our supporters, we think of the folks who have been there since day one and are now back to help get Senator Hassan reelected.

We think of people who have chipped in $5 or $10 or $25 in our most critical moments, when we were short of our goals and worried about the future of this race.

We think of folks like you who donated last quarter — all 42,000 of you! — and helped us hit our goal, putting us one step closer to reelecting Maggie this November.

Simply put, we think of you, team. We couldn't be more grateful to have you on our team.
But with Election Day quickly approaching and the GOP throwing millions into attacks against Senator Hassan, we need you now more than ever.

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: Our mission to Keep Nevada Safe needs you
body:
With new polling showing our Keep Nevada Safe mission neck-and-neck with Steve Sisolak, now is the time to strike while the iron is hot.
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Peter,
With new polling showing our Keep Nevada Safe mission neck-and-neck with Steve Sisolak, now is the time to strike while the iron is hot.
A recent survey from Blueprint Polling even shows our campaign LEADING him by 3.2%!
Make no mistake - supporters like YOU are the reason for this. [If we can build on this momentum, it can put us over the top come November.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001glO57sTGCGpjHLVb8cg2slYaR2o09xPdUfLtnTx4xJOPB56982chICLjF941OCoM25V9OdeLrHtrYCdLiGDrktgbH8juP4bV6BQdZzP0RYA5mHj1FdrngyfC9KWqUEp0HFoX3R-4gcvvu9SvL3ysuzFj6lTk9A0Ezzuhk63wfBs7U0Kosc_e6XJctsamQC1Lt9bwWZgsMNsAZ7vKoOdo6LCYW4xr01UKF4YiS4Uze0g=&c=XpW189yQMUmIN8L1FXYC8daWZ_F_OzqLReIToSzktJ064tXkSmzDJw==&ch=ngNOqNAM0Feg5SYdsPOpNvsV5eOPDZ8JvLR0TxqsDkpBJ7hgCJw6ug==)
YOU hold the ticket to no new taxes, more choice for parents, and less crime here in the state of Nevada! Together, I know our conservative mission is going to keep this great state safe.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001glO57sTGCGpjHLVb8cg2slYaR2o09xPdUfLtnTx4xJOPB56982chICLjF941OCoM25V9OdeLrHtrYCdLiGDrktgbH8juP4bV6BQdZzP0RYA5mHj1FdrngyfC9KWqUEp0HFoX3R-4gcvvu9SvL3ysuzFj6lTk9A0Ezzuhk63wfBs7U0Kosc_e6XJctsamQC1Lt9bwWZgsMNsAZ7vKoOdo6LCYW4xr01UKF4YiS4Uze0g=&c=XpW189yQMUmIN8L1FXYC8daWZ_F_OzqLReIToSzktJ064tXkSmzDJw==&ch=ngNOqNAM0Feg5SYdsPOpNvsV5eOPDZ8JvLR0TxqsDkpBJ7hgCJw6ug==)
---
| When momentum is on our side like this, we have to capitalize.
[That's why I hope YOU will step up today with any contribution - large or small - to help make sure we come out on top in what will surely be one of the closest gubernatorial races in America this year.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001glO57sTGCGpjHLVb8cg2slYaR2o09xPdUfLtnTx4xJOPB56982chICLjF941OCoM25V9OdeLrHtrYCdLiGDrktgbH8juP4bV6BQdZzP0RYA5mHj1FdrngyfC9KWqUEp0HFoX3R-4gcvvu9SvL3ysuzFj6lTk9A0Ezzuhk63wfBs7U0Kosc_e6XJctsamQC1Lt9bwWZgsMNsAZ7vKoOdo6LCYW4xr01UKF4YiS4Uze0g=&c=XpW189yQMUmIN8L1FXYC8daWZ_F_OzqLReIToSzktJ064tXkSmzDJw==&ch=ngNOqNAM0Feg5SYdsPOpNvsV5eOPDZ8JvLR0TxqsDkpBJ7hgCJw6ug==)
The mission to Keep Nevada Safe needs you today. Can I personally count on your support?
Thank you for choosing safety, security, and freedom for our state this year.
---
| | | [SUPPORT THE MISSION HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001glO57sTGCGpjHLVb8cg2slYaR2o09xPdUfLtnTx4xJOPB56982chICLjF941OCoM25V9OdeLrHtrYCdLiGDrktgbH8juP4bV6BQdZzP0RYA5mHj1FdrngyfC9KWqUEp0HFoX3R-4gcvvu9SvL3ysuzFj6lTk9A0Ezzuhk63wfBs7U0Kosc_e6XJctsamQC1Lt9bwWZgsMNsAZ7vKoOdo6LCYW4xr01UKF4YiS4Uze0g=&c=XpW189yQMUmIN8L1FXYC8daWZ_F_OzqLReIToSzktJ064tXkSmzDJw==&ch=ngNOqNAM0Feg5SYdsPOpNvsV5eOPDZ8JvLR0TxqsDkpBJ7hgCJw6ug==)
---
| With gratitude, Sheriff Joe Lombardo
---
|
---
