name: VoteVets
subject: Fox news is a tumor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Turn it on any night and you’ll see hosts poisoning people’s minds with talk of stolen elections, QAnon conspiracy theories, anti-vaxx and anti-science propaganda and more.
#
Derek —
Fox News is a tumor on the American body politic.
Turn it on any night and you’ll see hosts poisoning people’s minds with talk of stolen elections, QAnon conspiracy theories, anti-vaxx and anti-science propaganda and more.
And it’s not just America. They celebrate autocrats like Hungary’s Viktor Orban, and when Russia invaded Ukraine it was the one channel where you could get Putin’s talking points without fail.
Unfortunately, so much of this rhetoric targets veterans and plays on a false sense of “patriotism.”
That makes VoteVets’ work to fight back so critical. We are a trusted voice. Our work cuts through the clutter.
And we even have a program where veterans talk to veterans across the country about these issues and more.
But we can’t do this work without your help. And that means from time to time we have to ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today to help us continue our fight against the Fox News propaganda targeting veterans and all Americans?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-disinfo?refcode=em220413-1-30&t=1&refcode2=5738_3013755_ItPgTe&akid=5738%2E3013755%2EItPgTe)

subject: Tanya Announces Strong Q1 Fundraising Total
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Tanya for Arizona
body:
BIG NEWS for Team Tanya! Tanya announced today that she nearly $400,000 in Quarter 1. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/508d107ed402/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-7044077?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hi Friend, BIG NEWS from Campaign HQ! Tanya announced today that she raised nearly $400,000 in Quarter 1.

Since launching her campaign in August, Tanya has continuously gained momentum and national attention shown by her stellar fundraising total this quarter and endorsements from Chairwowman Elise Stefanik, Congressional Leadership Fund's Trailblazers Fund, Winning for Women, VIEWPAC, and Maggie's List. [**Join the over 5,100 donors who have already supported Tanya by donating today!**](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=cb04e6eab2&e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| [ ](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=840c425316&e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| Tanya's campaign is gaining momentum and is already putting the plans needed in action to blow past this strong number next quarter. Tanya has shown she has the momentum and fundraising prowess needed to flip AZ-04 for Republicans and she is just getting started.

Join our team by replying to this email for future volunteer opportunities or helping us build our war chest by donating [here](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=deedac4c40&e=bd2b55b0e3).

Best,
Team Tanya
---
| \--
More about Tanya:

**_Tanya Contreras Wheeless_** launched her campaign for the U.S. Congress in August 2021. She is a proven leader with a track record of bringing people together to solve problems. Her vast professional experience includes lawyer, business association CEO, sports executive with the Phoenix Suns, small business owner, and community advocate.

A valley native, she was born to teen parents and is the granddaughter of Mexican immigrants. She grew up in Peoria in a working-class family that often struggled, but despite the challenges, she learned the importance of faith, family, hard work, and personal responsibility.

Driven by her desire to create a better life for herself, Tanya worked from the time she was 14. She put herself through Arizona State University, becoming the first person in her family to graduate from college. She went on to graduate from ASU Law with distinction, earning a job at one of the nation’s top law firms.

Now, Tanya is ready to bring her experience and thoughtful leadership to Congress. She believes in the promise of the American dream and will fight to preserve it. She will embrace policies that empower people, not the government. And, she will always put Arizona first.

Tanya lives in Tempe with her husband Steve, an attorney and former F-16 pilot in the U.S. Air Force. They have three wonderful children and two adorable dogs.
---
| | | _The Tanya for Arizona campaign is about what WE CAN do together. WE CAN defend opportunity and freedom, but Tanya will need your help. No act of support is too small so please join our movement today by
[_DONATING_](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=f0f3b9f912&e=bd2b55b0e3) or _[VOLUNTEERING](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=48454985ef&e=bd2b55b0e3)_._
---

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Peter, we need to be united against the GOP.

| |
---
Hi Peter – I've been speaking with Democratic candidates and leaders from across the country, and there's nowhere more vulnerable to a Republican takeover than in Nevada. Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto has been rated "the most vulnerable Democratic senator" in America, and four consecutive polls show her trailing her Trump-endorsed opponent. [__**That's why I'm asking, will you split a donation to help Sen. Cortez Masto and I fight for a Democratic win this midterm election?**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44090431/340049747/1303306823?refcode2=f3cd60e7-42bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=220413_js_splitcortezmasto_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzY2Q2MGU3LTQyYmItZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=moM6zXnnGT13d1gwOnGYpFChzEbQAeZ5gkAgM4VEzzs=) The GOP has already poured $4 million to defeat Sen. name: Team Franchot
subject: This week’s critical fundraising deadline
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
Yesterday, Peter reached out to tell you about our team’s critical mid-month fundraising deadline this Friday. Thanks to the efforts of our generous grassroots supporters, we’re making progress towards our goal – but we still have a ways to go!
If you are able, we are humbly asking for your support. Peter Franchot is the Local Candidate for Governor in 2022 – the overwhelming majority of our donations come directly from supporters within the state of Maryland, and it is thanks to them that we are closer to the finish line than any other campaign in the race. We’ve reported the most Cash on Hand of any team, we have the most endorsements by current and former elected officials, and we have a strong lead in the polls.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0413?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0413?amount=20.22]
But momentum alone won’t propel us to victory. We need your help to meet our $10,000 fundraising goal by this Friday, so we can continue to scale up our statewide operation in the critical weeks ahead. So, what do you say?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0413?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0413?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0413?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0413?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0413]
Any donation, whether large or small, will make a critical difference to our efforts. From combating climate change, to tackling the student debt crisis, to lowering the cost of healthcare and housing, we’re going to deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift Maryland’s communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
Thank you for your support,
Team Franchot
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0413?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

The Eau Claire Area School District has quickly become one of the most radically progressive school districts in the country, trampling on the rights of Wisconsin parents at every turn.

---
[Source: _Fox News]_
---
From privilege tests to teacher training urging students to hide gender transitions from their parents, Tony Evers’ and his “woke” liberal mob have hijacked our children’s education.
---
_It’s never been more evident that Wisconsinites are in desperate need of a Parents’ Bill of Rights to take back control of our schools and protect our children from this leftist indoctrination._
---
**[Please add your name to my official petition DEMANDING a Parents’ Bills of Rights here in Wisconsin.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=ac123fb9526849859231a4513abaa224&_e=1DanPUynS6EkjVWHlwwlYpObDbxdqzYOGM3zdVLxWS3pLXxn0VxV5vsxrYyT7tVlmIEHGqR2BOoeXNRRtbuS0_rN_f80G51iTeD1v-7Aot13FutJmSbpPfI1CdVdEciWq0OXvgDQZs84cO5tqQhAoaOYY2RN1IARSSNKGYSGE7rQb1N8lPQNC2CiVIt-zRndaTI7eOR9O2bm4gcuziwZBS4KK943ltXy2Q5Wgb6U3c_UdblPqDfrFnyW9KZLDpmQG05gRrxalz7PafnmDFqp30MI_d8KgbQmdzfCOL6KR3ex9QoTbZ9MmsLvkT2ZKdreDSkOfuGZaDv7boLFHFbytkyRB4ZbearaktyjdUzw-tfaA6-Cpbtj2GI-XBUfQ8E2yYgh_16hBAiBr45JjS5D7RmQho1xNjOy85pkb09aNzq_YFqdYOgcqXeJcFMW-hXOJpB7wXbksjrNNlbbY5BFLFH2GOPcOw6u-qq3F9SVEkm1h44kdCv8uqH-rCUtNQVW7-q6RSaskHVqJ5yI63SMDA%3D%3D)**

---
It’s not enough for Tony Evers and his liberal cronies to push their radical agenda on our children, our largest schools are also FAILING by any real standard under their watch.
---
_**When only 10% of students are proficient, that should NEVER be “meeting expectations.”**_
---
Teachers within the Milwaukee Public Schools system have even written letters expressing their “heartbreak” with the state of their schools.
---
_It’s time for Wisconsin parents – the taxpayers paying for their children’s education – to once again have a say._
---
But that all starts with a Parents’ Bill of Rights and YOUR signature on this petition...
---

clean_body: The signing period closes TONIGHT. | Friend – we still have until 9:45 P.M. to collect as many signatures as possible for our petition demanding a Parents’ Bills of Rights here in Wisconsin. It's long overdue that Wisconsin parents have the tools they need to fight back against Evers and his “woke” liberal mob who have hijacked our children’s education. And YOUR signature brings us that much closer... Official Petition for a Wisconsin Parents’ Bill of Rights Signer: dpwillis67@gmail.com Submission Status: [Pending] Deadline: Tonight @ 9:45 P.M. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Wed, Apr 06, 2022 Subject: Friend's petition signature [PENDING] To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, The Eau Claire Area School District has quickly become one of the most radically progressive school districts in the country, trampling on the rights of Wisconsin parents at every turn. [Source: Fox News] From privilege tests to teacher training urging students to hide gender transitions from their parents, Tony Evers’ and his “woke” liberal mob have hijacked our children’s education. It’s never been more evident that Wisconsinites are in desperate need of a Parents’ Bill of Rights to take back control of our schools and protect our children from this leftist indoctrination. It’s not enough for Tony Evers and his liberal cronies to push their radical agenda on our children, our largest schools are also FAILING by any real standard under their watch. When only 10% of students are proficient, that should NEVER be “meeting expectations.” Teachers within the Milwaukee Public Schools system have even written letters expressing their “heartbreak” with the state of their schools. It’s time for Wisconsin parents – the taxpayers paying for their children’s education – to once again have a say. But that all starts with a Parents’ Bill of Rights and YOUR signature on this petition... Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Val Demings
subject: Val Demings (personal update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I wanted to share an update on my race, [[firstname]]
#
I wanted to share an update on my race, Peter, and I hope you'll read this through to the end.
The Suffolk University/USA Today Florida poll shows that I can win, but only if I reach more voters: in on-the-ground organizing, in fundraising, in voter registration – nearly every single way you can imagine. And recent polling could be confirming this: I'm trailing 2 points behind Marco Rubio when the last Florida Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points.
Does it worry me? Absolutely. Particularly when I'm just hours from my fundraising deadline and _still_ falling 12% short of my $10,000 fundraising goal. Every dollar I fail to raise now means fewer resources I can pour into mobilizing voters and fighting back when Rubio's airing deceitful attack ads. **It means the GOP and Marco Rubio inch closer to keeping Florida red and flipping the Senate.**
**I know you don't want that to happen. I know you care deeply about this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority, and I appreciate that so,_so_ much. But I simply will not have the resources it takes to compete – and most importantly, win – if I don't hit my campaign's fundraising goal.**

clean_body: I wanted to share an update on my race, [[firstname]] I wanted to share an update on my race, Peter, and I hope you'll read this through to the end. The Suffolk University/USA Today Florida poll shows that I can win, but only if I reach more voters: in on-the-ground organizing, in fundraising, in voter registration – nearly every single way you can imagine. And recent polling could be confirming this: I'm trailing 2 points behind Marco Rubio when the last Florida Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points. Does it worry me? Absolutely. Particularly when I'm just hours from my fundraising deadline and still falling 12% short of my $10,000 fundraising goal. Every dollar I fail to raise now means fewer resources I can pour into mobilizing voters and fighting back when Rubio's airing deceitful attack ads. It means the GOP and Marco Rubio inch closer to keeping Florida red and flipping the Senate. I know you don't want that to happen. I know you care deeply about this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority, and I appreciate that so,so much. But I simply will not have the resources it takes to compete – and most importantly, win – if I don't hit my campaign's fundraising goal. = With so much gratitude, Val Demings **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

The U.S. Senate debate this past weekend reinforced what we already knew. **I showed that I am the best-prepared candidate to defeat Raphael Warnock, and Herschel Walker didn't show up at all. **

Georgia deserves leaders that we can count on to be there when it matters. We can't afford to put an untested or unqualified candidate up against Warnock. This is our chance to take back the Senate and get the country back on track, but we need your help.

We are just 40 days away from the May 24th Primary Election, and our team will not stop working. name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: New TV Ad – End Catch and Release
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
Crime is out of control and Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham is a big reason why. MLG has made it easier to be a criminal than a cop. We have devolved Peter, Crime is out of control and Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham is a big reason why. **MLG has made it easier to be a criminal than a cop. ** We have devolved into a **lawless state,** where anything goes and the criminals know it. Violent criminals are being let free because of Catch and Release. Our status as a sanctuary state allows illegal immigrants who commit crimes to avoid deportation – instead, they’re released right back onto the streets. And now our police officers can be sued personally, thanks to a law passed by MLG. **My latest ad EXPOSES MLG’s crime failures, Peter, and I need YOUR HELP to keep it running. Chip in TODAY to keep this vital message live on airwaves all across our state!** [](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=123b4acfc8124c40aea223a6871d5f91&_e=vOVlTOsn0kOt-EsZLzTN9ek09JPnc19pF2zmW2GBTGhKtCrZGcQ1cPMNJaeZnvZow0_34oCcJ1V4KeIAdoNQh_IiJdtc-WwQdAmfqCyy64BAe_N49yEmD892lj-J4SoFP4n2-GLcIdGbPoi0GzIhuzPEaC-SeBEFpiGHN8CybF7BPdFaXrAKwVxG3evaQ1wI1KfpK4QjwrTE5HCFh7sZ_cjicEt_F02gjOD8s4fXSTFM2sz-i2x2Uy6T9O1jDCKJ1SHel-xSqnp-3ZXsNRfqgr3ryPwh8XWRFhnWAt-SpBaVSQJIfmJIddubQVelDsAdUK0K1JI4uw3jrh0Delfk39VjYpPk3pJIBNhKL_hPu5NoL7n87UyIiGkKkhWMV6OqZfj8Zz8aNNLrgDTnoTovSxAPfWUclbpv4a4C7B5TKeCnaO_ewEn2o9J6dWrhwQmmfs6rdO11I245xQgtxvH9XFV_7qGamjiRryD2TEj9XBKGT1VZXfm4mooLBggBM_8tmmj9lZFJPSAvQC7tW6LLpB26BqGSRW5pPQDeyiHnfKY%3D) It’s a sad reality, Peter, but MLG prioritizes the national Radical Left agenda over our safety. We can’t let Republicans wipe out Greg’s chances -- not when control of the entire House rides on this. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = We’ll tell it to you straight: Steve Chabot has voted to... \--Hike insulin prices for diabetics \--Raise health care costs for our seniors \--Slash funding for the USPS ...all to hand tax breaks to his deep-pocketed special interest donors. Look, we’ve got to defeat him and protect the House for Democrats \-- and the newest projections show we truly can. After redistricting, the demographics are on our side in OH-01. But we’ve got to stand up to his massive warchest -- and we need your help. = Thanks, Team Greg Greg Landsman is a former public school teacher and community leader running for Congress to fight for American children and families. His Republican opponent voted to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election and against desperately needed pandemic relief. After 25 years in Washington, he's left our community behind. Greg has an unprecedented opportunity to unseat Steve Chabot, one of the most powerful -- and dangerous -- Republicans in Congress, and bring real change to the people of this district. But he can’t do this alone. He’s relying on your support to flip this seat for Democrats. Will you chip in right away? = We know we send you a lot of emails but that’s because this is our unprecedented chance to unseat one of the most dangerous Republicans in Congress, but Greg simply can’t compete against his opponent’s piles of cash without your help. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe , and we'll make sure to process your request. __ Landsman for Congress PO Box 413 Cincinnati, OH 45201 United States | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress

# THE AMERICA FIRST CANDIDATE
-SAVE AMERICA-

###

**IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Mike Blasi For Congress [info@mikeblasiforcongress.com](mailto:info@mikeblasiforcongress.com)

1-(470) 645-3724 **-Tina Forte to be a special guest at Mike Blasi's 2nd Amendment Celebration-**
**LAKEWOOD, NJ** (April 13, 2022) - Wednesday Mike Blasi, Republican candidate for Congress in New Jersey's 4th District, "We are excited to announce that Tina Forte will be joining us for our event. She is running for congress against AOC in NY and has been an outspoken advocate for our America First principles."

[CLICK HERE TO REGISTER....SPACE IS LIMITED DON'T DELAY](https://MikeBlasiForCongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed3ab556783898df4fb1eb6a1&id=c5b908c88d&e=5c7b109522)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tanisha=20Sullivan?=
subject: Springfield and Holyoke
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Hi friend,

On Friday, we announced another group of elected officials who’ve endorsed our campaign, this time from Springfield and Holyoke. I’m so proud to have the support of:
* Bud Williams, State Representative, 11th Hampden District;
* Justin Hurst, Springfield City Councilor At-Large;
* Jesse Lederman, Springfield City Councilor At-Large;
* Tracye Whitfield, Springfield City Councilor At-Large;
* Melvin Edwards, Ward 3 Springfield City Councilor;
* Denise M. Hurst, Springfield School Committee Member;
* LaTonia Monroe Naylor, Springfield School Committee Member;
* Tessa Murphy-Romboletti, Holyoke City Councilor At-Large;
* Israel Rivera, Holyoke City Councilor At-Large;

Like the support we’ve received from other elected leaders, labor unions, and grassroots organizations, these endorsements show the momentum our campaign is generating.
And they make clear that this movement goes beyond just Greater Boston. Everyone deserves to have their voice heard in our democracy, and folks across the state believe in our vision for a stronger, more vibrant, and more expansive Secretary of State’s office.
If you’re able, will you join our growing list of supporters by making a $20 contribution today? This is a grassroots campaign, so every contribution is critical to helping us reach our goals.
---
|
---
| [DONATE](https://TanishaSullivan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85e18e2f1de926628891a3dbe&id=12b27e42aa&e=dc6a14721a "DONATE")
---
| I’m so grateful to have this group of driven, impactful leaders from Springfield and Holyoke on #TeamTanisha, and I’m excited to work alongside them to engage voters throughout their communities and all of Hampden County!
But we can’t do it without your help. We need the resources to fund our organizing, communications, and voter engagement efforts to bring more people into this campaign.
**So, if you can afford it, will you make a $20 contribution today?**
---
|
---
| [DONATE](https://TanishaSullivan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85e18e2f1de926628891a3dbe&id=df0cf1e298&e=dc6a14721a "DONATE")
---
| Thank you for your support,
---
|

|
---

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Just left the Iowa Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I want to make one thing crystal clear here and now:
| | |
---
**Peter** **– I just left our hearing at the Iowa Supreme Court where we appealed a judge's decision siding with the GOP establishment's desperate and meritless attempt to remove me from the ballot.** This partisan ruling from Sunday night was nothing but a gift to Washington Republicans and a mockery of our democracy: it invalidated petition signatures that have minor errors in the associated date, but Iowa law does not state that errors like this are cause for removing signatures. **That's why we fought back in Iowa's highest court today.**
I want to make one thing crystal clear here and now: **I promise you that no matter what the GOP throws at our campaign, I will never, ever stop fighting for Iowan families.** I refuse to give Chuck Grassley a free pass at the ballot box – and I refuse to let national Republicans' anti-democratic attacks say who is and isn't on the ballot.
**So right now, I've _never_ needed your grassroots support more.** [**Please can you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare to help me fight these GOP attacks and defeat Sen. Grassley?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44100059/340094834/888067044?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk938-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTVmMzgxOC02N2JiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TgJ8bfp20DCRR9rgSjIC2ptRZO4zjxPLKB79EgKvNJw=)

This partisan ruling from Sunday night was nothing but a gift to Washington Republicans and a mockery of our democracy: it invalidated petition signatures that have minor errors in the associated date, but Iowa law does not state that errors like this are cause for removing signatures. That's why we fought back in Iowa's highest court today. Look at these outrageous new headlines. Kyrsten Sinema says she will 'be the same person' if 'Build Back Better' talks revived Never count Sinema out when it comes to helping Republicans and corporations screw over her constituents. Together, we’re going to hold her accountable. And if we want to do that, we’ll need a big surge in donations — so we can immediately start investing resources on the ground to put an end to this obstruction. body:
Thanks to supporters like you, we're within the margin of error.
#
A recent poll asked Texans who they would vote for if the election were today — **and the results show that we are virtually tied!**
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55023?refcode=ema20220413-184844&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=184844%2E444211%2EVAJpZC)
[Texans are ready to elect Beto as our next Governor, but we need the grassroots support to keep up this momentum. Will you chip in $3 now to help defeat Greg Abbott and his divisive, cruel, corrupt agenda?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55023?refcode=ema20220413-184844&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=184844%2E444211%2EVAJpZC)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55029?refcode=ema20220413-184844&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=184844%2E444211%2EVAJpZC)**
Since Beto entered this race, he's been closing the gap with Abbott. **Now, thanks to supporters like you, we're within the margin of error.**
This is the closest poll of the race, but this surge in support could slip away from us unless we maintain our fundraising to keep Beto on the road sharing our positive, unifying vision for Texas.
Greg Abbott's campaign announced they plan to spend **_over $100 million_** attacking Beto between now and Election Day. If we don't have the grassroots resources to match Abbott's corporate mega-donor donations, we could lose our progress in this race.
Beto is neck and neck with Abbott and the future of Texas is at stake, so we have to ask again: **[Will you chip in $3 or more to help immediately power Beto's campaign?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55023?refcode=ema20220413-184844&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=184844%2E444211%2EVAJpZC)**
Thank you,
Team Beto

subject: 📺 NEW AD: we must secure the border

body:

# **Friend — I’ve been to the southern border, and I’ve seen the invasion Joe Biden and Raphael Warnock have allowed of our country firsthand. **

---
This morning, we’re launching a new digital ad highlighting the chaos. [**I hope you’ll watch it now, and pitch in what you can to help us keep it running >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/ef1e19fa069b18d1/022d2061426569c9c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/ef1e19fa069b18d1/4cbb2e7f3ae4d0a6c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[**KEEP THE AD RUNNING »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/ef1e19fa069b18d1/e641a1ab57efccadc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Securing the border, enforcing the law, and finishing the wall MUST be the top priority of the U.S. Senate. And ZERO amnesty. Too much is at stake to nominate a Republican who won’t make this their top priority — **and I’m the only Republican running who has publicly pledged that I won’t vote “yes” in the Senate until we get to “yes” on securing the border. ** [**I hope you’ll stand in the gap with me now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/ef1e19fa069b18d1/abb160b734fbf07dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Aaron=20Rice?=
subject: Advancing Freedom beyond the Legislative Session - Update from the Mississippi Justice Institute
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/wokedisney-8132368?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Hi Friend,

The Mississippi Legislature has adjourned, and you have undoubtedly heard about our efforts to advance bills that promote freedom and prosperity in our state. But just because the legislative session is over does not mean our work is done.

One way we continue to protect freedom during the off-session is through our litigation arm, the Mississippi Justice Institute (MJI).

For decades, liberal groups such as the American Civil Liberties Union have invested a great deal of time and effort pursuing their agendas through the courts. Until recently, conservatives simply had not done the same. At most, we defended legislative victories when forced to do so, but had no legal strategy of our own to actively advance and protect liberty before the judicial branches of government.

At the Mississippi Justice Institute, we are changing that, right here in our own back yard.

---
|
---
| When people think about how to impact public policy, they tend to think about the fights in Washington D.C. or sometimes what the U.S. Supreme Court is doing. But the government entities that usually affect our daily lives the most are state agencies, licensing boards, and commissions. Too often, ordinary people who are victims of overreach by these government bodies have nowhere to turn for help.

That’s where MJI comes in. When the government is impairing our clients’ rights, and doing so in a way that violates the Constitution, we seek to have those government actions struck down. And we do it for free.

For every well-known example of government overreach at the federal level, there are countless cases at the state and local level: occupational licensing run amuck, anticompetitive business regulations, laws that trample on free speech, gun rights, and religious liberty, just to name a few. These cases require lawyers who are well versed in Mississippi’s Constitution and statutory law, and willing to persist through extensive legal battles against often intransigent administrative agencies.

We are proud to take up these legal challenges in Mississippi, and with your continued help and support, we plan to do so for many more years to come.

---
| |
---
In Liberty,

Aaron Rice
Director of MJI
---
| |
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=7caaf21c6f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=7caaf21c6f).

And now, massive amounts of Dark Money are pouring into Alaska in support of Liberal Lisa Murkowski. These outside groups are so scared that they are doing whatever it takes to destroy everything we have worked so hard to achieve. To fight back, we have decided to up our April Mid-Month goal. And to make sure we CRUSH our goal, defeat Liberal Lisa and send a message, we are calling on our finest supporters, like YOU, Peter. When we speak with Kelly tomorrow morning, we hope to let her know that YOU stepped up and helped us destroy our new April Mid-Month goal. We cannot let outside groups destroy our state or our country. Thank you, Tshibaka Finance Team STAY UP TO DATE WITH KELLY AND THE CAMPAIGN BY CLICKING THIS LINK: "ckq.io/yl3xzs" | | | | ==

subject: Response Missing: Do you support Gov. Lujan Grisham's passing of relief for New Mexico households?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
New Mexicans are facing rising prices everywhere
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44093306/340062773/-2081290588?code=jtk1230-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjAyYTFkYS00YmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gs829_LKnmTgHiZxfL8-vxD0WYryY7EVRev5hVPJYDM=&emci=bde72a00-e4b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f602a1da-4bbb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter: **New Mexicans are facing rising prices everywhere from the gas pump to the grocery store. In response, Gov. Lujan Grisham is giving up to $1,500 in household relief to 1.1 million taxpayers across the state.**
In a special session this week, Gov. Lujan Grisham called to deliver $500 to single filers and $1,000 to joint filers, distributed in two parts – one in early summer and one in August. That’s _on top_ of checks in July for taxpayers making less than $75,000 alone or $150,000 filing jointly.
**The bottom line:** Gov. Lujan Grisham is focused on moving New Mexico forward by making sure every New Mexican has the support they need to thrive.
**But all the while, New Mexico GOP leaders have made their opposition clear. They don’t support Gov. Lujan Grisham’s economic relief, and if they were in charge, New Mexicans would be getting $0.**
**In the face of the GOP’s attacks, it couldn’t be a more critical moment to hear where grassroots Democrats stand. We need another 29 responses before midnight, and yours is still missing. **
| | **_Please, respond to our poll before it closes at midnight:_**
---
**Do you support Gov. Lujan Grisham's passing of relief for New Mexico households?**
---

---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44093308/340062775/335341890?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1230-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjAyYTFkYS00YmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gs829_LKnmTgHiZxfL8-vxD0WYryY7EVRev5hVPJYDM=&emci=bde72a00-e4b9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f602a1da-4bbb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)

body:
Did you see this?
| | | Friend, While I am out on the campaign trail, people always ask me when they will see a debate between me and my opponent John Boozman. Well, we got that answer today. **Never.** John Boozman flat out said that he will NEVER debate me. _**SEE FOR YOURSELF:**_ **[WATCH THE VIDEO>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/dfcc3332287d5d13/c72b6a79b6ceba32c3d6b838967d376c/38553)** We know the truth, Boozman is _scared_. I have called him out repeatedly on his record and his anti-Trump criticisms. With so many momentous issues facing our nation right now, Arkansans deserve better – they deserve a representative who answers to them. Not someone who is too much of a coward to engage with opponents. Thank you, Jake Bequette

clean_body: Did you see this? | | | Friend, While I am out on the campaign trail, people always ask me when they will see a debate between me and my opponent John Boozman. Well, we got that answer today. Never. John Boozman flat out said that he will NEVER debate me. SEE FOR YOURSELF: We know the truth, Boozman is scared. I have called him out repeatedly on his record and his anti-Trump criticisms. With so many momentous issues facing our nation right now, Arkansans deserve better – they deserve a representative who answers to them. Not someone who is too much of a coward to engage with opponents. Thank you, Jake Bequette P.S. Help fuel my grassroots campaign to defeat the RINO John Boozman by also taking a moment to rush a donation today. id:2022-04-12-21:28:17:268t | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY BEQUETTE FOR ARKANSAS | |

| | Hi Peter, The past few weeks have made me EVEN MORE inspired to keep up the fight. And I’d love to take a moment to talk about two BIG reasons why: **First up:** I’m still not over the amazing victory of Amazon union organizers in Staten Island this month! I’ve seen firsthand in Bessemer how Amazon throws every union-busting trick in the book against workers organizing for a safer workplace and better benefits. So can we talk about how brave and awe-inspiring these Amazon workers are?! As a lifelong organizer, I couldn’t be more thrilled to see workers forming new unions across the country. It’s never gotten old — not since I organized health care workers with SEIU in Michigan when I was right out of college. Now let’s turbo-charge this labor renaissance and finally put an end to union-busting by passing the Protecting the Right to Organize Act! I was so proud to help lead our work to get that bill through the House. And I won’t stop fighting until it’s on President Biden’s desk. **Second:** President Biden heeded the call of a grassroots movement and extended the pause on student loan payments. Not-so-breaking news: Organizing works! Now, I’ll keep pressing him to use his executive authority to cancel student debt — and let’s prevent the next student debt crisis by passing my bill for free community college and two free years at Historically Black Colleges and Universities and Minority Serving Institutions. President Biden picked that bill as a featured piece of his American Families Plan. I’ll keep pushing to get it across the finish line. [_**I wake up every morning fired up to do this work, and I’m honored to fight by your side. Can you make a contribution of $10 or more (any amount helps!) to support our reelection campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44094308/340067229/478999150?refcode=em_20220413_f_a_work&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDRhZDA0Yi00ZmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6dak_lT24rV6qpbfUkeervNKlRb-LVjEF1-owOqb9M=) **We need to be able to keep fighting for progressive values in Washington, but the latest polling says I’m tied with my opponent.** As a leader in the Congressional Progressive Caucus, I’ve held the line for President Biden’s agenda. We’ve delivered results for families in Michigan and across the country. And we’re just getting started — so now’s not the time to stop our progress. From ensuring workers’ rights and to making sure higher education is affordable, so much is at stake. [_**Peter, every contribution makes a difference — because every opportunity we have to grow our team and build momentum for this race makes a difference. Please consider making a donation today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44094309/340067230/478999150?refcode=em_20220413_f_a_work&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDRhZDA0Yi00ZmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k6dak_lT24rV6qpbfUkeervNKlRb-LVjEF1-owOqb9M=) Let’s go!

name: Elizabeth
subject: Remember, Shenise Turner-Sloss?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Barrier To Entry PAC
body:
We can’t stop now, Peter! | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQTMJu9IZWurr0e1V7f1n0sODZ2FHKYLElcio5SYG9KhC0HwSvqXqszuJYgUL11SpTK6VktCdCO1xgr1ibVaks4FQOhe_ZptZY2Pt5T_OnLUIVFX-E7F_ZUJ72TvpSo_8UztbXWwO1UtbIoP0djnJJ82SZM9Emjz59TiZTERzUL99mbxdlDAdlZy21cECLklbsiuMKUn9I09vAV83TVHfLa_6YqCmUlV3vDlJR_dZmsWrR_rUt9ooULMl7z-gQDUt-PFJsavWUk_Evp63EltNHkn4uC4YqlhCKmU-eXK1DUWNYCfhw68jR11F6_ojExlAs8JLVx0cwcMrghv0K09rpbruZo-hc-mdBMoxS2TbpYJjrHLaYd-FgM-jnhkfwPvE/3l6/Rz0SRFsdRcuPXcHrOtFtKA/h0/mcTJLcRZTNgy3RFabWxizxOfFU8YbWPfZkQfw2NEKsc) Hey Peter

Do you remember our **victorious** Dayton City Commission candidate, Shenise Turner-Sloss? Do you remember when she crushed an entrenched, endorsed slate of bad Democrats in 2021? Do you ever wonder what she is up to now?

We have answers to your questions!

Back when Shenise was in the final stretch of her campaign she faced racist attacks from the Democratic establishment through a series of mailers that went out to voters. The local Democratic Party claimed that Shenise would make the community unsafe. **It was a disgusting, shameful smear campaign.**

We are so proud to share that she used this negative experience to fuel her fight for justice and equality in Dayton and beyond.

Shenise is fighting hard for issues like equitable community safety practices and criminal justice reform, small business growth, and socioeconomic equality — issues that the Dayton Democratic Establishment has long forgotten.

Since being elected back in November, we can proudly say Shenise has kept her campaign promise of being a voice for the __people__ , not the political elite.

It is not easy to reverse problems that have been rooted in Dayton for years. Like so many other places in our country, Dayton struggles with racist city planning practices that create barriers for working families who rely on public transportation and other important services that are less available for poor, Black, and brown communities.

Shenise has been working towards _breaking barriers_ for underpaid workers and families in Dayton. Within just a few months...

\- Shenise was publicly acknowledged by the local fire department for working independently of the local Democratic party to advocate for Fire Fighter Cancer Claims

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQTMJu9IZWurr0e1V7f1n0sODZ2FHKYLElcio5SYG9KhC0HwSvqXqszuJYgUL11SpTK6VktCdCO1xgr1ibVaksua8p8eVD44isSeb83mz1ADJS7Lu_GZeEHUzDLJHXMQxJU8628pRgaq__NADhtVftWgqLY0qlvghNJAZTBEVPlNEtfY39SSbSQbn3IJ_NeAV02Y4-fOpylyhsKKcAprzCd4lR6JKWqAWcLV2WU8SJRZmSa58WZk4QVAHdNTeyybf8Y2LNQQMbxFzVnYdTn15Iaya5lg1oNAnj2ivgsbaug29LLzkjNksbxlSJTQxrStCGn8HzZ5ykILEyNr7fMtwl9RNGrtQF_1iQ-YApZwtbHz064_Yzd7uE-up4lVndnbk/3l6/Rz0SRFsdRcuPXcHrOtFtKA/h1/uFoQOiW6uxxNP_oeezgjK_sVrlP6QdL7io6Fe4Umlrs)

\- Shenise is leading the charge towards reducing fares and increasing routes with the Regional Transit Authority _while establishment officials do the opposite_

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQTMJu9IZWurr0e1V7f1n0sODZ2FHKYLElcio5SYG9KhC0HwSvqXqszuJYgUL11SpTK6VktCdCO1xgr1ibVaks-qwz8i7azdjp4Wg-QzU-CzxjnT7nPD1Mhv48n2TYXgJBxalHH8YTTvzcb1YaIofEgnWTMdkkAQCVQfnOuL0XBkdoILftXGnBH_kRFEr99vpfV0IWlcymjfRzmC6jbH4wsS0ouCVqsYkgQAlofQyzq8nieLSZfWxMj6KnvRpqx-_sYSxOZ5mRVvuCqB_PON7Pd92SApyxOxbUVrv-BS65ACRHjUafld7cVGr6b695Lk3JEy_w2ifiGTI41wSBbwdXDzO7aSW-1BcYAwmn1YXpHZ_Cq3TNFUlYPieeOJeON4s/3l6/Rz0SRFsdRcuPXcHrOtFtKA/h2/8nQQY-WaPpkXrOMaKCiaQZc5xFezUAZgTvoreFw8R2o)

\- She is bringing attention to the eviction problem in Dayton and advocating for housing rights for Daytonians

\- She is a loud proponent of criminal justice reform and a strong advocate for police accountability measures

\- AND Shenise continues to organize her community to fight dangerous legislation like House bill 454 which puts transgender individuals in danger

BTE PAC is proud that she was one of our first endorsed candidates. We continue to stand by individuals like Shenise Turner-Sloss who are willing to go against the grain to do right by their communities.

Team BTE, can you rush a contribution to make sure that more people like Shenise Turner-Sloss get elected? If we don’t have grassroots support, we can’t continue to help candidates break barriers and get elected to office. Will you pitch in now?

**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC** supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space.

clean_body: We can’t stop now, Peter! | | | Hey Peter Do you remember our victorious Dayton City Commission candidate, Shenise Turner-Sloss? Do you remember when she crushed an entrenched, endorsed slate of bad Democrats in 2021? Do you ever wonder what she is up to now? We have answers to your questions! Back when Shenise was in the final stretch of her campaign she faced racist attacks from the Democratic establishment through a series of mailers that went out to voters. The local Democratic Party claimed that Shenise would make the community unsafe. It was a disgusting, shameful smear campaign. We are so proud to share that she used this negative experience to fuel her fight for justice and equality in Dayton and beyond. Shenise is fighting hard for issues like equitable community safety practices and criminal justice reform, small business growth, and socioeconomic equality — issues that the Dayton Democratic Establishment has long forgotten. Since being elected back in November, we can proudly say Shenise has kept her campaign promise of being a voice for the people , not the political elite. It is not easy to reverse problems that have been rooted in Dayton for years. Like so many other places in our country, Dayton struggles with racist city planning practices that create barriers for working families who rely on public transportation and other important services that are less available for poor, Black, and brown communities. Shenise has been working towards breaking barriers for underpaid workers and families in Dayton. Within just a few months... \- Shenise was publicly acknowledged by the local fire department for working independently of the local Democratic party to advocate for Fire Fighter Cancer Claims \- Shenise is leading the charge towards reducing fares and increasing routes with the Regional Transit Authority while establishment officials do the opposite \- She is bringing attention to the eviction problem in Dayton and advocating for housing rights for Daytonians \- She is a loud proponent of criminal justice reform and a strong advocate for police accountability measures \- AND Shenise continues to organize her community to fight dangerous legislation like House bill 454 which puts transgender individuals in danger BTE PAC is proud that she was one of our first endorsed candidates. We continue to stand by individuals like Shenise Turner-Sloss who are willing to go against the grain to do right by their communities. Team BTE, can you rush a contribution to make sure that more people like Shenise Turner-Sloss get elected? If we don’t have grassroots support, we can’t continue to help candidates break barriers and get elected to office. Will you pitch in now? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through instantly: | ****************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** ---|--- **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** Thank you team, Elizabeth (Digital Strategist, BTE) EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier To Entry PAC: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: ****************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >> __ P.O. name: Joe Cunningham
subject: Elected officials like McMaster aren’t working for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina
body:
| I get it. People are sick and tired of politics. The current political system in places like South Carolina isn’t working for the people. Lack of rural healthcare and wifi access, teacher shortages... It doesn't seem like our elected officials like McMaster are taking action to solve them.

That’s something that can easily change if I win this race. I would veto bills that won’t help South Carolinians, like anti-choice legislation, while pushing ahead with work to solve some of our biggest issues.

**Look: If McMaster was the coach of the Gamecocks or Tigers he would’ve been fired decades ago — but we’re 40 seasons in with McMaster. Now, we have a chance to finally fire him and make sure we avoid losing anymore seasons.**

McMaster is reporting a HUGE fundraising haul from quarter one, but one that we can compete with if we don’t let up for a second.

**[This is a make-or-break moment and we have to show strength after his fundraising report. body:

| Peter-
Remember this?
"No more drilling including offshore. No ability for the oil industry to continue to drill period. It ends."
Guess who said this nonsense. That's right: Joe Biden. This is the promise he made on the campaign trail when he was running for President - that he would destroy the American energy industry.
Well, that's one campaign promise Joe Biden has kept.
With the help of Nancy Pelosi and her caucus of radical environmentalists in Congress, Joe Biden has crippled American oil and gas.
Joe Biden canceled the Keystone Pipeline before approving a Russian pipeline (the same Russian pipeline that President Trump tried to stop). Joe Biden banned oil and gas leases. Joe Biden pressured financial regulators to punish investors who dared to finance new oil and gas projects.
What have we seen as a result? The highest gas prices in years, unaffordable energy costs, and American energy dominance taking a back seat to the left's radical environmentalist agenda.
Joe Biden created this disaster. But instead of just complaining about it, we need to do something about it.
We need to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi, the Senate from Chuck Schumer, and the White House from Joe and Kamala. I'm going to devote my time and campaign money to flip Democrat seats across the country to take back the House and give Republicans a strong, governing majority that stands up for AMERICAN ENERGY DOMINANCE.
You can help me by donating to my campaign [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hkYQLDf61YJWWo-RyHOT6FIljd9g9S5dXxVE8DmjKszurSyp-h7RuX5O3wkqT5hIoDXrhkbsWh_6idUctklBBPJP5xlRCo_dOLgtLczQZyKhJ5PD9cNL823que2DzZNF_1l7lA9iTnCpp2Vxdp2L6fPBJQaMFvqwdbiECVd4wNcCJTo5sphBMVSjKH13ttVmRCfriWo0qw8VFqJlWA5-1M1qQ1Qy1PAvmABQNXkhpQ7OGBgrUzSGNCjfh0qmNda-wyDKpv3Q9VArQo991Z4OoZ7d-bqvc8DamUjyJop7gpDLupxbJKaZ95j5LCrzLcZhI0rvt3B7Fi2dh44ktaRHVje3hFUoRbhJgXMHQd6KrL8=&c=3meom9n42_i2aUHLEx6ey7eU8XBqeSPMRQc065rbd6zLPLneLb3x5Q==&ch=k4I1Yg08TkQKSm2LzTpMrYVsr__zMoQBs7Ud5xvXUGoHTU1pACFK4A==).
But there's another way you can help. You can sign the petition below telling Joe Biden to take action on the following policies:

name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220412wu?refcode=lpfe220412wu_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220412wu?refcode=lpfe220412wu_m]
Friend,
Great news this week, the Feminist Majority endorsed Lizzie for re-election!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220412wu?refcode=lpfe220412wu_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220412wu?refcode=lpfe220412wu_m]
Lizzie is a proven champion for women’s rights and equality in Congress. She’s fighting for legislation that would codify Roe v. Wade and protect reproductive rights, pave the way for the Equal Rights Amendment to become the law of the land, and secure equal pay for equal work.
A member of the Pro-Choice Caucus, Lizzie led an effort to recognize and honor women leaders of the reproductive rights and justice movement and call attention to the fight to defend and expand access to reproductive health care.
That fight is more urgent than ever in the wake of Texas’ S.B. 8 and Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization , a case now before the Supreme Court concerning Mississippi’s 15-week abortion ban that threatens the future of Roe v. Wade and reproductive rights in our country.
Texas has been at the forefront of bad legislation, and over the last week, we have seen the extreme and dangerous outcome of these efforts.
If you didn’t see the news, you must know that a Texas woman was charged for murder for a “self-induced abortion” in South Texas last week. The facts surrounding this outrageous charge are still emerging, but we know from public statements that a hospital reported a woman who came in seeking care and that a district attorney went before a grand jury to indict a woman for murder for it. While the Starr County District Attorney has now dismissed the charge, this aggressive prosecution is an outrage, and a sign of what is to come in Texas and elsewhere if Roe is overturned.
There is no other way: We must focus on electing pro-choice champions at every level of government and fighting with everything we have to protect Roe and safe, accessible reproductive health care, including abortion care.
As Justice Ginsburg said, “Women belong everywhere decisions are being made.” Lizzie joined colleagues recently in voting to honor late Supreme Court justices Sandra Day O’Connor and Ruth Bader Ginsburg, the first and second women to serve on the highest court in our country, with statues in the U.S. Capitol. And it is particularly fitting as we celebrate the confirmation of Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, the first Black woman nominated to serve on the court.
We have much work ahead of us, but building on the work of women who have fought for our rights for years, and with the support of allies like the Feminist Majority, we are confident in what our team can accomplish together.
Thank you for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220412wu?refcode=lpfe220412wu_m]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

Democrats could take the Senate this November

Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. He’s dedicated to lowering costs for mid-Michigan families on things like prescription drugs, gas, and more. Not only that, but he recently secured federal funding for local economic development projects in our community — including projects that will provide affordable housing for veterans, clean up blight and fund after school programs. Dan’s fighting for us, something that we can’t say about his opponents. But with already three opponents getting into this race against Dan, now is not the time to be complacent. Because of redistricting, Dan’s race is one of the most competitive races in the entire country, so we’ve got to step up and build a winning campaign. = — Team Kildee Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. The fear of Republican attacks and how they might twist whatever policy Democrats propose, no matter how popular, to suit their baseless culture war narrative is no doubt a huge part of this. That fear drives us away from the values that have always really mattered to Democrats: a fair shot for everyone, fixing rampant inequality, protecting the planet, standing up for workers, and more.
**Democrats cannot be afraid — and I'm not afraid.** We have to stand up for Democratic values, and we can't shy away from the important fights.
When we fight unabashedly for what real Democrats want, not corporate-backed establishment figures who sell out their votes to the highest bidder, we turn out — and _we win_.

clean_body: | | | | I've said it again and again, Peter Willis: This race isn't about just electing a Democrat. Our campaign for NY-03 is about electing a representative who will fight relentlessly for you, your children, and your grandchildren. It's about choosing who you believe will fight for you when no one else in the room will. Because let’s face it: establishment Democrats, time and time again when push comes to shove and the stakes are highest, have failed to deliver for working people. The fear of Republican attacks and how they might twist whatever policy Democrats propose, no matter how popular, to suit their baseless culture war narrative is no doubt a huge part of this. That fear drives us away from the values that have always really mattered to Democrats: a fair shot for everyone, fixing rampant inequality, protecting the planet, standing up for workers, and more. Democrats cannot be afraid — and I'm not afraid. We have to stand up for Democratic values, and we can't shy away from the important fights. When we fight unabashedly for what real Democrats want, not corporate-backed establishment figures who sell out their votes to the highest bidder, we turn out — and we win. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thank you for building with me, Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Transparency, Accountability, Debate
body:
Every county in CD7 deserves a debate
---
| | | | | | Volume 37 | April 13, 2022
---
|
---
| Let's debate in each county
---
| | |
---|---
|
Anyone who knows me knows I'm pretty straight forward.

I don't believe we should ever portray ourselves as anything other than who we are, which is why I'm such a supporter of transparency and accountability in the political realm.

I will never go to Washington and play politics; the candidate you see in Colorado is the same Congressman you will see in DC.

I also believe it's important for voters to truly get to know their candidates, to confidently know that the person they are voting for will never stray from the platforms they say they support.

This is why I'm calling on all CD7 congressional candidates to a debate in each county represented by this district!

Our constituents deserve the right to hear each of us firmly support our platforms and answer questions which may not be easy, but are absolutely necessary. We all need to be transparent and held accountable when it comes to issues that impact Colorado residents. I hope my competitors feel the same and agree to debate.

I personally look forward to seeing all CD7 congressional candidates on the stage!
|
---
| | |
---
| | | [Send Erik your Feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dnDeNYncu68GllqSNibLmh6GBhMtkqPE1dAKTzIW_LnfYmRmGeqfgmmHCOWHhjU12mi1eQsJyDbRIcH9WOSqGGnaiz2TDnnovr5LgmyUBIoO5c9vEhHvCZybe6ojtbNPcb5_V_o_4QUW7EaYUQACDWb5RsLEu8K8DWD9kYDn184wA-FQVC4cdkatB88CX6qY8lz1sbIvy5S9vLWlAlFEUrciVvgPnnqg0F_AViyV6mkilluLb5gR57X2wmutHi1iw09tIDOzlZM=&c=WUHJdSjoo5DxuIo3O2lbv-jAikjbnzyJiT4vFYqh4XdkDc5dRotrog==&ch=akK3p4hkoodTAp1YOoFqhTjTFiTJC0yBjUtUIjEqwDYUKXPwhxNnJg==)
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
The Assembly this past Friday in Colorado Springs was an absolute success for Erik and Team Aadland!

Erik is on the ballot!!

Over sixty volunteers and supporters wearing Aadland for Congress T-Shirts joined Erik at the front of the assembly hall for his address to the Delegates.

The Delegates rewarded Erik's efforts in this campaign with over 63% of the vote AND...the top spot on June's Primary Ballot! The crowd erupted in cheers on announcement of the tally, and congratulations began rolling in almost immediately!

On Saturday, Team Aadland manned a table at the State Assembly. Although Erik was not on any ballots for the day, there was a steady stream of well-wishers and folks bolstered by the news of Erik's landslide showing at Friday's vote.

After a wild weekend at the Assemblies, Erik and Team Aadland took a few short breaths, and have begun the push for the Primary Election in June.

Erik appeared on Dan Caplis' radio show on Monday this week and was met with warm congratulations from the host and listeners.

Tuesday, Erik joined the others contending for the CD7 seat, in Teller County at the Teller County Republicans debate. Erik was enthusiastically received by the crowd of around 60 constituents and county officers. His vision and dedication to root out corruption excited the crowd, and a strong distinction from the other candidates was apparent.

Radio and personal appearances will continue as we head toward June's plebiscite, alongside volunteers canvassing neighborhoods and many other activities to insure victory in the Primary.

clean_body: Every county in CD7 deserves a debate | | | | | | Volume 37 | April 13, 2022 | | Let's debate in each county | | | ---|--- | Anyone who knows me knows I'm pretty straight forward. I don't believe we should ever portray ourselves as anything other than who we are, which is why I'm such a supporter of transparency and accountability in the political realm. I will never go to Washington and play politics; the candidate you see in Colorado is the same Congressman you will see in DC. I also believe it's important for voters to truly get to know their candidates, to confidently know that the person they are voting for will never stray from the platforms they say they support. This is why I'm calling on all CD7 congressional candidates to a debate in each county represented by this district! Our constituents deserve the right to hear each of us firmly support our platforms and answer questions which may not be easy, but are absolutely necessary. We all need to be transparent and held accountable when it comes to issues that impact Colorado residents. I hope my competitors feel the same and agree to debate. I personally look forward to seeing all CD7 congressional candidates on the stage! | | | | | | | == | | | | Campaign Update | | ---|--- | The Assembly this past Friday in Colorado Springs was an absolute success for Erik and Team Aadland! Erik is on the ballot!! Over sixty volunteers and supporters wearing Aadland for Congress T-Shirts joined Erik at the front of the assembly hall for his address to the Delegates. The Delegates rewarded Erik's efforts in this campaign with over 63% of the vote AND...the top spot on June's Primary Ballot! The crowd erupted in cheers on announcement of the tally, and congratulations began rolling in almost immediately! On Saturday, Team Aadland manned a table at the State Assembly. Although Erik was not on any ballots for the day, there was a steady stream of well-wishers and folks bolstered by the news of Erik's landslide showing at Friday's vote. After a wild weekend at the Assemblies, Erik and Team Aadland took a few short breaths, and have begun the push for the Primary Election in June. Erik appeared on Dan Caplis' radio show on Monday this week and was met with warm congratulations from the host and listeners. Tuesday, Erik joined the others contending for the CD7 seat, in Teller County at the Teller County Republicans debate. Erik was enthusiastically received by the crowd of around 60 constituents and county officers. His vision and dedication to root out corruption excited the crowd, and a strong distinction from the other candidates was apparent. Radio and personal appearances will continue as we head toward June's plebiscite, alongside volunteers canvassing neighborhoods and many other activities to insure victory in the Primary. | | | If you may be interested in an Area Coordinator opportunity with Erik's campaign, use the link below to send your information, or contact mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com | | | == | | | | Quote of The Week "If freedom doesn't start at the boundary of my skin, then I have no freedom." \- Erik Aadland on mandated vaccination | A True Grass-Roots Campaign | Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today. Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff | | | | == | Upcoming Events | Leland Conway Radio Show Wednesday Apr 13th 3:00PM Erik will talk with Leland Conway on his acclaimed radio show "Uncommon Sense". Tune your AM radio to 630 KHOW this afternoon, or click the button below for the online stream. | | == | | | Park County Republican Committee Wednesday Apr 13th 7:00PM Erik will speak to the Park County Republican Central Committee tonight at 7:00PM. This is a free event, but please RSVP at the link below to make sure you have a seat. Come to the Fairplay Barn at Park County Fairgrounds Tonight! The Fairplay Barn is at 880 Bogue Street in Fariplay | | | Foothills Republican Club Thursday Apr 14th 5:30PM The Foothills Republican Club will hold a Gubernatorial Debate Thursday. The match begins at 5:30 at the Jefferson County GOP Headquarters in Lakewood. The Jefferson County GOP headquarters is at 13952 Denver West Pkwy Bldg 53 Suite 450 in Lakewood | | | Brendan Anti "All Ears Podcast" Tuesday Apr 19th 4:00PM Brendan Anti will interview Erik on his candidate-focused podcast forum. If it's supporting someone who isn’t afraid to take on bullies and fight for the little guy – whether it was challenging Donald Trump’s Muslim Ban in the Supreme Court, or stopping huge cable company mergers and fighting corporate greed, then = There are a lot of reasons to invest in Josh’s campaign for Upstate New York — and these are just a few — but whatever your reason is, our campaign could use your support today, Peter. = | | | = | = | = Let’s win this thing! Fellow activist,

May 2 is getting closer and closer. While we’re knocking on as many doors as possible, we need to expand our efforts and pack as many community events, canvasses, and phone banks into these next two weeks as possible.

But that means we need funding. Now more than ever, we rely on grassroots donors like you to chip in whatever you can to help us hit our goal of $1,000 by midnight tonight. It’s ambitious, but we can do it with you on our side. After all, our democracy is on the line. **[Will you be one of the 100 donors we need to make a $10 donation by midnight tonight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44095248/340071505/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220413VoterReg2_VR_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5YjVmMjhiLTUzYmItZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W5HLM8UYgVudONwKcvnR7WStG26O-uK9oPGGSDXdbrA=)**
**[DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44095251/340071540/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220413VoterReg2_VR_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_N_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5YjVmMjhiLTUzYmItZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W5HLM8UYgVudONwKcvnR7WStG26O-uK9oPGGSDXdbrA=) **
We know and have witnessed the ways in which underrepresented and often neglected communities of color and immigrant communities have been denied the fundamental right to vote. When our democracy and our voting rights are under a sustained attack, our work is more vital than ever before. No matter the challenges, we must engage and empower Black, brown, and young voters because those communities are being left out of the democratic process.

**[Stand with our cause of registering as many voters as possible by May 2. Your contribution of any amount stands in solidarity with our mission to fight for our democracy and expand the electorate.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44095254/340071544/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220413VoterReg2_VR_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5YjVmMjhiLTUzYmItZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W5HLM8UYgVudONwKcvnR7WStG26O-uK9oPGGSDXdbrA=)**

In solidarity,

Team NPP
_The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election._ **_[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44095255/340071574/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220413VoterReg2_VR_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_N_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5YjVmMjhiLTUzYmItZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W5HLM8UYgVudONwKcvnR7WStG26O-uK9oPGGSDXdbrA=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44095257/340071578/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220413VoterReg2_VR_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_N_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5YjVmMjhiLTUzYmItZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W5HLM8UYgVudONwKcvnR7WStG26O-uK9oPGGSDXdbrA=)**_**

clean_body: Our team needs to register as many voters as possible by May 2. Our team needs to register as many voters as possible by May 2. = Fellow activist, May 2 is getting closer and closer. While we’re knocking on as many doors as possible, we need to expand our efforts and pack as many community events, canvasses, and phone banks into these next two weeks as possible. But that means we need funding. Now more than ever, we rely on grassroots donors like you to chip in whatever you can to help us hit our goal of $1,000 by midnight tonight. It’s ambitious, but we can do it with you on our side. After all, our democracy is on the line. = = We know and have witnessed the ways in which underrepresented and often neglected communities of color and immigrant communities have been denied the fundamental right to vote. When our democracy and our voting rights are under a sustained attack, our work is more vital than ever before. No matter the challenges, we must engage and empower Black, brown, and young voters because those communities are being left out of the democratic process. = In solidarity, Team NPP The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election. = **PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 17, 2022 GENERAL: November 8, 2022 || || || New Pennsylvania Project 717 Market Street #295 Lemoyne, PA 17043 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. We need your help achieving _**today's mission: relief for struggling Americans!**_ In Maryland, Governor Hogan passed the largest tax cuts in the state's history for two years in a row, and he did so in a deep blue state. This is because he approached it with bipartisan compromise and transparency. Washington must follow Governor Hogan's lead if we hope to fight back against _**rising costs from groceries to gas!**_ [**Today, we are asking for your help to promote common sense steps to deliver relief for struggling families, smarter policy, and reach Americans from shore to shore. clean_body: Americans are hungry for leadership Hello, Governor Larry Hogan and An America United have teamed up to demand common sense leadership for America. We need your help achieving today's mission: relief for struggling Americans! In Maryland, Governor Hogan passed the largest tax cuts in the state's history for two years in a row, and he did so in a deep blue state. This is because he approached it with bipartisan compromise and transparency. Washington must follow Governor Hogan's lead if we hope to fight back against rising costs from groceries to gas! Grassroots Support ☟ Or Fund Outreach Programs ☟ As we approach April 15th, the most reviled and feared date on the calendars of struggling Americans this year, For Governor Hogan, it is worth tax cuts for hard-working people. For AAU, it's worth finding bipartisan consensus on the issues that affect most Americans. And for you, we hope— Thank you, An America United [[Support Our Mission Now]]() Join An America United on social media! | | | ---|--- Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

name: Morgan Harper Volunteer Alert
subject: *Nudge* open for ways to get involved
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220413-904-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=904%2E90090%2ExCUlWq ]Morgan Harper

Hey 👋 —

Welcome to the Morganizing community digest. ✨This is a newsletter where
we’ll share ways that you can get involved in your community.

We hope you’ll enjoy these opportunities to get involved and help build a
strong grassroots movement to send Morgan to the U.S. Senate!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Cresco Community Opportunities:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

— Canvasses near you 📋 —

We are knocking doors across the state to identify Morgan supporters, and
talk to undecided Democratic voters about the issues that matter most to
them and why Morgan is the best person to represent them in the U.S.
Senate. Closer to the election, we’ll also be reaching back out to
supporters to make sure they have a plan to vote! [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/21440?refcode=em20220413-904&t=1003&akid=904%2E90090%2ExCUlWq ]If you would like to
get involved with this effort or learn more, please click here to find
canvasses happening near you.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/21440?refcode=em20220413-904&t=1004&akid=904%2E90090%2ExCUlWq ]Sign up here »

— Other volunteer opportunities 🗂️ —

If there isn’t a canvass happening near you, please consider hosting a
canvass in your community or volunteering in another way! Regardless of
your location or experience level, we have plenty of ways that you can
support the campaign by volunteering – including opportunities to
volunteer remotely. [ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer/?refcode=em20220413-904&t=1005&akid=904%2E90090%2ExCUlWq ]Click here to fill out our volunteer form and we’ll
reach out to you with more information.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer/?refcode=em20220413-904&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=904%2E90090%2ExCUlWq ]Sign up here »

— Voter registration 🗳️ —

We
wanted to make sure you’re aware that the last day to register to vote in
the primary election in Ohio is April 4th. [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29354?t=1007&akid=904%2E90090%2ExCUlWq ]Early voting then starts on
April 5th. Please click here to register to vote.

Register to vote »

Thank you for everything you do,

Team Morganize

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Did you enjoy this newsletter? Please consider forwarding it to a friend
or sharing it on social media. That way even more people can find out
about Morgan’s progressive campaign for U.S. Senate and get involved. We
really appreciate your support! 🥰

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. To remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1008&akid=904%2E90090%2ExCUlWq

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio.

name: Shontel Brown (personal)
subject: We’ve got to give it our all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
The clock is ticking on tonight’s FEC filing
Peter,

Tonight’s FEC deadline is only hours away, and right now, we’re still $1,104 away from our $2,500 goal.

May’s primary is right around the corner, and it’s extremely important that we pull together and show up strong before the clock strikes twelve. Grassroots supporters like you are the backbone of our campaign, and we’re depending on you to help us get over the finish line.

[**_This is our moment to show Ohio what we’re made of. Will you pitch in $5 right now and help us close the gap on our $2,500 goal before midnight tonight?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44103725/340111452/1518040290?refcode=EM_FR_220413PrePrimary2_EOQ_SB_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDhjOTMyNi03N2JiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CAF6yFLMJOT_Yloxq3_6-gAxjc-e6yf1Qpj1d4bOW8=)

[**_We’re in the final moments before tonight’s deadline, and as we head into the final push, I need to know that you are with me. | Peter,

Earlier this month, the House passed the historic Affordable Insulin Now Act. **I was proud to vote in favor of this legislation, which would cap the monthly out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35.**

If passed through the Senate, this historic legislation will be life-changing for millions of Americans, including folks right here in the district. While we celebrate this milestone, we must also recognize how much more needs to be done to lower the cost of life-saving medication.

[_**Can I count on you to chip in $5 today to ensure I have the resources to keep fighting for affordable medication for all Americans?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44103838/340112046/278639227?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220413-1b-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMwN2NkOS03OGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=btsrT23C-T6IPgKrM-yDkPp1hRB2P_TSekZR0WBYtHQ=)

Congress has the power to stand up to the pharmaceutical industry and put caps on the cost of life-saving medications — but it will never happen if we lose our Democratic majority in the House.
