clean_body: There’s a simple solution: give Medicare the power to negotiate prescription drug prices. | = | Peter, Earlier this month, the House passed the historic Affordable Insulin Now Act. I was proud to vote in favor of this legislation, which would cap the monthly out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35. If passed through the Senate, this historic legislation will be life-changing for millions of Americans, including folks right here in the district. While we celebrate this milestone, we must also recognize how much more needs to be done to lower the cost of life-saving medication. = | = There’s a simple solution: give Medicare the power to negotiate prescription drug prices. Congress has the power to stand up to the pharmaceutical industry and put caps on the cost of life-saving medications — but it will never happen if we lose our Democratic majority in the House. If we lose here in PA-07, we have no chance of keeping the House blue and continuing to advocate for American families and workers. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Looking forward to making a difference together, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Tobias Read
subject: Elliott Forest is official!
body:
When I became State Treasurer, the Elliott Forest was supposed to generate funds for the School Fund. Instead, it was losing money for our schools.
---
| | Dear Peter, Today the Governor signed into law the new framework for the Elliott State Forest, creating the largest research forest in the country and paving the way for new partnerships and new opportunities for this precious state resource. **This is the result of more than three years of hard work by a coalition of state leaders, industry groups, environmentalists, tribal leaders, and researchers.** When I became State Treasurer, the Elliott Forest was supposed to generate funds for the School Fund. Instead, it was losing money for our schools. I proposed that we could simultaneously conserve the forest and stop losing money for our schools, and today I’m proud that our coalition has seen it done. My friend Congressman DeFazio had this to say: “I applaud the State Land Board and the Elliott State Research Forest Advisory Committee for coming together to resolve a decades-old conflict affecting Southern Oregon, and establishing the Elliott State Research Forest. **I particularly want to commend State Treasurer Tobias Read and his office for their leadership. It was under his leadership that Oregonians came together and found consensus.”** To me the most important part of all this is that we were able to build consensus even between deeply divided groups. I’m proud of that, and I intend to follow this example as your next Governor. **We _can_ still come together and get things done.** Thanks for all that you do,

---

---

clean_body: When I became State Treasurer, the Elliott Forest was supposed to generate funds for the School Fund. Instead, it was losing money for our schools. | | Dear Peter, Today the Governor signed into law the new framework for the Elliott State Forest, creating the largest research forest in the country and paving the way for new partnerships and new opportunities for this precious state resource. This is the result of more than three years of hard work by a coalition of state leaders, industry groups, environmentalists, tribal leaders, and researchers. When I became State Treasurer, the Elliott Forest was supposed to generate funds for the School Fund. Instead, it was losing money for our schools. I proposed that we could simultaneously conserve the forest and stop losing money for our schools, and today I’m proud that our coalition has seen it done. My friend Congressman DeFazio had this to say: “I applaud the State Land Board and the Elliott State Research Forest Advisory Committee for coming together to resolve a decades-old conflict affecting Southern Oregon, and establishing the Elliott State Research Forest. I particularly want to commend State Treasurer Tobias Read and his office for their leadership. It was under his leadership that Oregonians came together and found consensus.” To me the most important part of all this is that we were able to build consensus even between deeply divided groups. I’m proud of that, and I intend to follow this example as your next Governor. We can still come together and get things done. Thanks for all that you do, * | = | | | | | | | | | Friends of Tobias Read PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States

| Peter, I’d first like to say how appreciative I am of your support throughout the last week. Thanks to supporters like you, our campaign just did something I’m so incredibly proud of: **today we’re on the air with our very first TV ads.**

The best part? We didn’t just launch one. We launched TWO ads highlighting my family history in Maryland and how public schools literally saved my life after my parents passed away when I was a kid. [Both ads share my vision to build a more equitable Maryland. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44104151/340112971/-301395487?source=email-ngp-20220413-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&refcode=email-ngp-20220413-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&utm_campaign=20220413&utm_content=b2_fr_full&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&amount=25&refcode2=d569203e-79bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTY5MjAzZS03OWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KEg2fNosf3a5a7SmkepTNZYAkMVEpJuKxeBfJu4GX4g=)_**[I hope you’ll take a minute to take a look – and if you can, pitch in to help us keep them on the air.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44104152/340112972/-301395487?source=email-ngp-20220413-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&refcode=email-ngp-20220413-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&utm_campaign=20220413&utm_content=b2_fr_full&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&amount=25&refcode2=d569203e-79bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTY5MjAzZS03OWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KEg2fNosf3a5a7SmkepTNZYAkMVEpJuKxeBfJu4GX4g=)**_

The first ad, “Three Generations,” tells the story of how my family went from being enslaved in a cabin in Gaithersburg to serving in the cabinet of the first Black president and why my story of generational progress has shaped my vision to guarantee opportunities for all Marylanders.

In our second ad, “Education is the Difference,” I share how public school saved my life after my parents passed away when I was a kid and how, as a public school parent, I understand the supports Maryland families, students, and educators need to not just to survive, but to thrive after two very difficult years.

**Both ads make clear that, as governor, I will work to ensure every Marylander has access to the same opportunities that public institutions afforded to me. And I will make it my mission to lead state government as a true transformative force for good.**

However, in order to fully fund and share these ads as widely as possible, we need your help to keep them on the air. _**[Will you contribute $500, $50, $5, or whatever amount works for your budget now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44104157/340112977/-301395487?source=email-ngp-20220413-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&refcode=email-ngp-20220413-b2_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&utm_campaign=20220413&utm_content=b2_fr_full&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&amount=25&refcode2=d569203e-79bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTY5MjAzZS03OWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KEg2fNosf3a5a7SmkepTNZYAkMVEpJuKxeBfJu4GX4g=)**_

clean_body: Today we’re on the air with our very first TV ads. | = | Peter, I’d first like to say how appreciative I am of your support throughout the last week. Thanks to supporters like you, our campaign just did something I’m so incredibly proud of: today we’re on the air with our very first TV ads. The best part? We didn’t just launch one. We launched TWO ads highlighting my family history in Maryland and how public schools literally saved my life after my parents passed away when I was a kid. = = | = = | = The first ad, “Three Generations,” tells the story of how my family went from being enslaved in a cabin in Gaithersburg to serving in the cabinet of the first Black president and why my story of generational progress has shaped my vision to guarantee opportunities for all Marylanders. In our second ad, “Education is the Difference,” I share how public school saved my life after my parents passed away when I was a kid and how, as a public school parent, I understand the supports Maryland families, students, and educators need to not just to survive, but to thrive after two very difficult years. Both ads make clear that, as governor, I will work to ensure every Marylander has access to the same opportunities that public institutions afforded to me. And I will make it my mission to lead state government as a true transformative force for good. However, in order to fully fund and share these ads as widely as possible, we need your help to keep them on the air. = | = The success of these ads is absolutely crucial because they function as a direct line of communication to key Maryland voters. People are living their day-to-day lives and might not know there's a gubernatorial election this year – that's why it's so important that we spread the word and share our vision for Maryland’s future. I promise anything you can contribute today will be a worthwhile investment, and every single dollar will directly translate to helping us stay up on TV for that much longer which allows us to reach even more folks. = | | = I know that together, we can spread the word and bring our campaign’s vision for a more prosperous and just state to life. With gratitude, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring text messages from John King for Governor. Message & Data Rates May Apply. Text HELP for Info. Text STOP to opt out. | | | Friend, ******Let’s look at the facts: according to the latest numbers,****_63% of Americans_****disapprove of Joe Biden’s handling of the economy.** This shouldn’t come as a surprise. The out-of-control spending of his administration and Congressional Democrats is the reason for higher costs on _EVERYTHING... including record high gas prices!_ But apparently Biden hasn’t taken the hint - because right now, he’s floating EVEN MORE of the tax-and-spend in his new budget proposal. Since we can bet his allies like Maggie Hassan will go right along with this scheme, _[it’s up to conservative movements like OURS to speak out!>>](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI3Njc5ODIwODM0MDE5NTI1JmM9bjdrMiZlPTAmYj05NTY1OTA1MTImZD12M20wdTN4.5bLdDJqs61dSNNFWaFnUOy5-UZ7cvs-surlAeFGOVkg)_ **Will you do so by signing on to the petition below and saying “NO” to new taxes from the Washington Democrats??****__**

|

Good evening from the Gibbons campaign!
It's hard to believe we are down to the last 20 days of the primary campaign. This is an exciting time for us as we maintain a strong lead ahead of our opponents.
DON'T FORGET - EARLY VOTING HAS STARTED! Head to your local voting location today and vote Mike Gibbons for U.S. Senate.
I'm very happy to share that Congresswoman Kat Cammack (R-FL) has [endorsed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xXI03xb6KksBot-_jV2eYtdkXvRCLBMA63w4-WTAgMlF7xOtOwezU2OKc810So0r5OqqTbBuJ7yR6QPyYwyHl00UmybBHOohdgkjR6eQc542tFeGLg_Nei6-7rhMLWgKuecMs6NspfaCoKc337ubSiCnCzb_jVjAYRcHShJZXS8vvdOlMCogCl9CnXB51KMum6autczjkLJd4tufduiqAC0yHqKY_271r7rVJYBgRYcsLxLKHirGtB7DvOjIqetO&c=R1EFgo0jgA-yQ9H2g8LVTb-iyAeDnog4YneFoUbEHuXNjwarKulKag==&ch=e5_sB_zlk-o5LutmNNtUrHKsSLlQp76mlxYgdsWKZ3QTrx5GW8y-vA==) me in Ohio's Senate race. I'm looking forward to working with her in Washington to cut spending and curb inflation caused by Democrats' reckless policies.
I was also [endorsed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xXI03xb6KksBot-_jV2eYtdkXvRCLBMA63w4-WTAgMlF7xOtOwezU2OKc810So0rmy_D0_tElbYVMeaTD6CMFMjmQFRoZwk0m0Y7z6lEsFA06SollkHuvrJPtGXlN_D58dN80CU4wawYPSKFozBcfwyTRGyihzmX58IsvcakXL9ktZaIGofvPYmIHGJKcd_BsyTEv5XfDXdJ86ZQ2dlXkQqn8Zg66gfAvLcCg6QIhNU=&c=R1EFgo0jgA-yQ9H2g8LVTb-iyAeDnog4YneFoUbEHuXNjwarKulKag==&ch=e5_sB_zlk-o5LutmNNtUrHKsSLlQp76mlxYgdsWKZ3QTrx5GW8y-vA==) by the We the People Convention this past week, a huge step in proving to undecided Ohio voters who the most trustworthy Republican candidate is in the race.

| "I work with businesses in Ohio and throughout the country. I know the threat China poses to our economy because I have sat across the negotiating table from dozens of so-called "businessmen" from China who are corrupt, stealing our technology and trading secrets while answering to the Chinese Communist Party.
Frankly, I've seen the mess that the politicians in Washington have made with bad trade deals. The politicians look the other way as China undermines our economy, commits atrocities at home, and bullies the world. For the past decade, I've been telling any business that will listen to get out of China."
[Read the full op-ed here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xXI03xb6KksBot-_jV2eYtdkXvRCLBMA63w4-WTAgMlF7xOtOwezU-z4oKYzoBOGTrmZU7ICwwhvbXhJGqBXi7su1SkAKG6qmpkt9whWspKKkhZTE3TpMtO1NvNAFhmDynwXtvsCw-e_J6Ty5YDPXy_V9UjQIR4gyL68IyeChinvVPVCMeM8--_2znng7yRCarRCvyuFLogBhbqy5lc8jQ==&c=R1EFgo0jgA-yQ9H2g8LVTb-iyAeDnog4YneFoUbEHuXNjwarKulKag==&ch=e5_sB_zlk-o5LutmNNtUrHKsSLlQp76mlxYgdsWKZ3QTrx5GW8y-vA==)

If you'd like to get involved with our veterans coalition, [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xXI03xb6KksBot-_jV2eYtdkXvRCLBMA63w4-WTAgMlF7xOtOwezU7e6LIKoLnU7e_JhPbK9zg3oKTxCYPdECmMfbmHGiHOfKWdiPAcfdGRsxb_phssp0329OkJekbmgRebvFtU9JqSegxGcg2ld25HnfJAfFFNQ7oRk9GYbduQ=&c=R1EFgo0jgA-yQ9H2g8LVTb-iyAeDnog4YneFoUbEHuXNjwarKulKag==&ch=e5_sB_zlk-o5LutmNNtUrHKsSLlQp76mlxYgdsWKZ3QTrx5GW8y-vA==).

Don't forget to head to the polls to cast your vote today!

Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate

clean_body: Check out our weekly newsletter... | | | | | | == | Good evening from the Gibbons campaign! It's hard to believe we are down to the last 20 days of the primary campaign. This is an exciting time for us as we maintain a strong lead ahead of our opponents. DON'T FORGET - EARLY VOTING HAS STARTED! Head to your local voting location today and vote Mike Gibbons for U.S. Senate. I'm very happy to share that Congresswoman Kat Cammack (R-FL) has == me in Ohio's Senate race. I'm looking forward to working with her in Washington to cut spending and curb inflation caused by Democrats' reckless policies. I was also == by the We the People Convention this past week, a huge step in proving to undecided Ohio voters who the most trustworthy Republican candidate is in the race. | == | == | | | | In case you missed it, I published an op-ed in the Washington Examiner recently detailing the many concerns the U.S. faces in regards to China. Check it out below! | == | == | "I work with businesses in Ohio and throughout the country. I know the threat China poses to our economy because I have sat across the negotiating table from dozens of so-called "businessmen" from China who are corrupt, stealing our technology and trading secrets while answering to the Chinese Communist Party. Frankly, I've seen the mess that the politicians in Washington have made with bad trade deals. The politicians look the other way as China undermines our economy, commits atrocities at home, and bullies the world. For the past decade, I've been telling any business that will listen to get out of China." == | | | | | Our veterans coalition met with me at our Cleveland office headquarters on Tuesday. It was an honor to meet such incredible men and women in uniform and hear their impactful stories. If you'd like to get involved with our veterans coalition, ==. | == | | | | Gibbons signs are going up all over Ohio! Make sure you sign up for a yard sign below and we will get in contact with you soon. | | | == | | | | I'm reminded each day why we are pushing through the many challenges of campaigning. I am fighting for the future of America and want future generations to be able to live out their American Dreams. It's a dire time in the world and your support of our campaign truly makes the difference. Don't forget to head to the polls to cast your vote today! | Sincerely, Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate | | | | == == == | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 14500 Lorain Ave #110644, Cleveland, OH 44111 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

| Whether it's securing our borders from an illegal immigration invasion, or saving our economy from Bidenomics, we clearly need those Trump policies more than ever...

body:

body:
Check it out ⬇️

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/edf29d47bd5b/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-7060745?e=c87c5d8d97)

Friend,

Have you seen our latest ad?

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-13-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ebast413

It highlights what type of Congresswoman I’ll be in office; a Republican who gets stuff done.

As mayor of Happy Valley, I fully funded the police, supported our vets, and lowered taxes; which is exactly what you can expect of me in Congress.

I will always fight for what’s best for the people of Oregon.

Can I count on you to chip in any amount today so we can keep the video on air and help spread our campaign's message?>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-13-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ebast413)

Unlike other politicians, what I say is what you get, and my track record proves it.

Your support has been monumental and I wouldn't be where I am today without you.

Help me keep fighting to make Oregon a place with a conservative future; donate just $5 today and together we can keep our video on air and continue on the road to Congress.>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-13-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ebast413)

Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3268%2E3611125%2EKGNUbU ][IMG]

Hey folks,

As you can imagine, the long days on the campaign trail, fighting for
critical legislation in the House, and making sure I’m home to help Brady
with his homework keep me very busy.

But right now, I’ve got a rare 15 minutes in my schedule and need to use
that time to write you a quick message.

I can’t overstate how important hitting our FEC pre-primary fundraising
goal tonight is—especially since it’s been bumped up to $75,000 to compete
with MASSIVE GOP spending this week.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10696?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3268%2E3611125%2EKGNUbU ]I know you’re busy, too, folks—work, school, kids, whatever
is on your plate and mind most days—but taking 1 quick minute to chip in
$25 toward our goal would really mean a lot.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10696?t=1015&amount=25&akid=3268%2E3611125%2EKGNUbU ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10696?t=1016&amount=50&akid=3268%2E3611125%2EKGNUbU ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10696?t=1017&amount=100&akid=3268%2E3611125%2EKGNUbU ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10696?t=1018&amount=200&akid=3268%2E3611125%2EKGNUbU ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10696?t=1019&amount=250&akid=3268%2E3611125%2EKGNUbU ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10696?t=1020&amount=30&akid=3268%2E3611125%2EKGNUbU ]Other Amount

Flipping this Senate seat blue means giving Ohio a pro-worker delegation
that understands the challenges folks face every single day—challenges we
could finally work to fix.

Expanding our Senate majority means we could improve wages, make childcare
affordable, and make health care and higher education more accessible to
everyone.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10696?t=1021&amount=25&akid=3268%2E3611125%2EKGNUbU ]I know I’ve already asked a lot of you, but you keep this campaign
going—can I count on you to chip in $25 so we can hit our $75,000 goal,
flip Ohio blue, and finally deliver for Ohio families?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10696?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3268%2E3611125%2EKGNUbU ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10696?t=1009&amount=50&akid=3268%2E3611125%2EKGNUbU ]Donate $50

Thanks,

Tim

name: Amanda Makki
subject: This Nation needs fresh voices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress
body:
The 60-somethings in the House don't understand the real world in 2022 | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=deeecf84717b4e91a29344e0225cee38&_e=HyRMlVIgi_n9G7E-lMczzc-_8kGcVADA0TVopXTpgK0kaY0ZB3LpR6syd7t-xKCtIVurwJ9hBGOZGS-3uDYwhvTwEViFgR-Sjm5si-myLJyz2bf3R1mxvU7l3DdSHTcoWSOQN0Kf36FZu7g5WIc8m-WI6BZlu2n_VH7rJsPD08EfN-DyN8UfeVTFUDifhyC5WL0CRcpU4h7Ui3Y8i3skDA86MIyyK0hjYWtXr0PTkSxhJwsCqlABuXH6R63Y2YiBILK1jKphnEbvh-QsiZl3-TlWq58FOxNQEQsz1-ggrU5hDFRSJOR1zf0MHg8a5AGBn_4gjQFXiyyxxVyr5y72nxOxyDiCN7g8BSn2PApCWrVUoR2ZdtPApd0lf2RflFqEruUuXtZq0cqGRqhfvRRkgMTlg8iETHYGc1qil8jgNXg%3D)
---
Peter -

This is a picture of Nancy Pelosi and President John F. Kennedy at his inaugural ball. **It was taken on January 20, 1961, and Nancy is 20 years old.**

[](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=deeecf84717b4e91a29344e0225cee38&_e=HyRMlVIgi_n9G7E-lMczzc-_8kGcVADA0TVopXTpgK0kaY0ZB3LpR6syd7t-xKCtIVurwJ9hBGOZGS-3uDYwhvTwEViFgR-Sjm5si-myLJyz2bf3R1mxvU7l3DdSHTcoWSOQN0Kf36FZu7g5WIc8m-WI6BZlu2n_VH7rJsPD08EfN-DyN8UfeVTFUDifhyC5WL0CRcpU4h7Ui3Y8i3skDHtucGvHGn9fONQvkO5dwECsbjQrdH15UdCD5T3UcJ0es6E8jndgJ59EQNmhH-C3vFjlKNxRNOpILvGHA3BOKkmElCl5lcuM3OIi1o1CF0yaT5L_risGlZFqrRs9DlAnnqPbw_A8saGT5lD2khtNHK14tf9Isizk7f5hCmknYvw_FG_MgO2qpp8Zjm-1eSQOkKlJDzGv58TmtFh1IgYHBr0%3D)
Flash forward 61 years later, in 2022, **82-year-old Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the House,** and the average age of the 116th Congress is 58 years old.

Most of Congress is years removed from raising a family, trying to buy a home, or even trying to make ends meet at the end of the month. For some, it's been decades since they've had to apply for a real job. **We need Members of Congress who understand modern American struggles, because they are living in modern America. We need term limits.**

Members like Pelosi, who have been in office for nearly four decades, don’t understand the struggles of everyday Americans. We need fresh new voices. [**Can you help me bring my voice to the House and fight for Term Limits?**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=deeecf84717b4e91a29344e0225cee38&_e=HyRMlVIgi_n9G7E-lMczzc-_8kGcVADA0TVopXTpgK0kaY0ZB3LpR6syd7t-xKCtIVurwJ9hBGOZGS-3uDYwhvTwEViFgR-Sjm5si-myLJyz2bf3R1mxvU7l3DdSHTcoWSOQN0Kf36FZu7g5WIc8m-WI6BZlu2n_VH7rJsPD08EfN-DyN8UfeVTFUDifhyC5WL0CRcpU4h7Ui3Y8i3skDBBFite9liXAymgSfzXo7PD8iZRlCf5-3YZhFqGzoaelpemg5DmnnDoF-t5uA6EGF1wT7R2JSBYr72jXXrkpzBwMxlBUIzDhu17O7yhj2g1VJBPhZ4hhdO4fUzp7nXoSMHnVrp_I9NkTbtqYCn96V7wFJ4SlSCTCjzIBKShH0AcPY-XCuqOmdPaGWv7JrqvPo6lwgbJ38CmAJDqqhZ0Qb6g%3D)

[** FIGHT FOR TERM LIMITS ->**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=deeecf84717b4e91a29344e0225cee38&_e=HyRMlVIgi_n9G7E-lMczzc-_8kGcVADA0TVopXTpgK0kaY0ZB3LpR6syd7t-xKCtIVurwJ9hBGOZGS-3uDYwhvTwEViFgR-Sjm5si-myLJyz2bf3R1mxvU7l3DdSHTcoWSOQN0Kf36FZu7g5WIc8m-WI6BZlu2n_VH7rJsPD08EfN-DyN8UfeVTFUDifhyC5WL0CRcpU4h7Ui3Y8i3skDA3kVHnSBtoaYroVZn6Vqwc9ZkA1xjK11LB9EdrI6thFRpasT5RXy1Mv2BMSxYOusGqbWJhoy28bpXWk6owZn5Z-3UWPZKxq40tmA6MKFDYG_1Z-_KoEKA_shpyXYuWXmPL1RxlOKixhWBqmgcE1XvrZkWTrlD_q_muHBuex2dGuUJHDLf0XU7adtW7bNauPSNE74VgEGC1T_a0Q4A02Cbc%3D)
I care about the next 20, 30, 50 years of our Nation, the costs we pass to future generations, and what inflation is doing to young families and the elderly. _But I don't think the Left is looking past sundown tonight._

Peter, Democrats have taken America for granted and made it almost impossible for young people to get by. While they screamed about helping the working class, they sent our jobs to China, printed endless amounts of cash, and made healthcare and gas unaffordable.

This Nation needs term limits in the House because this nation needs fresh voices to set it back on course.

[**This nation needs powerful voices like mine to take our fight DIRECTLY to the radical Democrats.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=deeecf84717b4e91a29344e0225cee38&_e=HyRMlVIgi_n9G7E-lMczzc-_8kGcVADA0TVopXTpgK0kaY0ZB3LpR6syd7t-xKCtIVurwJ9hBGOZGS-3uDYwhvTwEViFgR-Sjm5si-myLJyz2bf3R1mxvU7l3DdSHTcoWSOQN0Kf36FZu7g5WIc8m-WI6BZlu2n_VH7rJsPD08EfN-DyN8UfeVTFUDifhyC5WL0CRcpU4h7Ui3Y8i3skDJrj-MgtAq3cuBqfwCRWaVblI4WdUKaGqMQJaQGgPHHdhCeAxbe2U-7nmd09cL3dj72wJizMh9ohojowe0q_Lz1yU9v46TvP2p8eqkgLjZEJaKBxcCOjqgsxMaPemF3qAcqq-sOcgVUvA6vKsh48FZ2CDNt84A_TId3ajs-2ZwJ3DLTGwvZGguBA4gC_raRlGuD4Vc1kuj7td0PGa-NPifA%3D)

[** FIGHT FOR TERM LIMITS ->**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=deeecf84717b4e91a29344e0225cee38&_e=HyRMlVIgi_n9G7E-lMczzc-_8kGcVADA0TVopXTpgK0kaY0ZB3LpR6syd7t-xKCtIVurwJ9hBGOZGS-3uDYwhvTwEViFgR-Sjm5si-myLJyz2bf3R1mxvU7l3DdSHTcoWSOQN0Kf36FZu7g5WIc8m-WI6BZlu2n_VH7rJsPD08EfN-DyN8UfeVTFUDifhyC5WL0CRcpU4h7Ui3Y8i3skDKB0muMwsRyvpnKLI3-JCGQ7z-6xhMN_Nxp3eC2BSqefiOHoWI4q2XOJFAFo9H708gyLjLzva3gs8imXH9vZmUj1Vw8AuzrUykGmKW1X0woJEFW-Oahc9u1ukW7plUqCbDaH3Y0KzbwOZXcwIAJII_QCmvC0BfUH1-nDe-yCcKUQMVT-nj7gV2jz2r8WGko-RUBMiWFaPCZeEX_VAXxB7Tg%3D)
[**A $20 contribution today can send a conservative female legal immigrant to the House to represent Florida and take down the radical left.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=deeecf84717b4e91a29344e0225cee38&_e=HyRMlVIgi_n9G7E-lMczzc-_8kGcVADA0TVopXTpgK0kaY0ZB3LpR6syd7t-xKCtIVurwJ9hBGOZGS-3uDYwhvTwEViFgR-Sjm5si-myLJyz2bf3R1mxvU7l3DdSHTcoWSOQN0Kf36FZu7g5WIc8m-WI6BZlu2n_VH7rJsPD08EfN-DyN8UfeVTFUDifhyC5WL0CRcpU4h7Ui3Y8i3skDB3Tj11gR5Ik_EdR9rPYflU6qgiPDPrzepoSTE5rltfhkOxJfDuWIJksgFCwCQ5H3vwy6FL646Fsd-3fWSrmwrVypKyZBzv8ytkQZD0Ztosye6qXPHvY3CpqjRWvcdhckBmYkA1F9dVw-5q8xxP2yqoSdb28ZGb_okcKpc2vbxjqozppPcc4JJMgkKdtbjlmz91fHtCCV7-co72z4GCHo_s%3D)

Thank you,

[](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=deeecf84717b4e91a29344e0225cee38&_e=HyRMlVIgi_n9G7E-lMczzc-_8kGcVADA0TVopXTpgK0kaY0ZB3LpR6syd7t-xKCtIVurwJ9hBGOZGS-3uDYwhvTwEViFgR-Sjm5si-myLJyz2bf3R1mxvU7l3DdSHTcoWSOQN0Kf36FZu7g5WIc8m-WI6BZlu2n_VH7rJsPD08EfN-DyN8UfeVTFUDifhyC5WL0CRcpU4h7Ui3Y8i3skDNtuV7Vimp1KiRskqStjXj0H1SwnxwUUOUkNp7f6MPTEcN-f_WooUjH8Qd6Pyt2tLtYDHEUnjC7kPYWM-uIN09qdeZSHxpRWe_tGedgjn6PhVcxBIyOx2j9CWV5ERnVgV-tGbNdT4QEDr_BgbbN-JPPFYRKqVMf25CfgjyiuqRHiwLCuSav8PSdAnVEqPwv6t9HnE55X-ITKP0GzROoV0wk%3D)

name: Team Deluzio
subject: Republicans rigging elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania lawmakers just moved Senate Bill 1200 forward for consideration — dangerous legislation that could eliminate the use of secure ballot drop boxes in our elections. | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44097837/340082313/657928695?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220413sb1200_td_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDZmODU3MC01Y2JiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DD2IhHt8dF8svgUEpU2Xru87gbS4zV1b647O4arpa2Y=)
---
Republicans are attacking voting rights again, Derek. (This is something Chris knows a thing about as a voting rights lawyer.)
In Harrisburg, Republican lawmakers just moved _Senate Bill 1200_ forward — dangerous legislation that could eliminate the use of secure ballot drop boxes in our elections.
Ballot drop boxes give voters secure and convenient options for where to cast their mail ballots. They helped voters vote and stay safe and healthy during the pandemic. As a result, Pennsylvanians voted in record numbers during the 2020 presidential election.
**Let’s be clear:** the radical right’s attack on mail voting is nothing more than an attempt to disenfranchise PA voters so Republicans can stay in power.
Getting rid of ballot drop boxes only makes voting harder. Republicans know their policies are unpopular, corrupt, and anti-worker, so they would rather rig elections in their favor than earn voters' trust.

clean_body: In Harrisburg, Pennsylvania lawmakers just moved Senate Bill 1200 forward for consideration — dangerous legislation that could eliminate the use of secure ballot drop boxes in our elections. | | = Republicans are attacking voting rights again, Derek. (This is something Chris knows a thing about as a voting rights lawyer.) In Harrisburg, Republican lawmakers just moved Senate Bill 1200 forward — dangerous legislation that could eliminate the use of secure ballot drop boxes in our elections. Ballot drop boxes give voters secure and convenient options for where to cast their mail ballots. They helped voters vote and stay safe and healthy during the pandemic. As a result, Pennsylvanians voted in record numbers during the 2020 presidential election. Let’s be clear: the radical right’s attack on mail voting is nothing more than an attempt to disenfranchise PA voters so Republicans can stay in power. Getting rid of ballot drop boxes only makes voting harder. Republicans know their policies are unpopular, corrupt, and anti-worker, so they would rather rig elections in their favor than earn voters' trust. Chris is a voting rights attorney who will fight for our democracy, freedom, and right to vote when we elect him to Congress this November. Thanks for taking action on this important issue. Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=178%2E5257348%2EHpAeDi ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

In two days, all campaigns — Republican, Democratic, and everything in
between — will report their first quarter fundraising numbers to the
Federal Election Commission (FEC).

We already know Kevin McCarthy raised over $31 million this quarter and
scores of other GOP candidates will post massive hauls to take back the
House and Senate.

Republicans are rallying and re-energizing their right-wing base and
high-dollar donors to reclaim control of Congress. And their efforts could
work. The GOP is trying to gain momentum by spreading false information
and attacking Democrats like Adam every chance they get.

One thing we can count on – and that the GOP doesn’t have – is you.
Grassroots supporters are the lifeblood of our movement to protect our
Democratic majorities and keep our country moving forward.

In 2020, you helped Adam protect our majority in the House, secure the
Senate by the narrowest of margins, and send President Biden to the White
House. While we’re up against big challenges during this midterm election
cycle, we’re confident this grassroots team is up to the task.

By chipping in a grassroots donation whenever possible, you’re ensuring
new and incumbent Democrats have the resources necessary to win.

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Jeremy Hunt is the man we need
body:
Peter, During my time as Speaker of the House, I learned how to recognize great conservative leaders. **And when I saw Jeremy Hunt, I knew he was the man Congress needs to bring in a new era of conservative leadership.** Jeremy doesn’t just spout talking points about conservative principles, _he lives by them every day._ From his service in the U.S. Army to his dedication to his faith, he’s a role model for ALL young conservatives looking to make a difference. **But right now, he needs your help.** [](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=5d8a84da16fb41b7a3ff0073f8b392b9&_e=lgVFvtu4T40vKQfeUWcCh5oDgA969dJXkYdID2Q0jBOgfpgf9eFiu2PofZGCwwF2ezvIyT5LPsA_H5h1_FtqQaztuBZ6Mt3rKvNN1U_n5hyZeaEuBl5CllUbCdwfzfev_r6UW8uHVkMa_TicEYrdPRdlPXLyf-wH2DHqv6bwBTd8l-1wQG2UBPznE64iXrl6-N92RIeHHe1XsGevIyfuitQ2xhFZrPGJrpifwABq49p7CJbiBiogAH1UyY2_MiymjG2cXUs0QVfN-9X4JPZhZ-H6qU7toddP3NqV6blC_dZCZUpUhXQPOa-y8G3-oKJT6qA4zxb-XSXArKipIiTYqCz0wDaCWLRPnOMIpOUFd_-ElYezyNBdfcojXVnozZ0mTBPW803cS2P0Q0pexdLPYg%3D%3D) Democrats are TERRIFIED of Jeremy, so they’re preparing to pour in MILLIONS to this race to keep an outdated, out-of-touch Democrat in this seat. | **_BREAKING NEWS - _**
[It has just been reported that](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=6ab3152512&e=edf8a4d16d)[ the _Biden Administration will EXTEND the federal mask mandate_](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=712f627090&e=edf8a4d16d) on public transit, which was finally set to expire next week.

Despite most requirements having been lifted across the nation, there's one place where mask mandates seem endless - _on airplanes and public transportation._ **Joe Biden and the CDC continue to push for permanent masking** \- and their anti-science, nonsensical overreach must be stopped.

_**Republican Attorneys General are fighting back.**_

Since the day he took office, Republican Attorneys General have led the fight against Joe Biden's federal overreach and tyrannical mandates.

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Lower Costs, Higher Standards
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

In case you missed it, this week, I unveiled the first part of my Lower Costs, Higher Standards plan.

Across Florida, people have told me that they’re struggling — they’re struggling to make ends meet and afford basic necessities. They’re terrified that, if DeSantis continues his record of inaction and incompetence, this situation is only going to get worse.
And they’re ready to try something new.

That’s what the Lower Costs, Higher Standards plan is all about. With this plan (and with your support), we’re going to put a stop to DeSantis’ partisan political theater and get to work delivering relief for Florida families. Can you chip in $5 today to help us do it? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=413tour]

This is what real leadership looks like, Peter.

A real leader goes out into our communities, gives voice to the challenges and anxieties of everyday Floridians, and sets out concrete plans to help make your lives better.

So, I’m personally asking you — if you’re ready to elect a real leader to fight for Lower Costs and Higher Standards, please click here to chip in $5 and support my campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=413tour]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=413tour]

Thank you for standing with me.

— Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

body:

This is important, friend, so I’ll get straight to it:
**Donald Trump just came to Georgia for the _second_ time in six months to rally the GOP base for my potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R). They know Senate control could be decided by our race, so they're pulling out all the stops to defeat me.**
The good news is that we just launched a TV ad to fight back against GOP attacks and reach millions of Georgians with our people-powered message. **But if we fall short of our critical midnight goal, our ad could go dark – and we could end up ceding the airwaves to the GOP.**
**This means I'm fully relying on grassroots folks like you to power our movement to victory – and with polls showing me 1 point down, we have zero room for error.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jessica=20Gomez?=
subject: "Total chaos"
body:
Measure 110 has failed Oregonians. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6d212a6775be/total-chaos?e=7e91be8cad)
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=425845d021&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=8f7b4de5fd&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=09fe18774c&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=febc239043&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | | | Dear Friends,

We're all too familiar with the words _"chaos"_ and _"failure"_ dominating the headlines when it comes to our state government. Just this week, The Oregonian detailed the **"total chaos"** of Oregon's failed drug decriminalization experiment. From the article:

_"Oregon has yet to spend nearly $300 million in tax revenue set aside for substance abuse treatment and recovery services under a voter-approved law intended to transform the state’s response to addiction.

So far not a single new treatment bed has been funded since Measure 110′s passage to decriminalize the possession of small amounts of heroin and other street drugs and set up a system to refer and treat those suffering from addiction."_

Measure 110 is already diverting **hundreds of millions** of tax dollars from schools, Oregon State Police, mental health services, and more. Now, those dollars aren't even being spent, nearly two years after voters approved the ballot measure!

Measure 110 is turning out to be the failure we knew it would be. Oregon already ranks near the bottom of all 50 states for substance abuse treatment availability, and now we discover that $270 million intended to address this dire situation hasn't even been allocated. As governor, I will ensure agency directors have the skillset needed to properly manage their agencies, and I will hold them accountable for delivering results. This long era of ineffective leadership must come to an end. But that can only happen if we send an outsider to Salem who has real world business experience. As a tech CEO, I believe I'm the candidate to get the job done.

_**If you agree that we need an outsider's perspective to fix the issues plaguing our state, I hope I can count on your support in the May 17th Republican primary, which is just over a month away.

And if you're able to donate $10, $25, $50, or $75 to help us finish this campaign off strong, I know we can win this May and defeat the far-left in November.**_

Oregon is in desperate need of a course correction, and I look forward to bringing my experience as a businesswoman and CEO to Salem.

Sincerely,

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

---
| | | | | | | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=177dd8d381&e=7e91be8cad)
---

| | Hi Everyone! Did you miss the NC04 Candidate Forum hosted by the Democratic Women of Orange County, the NC Disability Caucus, and the UNC Young Dems? If so, you can now watch the forum in its entirety at the link below. It was a great evening with most of the candidates in attendance to answer voters questions about reproductive rights, health care, climate change, voting rights, education, and Ukraine. Check it out! And pass it on to others who you believe would be interested. A special thank you to the hosting organizations for an informative evening.

clean_body: Watch the Video| | | | | Hi Everyone! Did you miss the NC04 Candidate Forum hosted by the Democratic Women of Orange County, the NC Disability Caucus, and the UNC Young Dems? If so, you can now watch the forum in its entirety at the link below. It was a great evening with most of the candidates in attendance to answer voters questions about reproductive rights, health care, climate change, voting rights, education, and Ukraine. Check it out! And pass it on to others who you believe would be interested. A special thank you to the hosting organizations for an informative evening. | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward Friends of Ashley Ward P.O. name: Rebecca Parson
subject: I will never privatize Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, [**I am the only candidate in this race who wants to improve Medicare and expand it to everyone. Can you send a quick donation to help me win, so I can fight for that in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105889/340120610/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTk2ZTUyNy04NWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PbSJeFDceOKSJvnOHnwxCFZSKuOEl2vWGeAEty-i9R0=) From signing a letter supporting Social Security cuts to supporting Medicare privatization, my incumbent opponent is the wrong choice for a district where 1/5 of people are 65+ years old. My Oma (grandma) was able to stay in her home until almost the very end of her life. When she started needing a little bit of help in the mornings and evenings, someone was sent to her house to help her. That let her stay in her home instead of moving to a facility just because she needed 30 minutes of help a day. Why was my Oma able to do this? Because she lived in Germany, which has a more comprehensive healthcare system, including home care, than the US. I want everyone to have the experience my Oma had, which is why I want to EXPAND Social Security, not cut it. That’s why I want to improve and EXPAND Medicare to everyone, not privatize it. I’m up against a corporate incumbent who’s funded by Big Pharma and health insurance corporations, so I need your help to win and fight for Medicare for All in Congress. If you can, give here to help me do that: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rp-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105890/340120611/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTk2ZTUyNy04NWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PbSJeFDceOKSJvnOHnwxCFZSKuOEl2vWGeAEty-i9R0=) name: Dave Giles
subject: Government Overreach
body:
Hello Peter! America's Issues Border Security! Immigration Reform! States Obligations! These are
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=5019633.5736.1.229b30277bf7655e8fa3a4857eeace31)
---
**__Hello Peter!**
---
# **America's Issues**
Border Security!
Immigration Reform!
States Obligations!
These are all **EXPECTED** for any Representative!!! Let's Stop being clouded by irrelevant issues!
And Focus on Government Overreach!
**Return to the States what is not specified in the Constitution!** Government overreach has been going on for years
Stealing our rights and our states rights.
Now it is time too reign in unconstitutional laws! Such as: **Voter Integrity** Stop fraud (Voter ID / Decertify 2020)
**Repair** economy and free enterprise (remove restrictions)
**Limit** mandates to a week (ie: Mask & Vaccine)
**Return** education to the States
**Stop** taking political prisoners (Jan 6th) - repeal the "Patriot Act"
**Support** 2nd Amendment (repeal Class III)
**Initiate** Term Limits for House & Senate
**Separate** what is State from Federal (10th Amendment)
**Increase** Socials Security benefits (Payments)
**Increase** Veterans assistance
**Support** First responders We can **STOP GOVERNMENT OVERREACH!**
---
\-------------------------- Support Dave Giles _because_
**"Dave the most qualified candidate to serve you"**.
**100% of his time** \- no other obligations
---
| | [ Let's Get the JOB DONE!! ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=5019633.5737.1.1aa09fa2a1049000f713a59f7aebbebb)
---
**Thank you!**
---
Sincerely,
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=5019633.5738.1.9c612edc1b1401cc60c6a1e725710407)

**Dave Giles**
Candidate

| [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_411_no_2&n=10 "FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU") [FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_411_no_2&n=10)
---
* * *
The WisGOP hosted a March Metric Madness competition allowing county parties and Republican groups to battle for the most voter contacts this month. **Congratulations to our winner, the Wisconsin Young Republicans, and the runner-up, the Kenosha County GOP, who also knocked the most doors as a percentage of their total county turnout!**********
****
****
* * *
****
****
**Washington County Victory Parties**
Washington County conservatives celebrated a sweep of victories for conservatives running for local office!
**Florence County Lincoln Day Dinner**
Florence County Republicans hosted their annual Lincoln Day Dinner with over 150 attendees and Congressman Tom Tiffany, state elected officials, and statewide candidates as special guests.
**3rd Congressional District Caucus**
Derrick Van Orden and candidates joined 3rd Congressional District Republicans for their annual Caucus that boasted over 250 attendees! The Trempealeau County GOP was also awarded County of the Year.
**Washington County Door-Knocking**
Washington County school board candidates knocked on doors to bring their message directly to voters.
**La Crosse Get Out the Vote Event**
Third Congressional District candidate Derrick Van Orden rallied supporters ahead of voter contact for local elections.
**Green County Monthly Meeting**
Green County Republicans hosted their monthly meeting in Monroe, where they gained some new members!
**Washington County Get Out the Vote Rally**
Senator Johnson rallied conservatives in West Bend ahead of the Spring Election.
**Shawano County Get Out the Vote Events**
Shawano County Republicans held GOTV events ahead of the Spring Election, which helped result in successes from county board, to school board, to mayoral elections.
* * *
### Don’t miss the next big event in your community! Visit our website [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_411_no_2&n=11) to stay up-to-date on the newest opportunities, or sign up to volunteer [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_411_no_2&n=12).
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_411_no_2&n=13) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_411_no_2&n=14) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_411_no_2&n=15) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_411_no_2&n=16)

# **Fight to Win **
**NEW PODCASTS** Fentanyl now kills more Americans under age 45 than car accidents, suicide, COVID, or cancer. Some leaders' responses--claiming the mantle of compassion--are enabling this crisis and creating more suffering and death. Join [Paige Willey](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-biddlhd-ihhjkhtyud-r/) on THIS IS YOUR COUNTRY as she breaks down the myriad ways your leaders have failed to act to stem the tide of deadly drug abuse. This week on AMERICA'S MOMENT, Molly McCann explores the plans and ideology of global elites seeking to impose a rentier-style economy on America under the auspices of "The Great Reset." **LISTEN NOW! **[Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-biddlhd-ihhjkhtyud-y/)[ ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-biddlhd-ihhjkhtyud-j/) [Spotify ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-biddlhd-ihhjkhtyud-t/) | **New Podcast **
# This is Your Country On Drugs
**April 11th** This episode explores the human toll of the Biden Administration's doubling down on frivolous, wasteful, and sadistic "harm reduction" policies instead of meaningful, humane solutions to the nation's fentanyl epidemic. [Watch Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-biddlhd-ihhjkhtyud-i/)

Friend,

Democratic primary voters in Montana’s brand new congressional district are going to be receiving their ballots in their mailboxes in less than ONE MONTH! That means we only have a limited amount of time to make sure they know Tom is the only Democrat capable of beating Ryan Zinke this fall.

**We know that when folks hear how Tom will clean up billionaires’ corruption and bring back a Montana where we can make a stable life, they are enthusiastic about joining our campaign.**

That’s why we’re putting our Get Out the Vote program into high gear — and we’re counting on your support to help us reach our $10,000 goal. body:
1 in 6 local election officials have reported experiencing threats because of their job.
1 in 6 local election officials have reported experiencing threats because of their job.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44099442/340090714/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220413ElectionWorkers2_VR_FIGHTBACK_90DO_4_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODUyMGY0ZS02NGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VAoda0iHaEIRZZsYm0Rd2FtA3kpzlCrGODAbB5h9v1Y=)
Team, the numbers don’t lie:
* 1 in 6 local election officials has reported experiencing threats because of their job.
* 3 in 4 local election officials say that threats against them have increased in recent years.
* Almost 1 in 3 local election officials say they know of at least one election worker who left their job partly because of fears for their safety, increased threats, or intimidation.
* 3 in 5 local election officials say they are concerned that threats and harassment will make retaining or recruiting election workers harder.

Those numbers are unacceptable. We must reelect Maggie as our Secretary of State – can you imagine what will happen if her opponent is elected? Her opponent thinks we should do away with early voting and same-day registration because it increases voter fraud. **_It’s lies like these that perpetuate violence against election workers._**
As Maggie creates state and federal law enforcement partnerships, improves physical security at the polls, and ensures election workers have more safety training, tell her we have her back.
**[Will you pitch in $20 right now to help us hit our mid-month $5,000 goal? Each month, we need to hit a certain amount, or we’re just not going to make it over the finish line! Not only are our voting rights on the ballot this year, so is election worker safety. Help us fill our Fight Back Fund up so we get Maggie reelected!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44099444/340090716/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220413ElectionWorkers2_VR_FIGHTBACK_90DO_4_NG_N_L1&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODUyMGY0ZS02NGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VAoda0iHaEIRZZsYm0Rd2FtA3kpzlCrGODAbB5h9v1Y=)**

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: I'm looking at a spreadsheet about clipboards...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I sat down with our organizing team and asked them to nail down a final budget
#

Friends,
As Malcolm's finance director, it's my job to make sure our team has all the resources we need to reach and make our case to every Pennsylvania voter before our May 17 primary.
This morning our organizing team came to me with a problem: They’re short on the resources they need to run a robust field operation and keep our volunteers fed while they're out talking to voters.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44099668/340092247/-347403939?refcode2=6701ede4-64bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220413-1-30-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzAxZWRlNC02NGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ij6cR9tSbgJpNJzebDdm8QRe4zx8pj4lV0MyM0vdVI=)
So I did the math, and to cover all these resources plus an extra boost to our digital ads before GOTV, we need to raise another $14,500 online before April 15.
I already told the organizing team I'd get it done, so I'm counting on your help to keep that promise.
Fundraising emails like these are a huge part of how we fund this movement for working families, because Malcolm isn't funded by corporate PACs or their lobbyists.
[So what do you say, friends — can you pitch in $3 to help us raise $14,500 before our mid-month deadline? Your donation ensures we are able to reach every voter in Pennsylvania with Malcolm's message.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44099669/340092250/-347403939?refcode2=6701ede4-64bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220413-1-30-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzAxZWRlNC02NGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ij6cR9tSbgJpNJzebDdm8QRe4zx8pj4lV0MyM0vdVI=)

name: Beto for Texas
subject: This didn’t have to happen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Abbott is slowing down the supply chain and hurting Texans.
#
Greg Abbott’s latest political stunt at the border is costing Texans and the country.
By significantly delaying shipping across our border, Abbott is directly slowing down the supply chain, raising prices, and causing companies to relocate jobs outside of Texas.
[ Texas — and the country — quite literally can’t afford Greg Abbott. Donate $3 right now to help us elect Beto and defeat Greg Abbott in November. Every donation will send the message that you’re done with Abbott’s political theater. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55056?refcode=ema20220413-184868&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=184868%2E444211%2EWXdrDJ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55056?refcode=ema20220413-184868&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=184868%2E444211%2EWXdrDJ)**
Abbott's border blockade is killing jobs, increasing the prices we pay at the store, and worsening the supply chain. He's hurting the people of Texas.
These trucks that Greg Abbott is targeting at the border are carrying parts that are destined for the factory floor in San Antonio, where we build the Toyota Tundra and Tacoma. They are also on their way to factories in Ohio, Michigan, and other parts of this country. **Greg Abbott’s actions are going to jeopardize jobs throughout Texas and throughout the United States.**
_And this didn’t have to happen_ , it’s a decision of one man and one man alone – Greg Abbott. This is a political stunt that does nothing to improve the safety or security of our border because these inspections are for things like the tire pressure or the way the engine might be running in an 18-wheeler. This policy is for show and does nothing but hurt the economy of Texas and the United States.
Greg Abbott cares more about political stunts than what happens to Texans and Americans. We need your help to defeat him in November and elect Beto.
[ Please, pitch in any amount that you can afford today to put an end to Abbott’s harm in Texas.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55056?refcode=ema20220413-184868&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=184868%2E444211%2EWXdrDJ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55056?refcode=ema20220413-184868&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=184868%2E444211%2EWXdrDJ)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220413-184868-footer&t=41&refcode2=184868_444211_WXdrDJ&akid=184868%2E444211%2EWXdrDJ)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
Let me explain why even just a couple dollars makes a BIG difference.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9362bbd91fbf4db3bf7dc0164a49bbb1&_e=YNgbDQu4hPl7i_9AAp_2YEd_QjUig1i-n2JoQa4PvBRqDD4Tk896M0cZ0WROFynYsJFjqc55X50RA7PMbvsn18ur9lFp_MevCWpU6wpEBvCgjBrEK7Kh8HMZmKeuz2RenYAdTjVFcAkOC2FYZ5rqFgZzkyO_YZdGOU2vfsGMbwyQObH3KMuOaKXu2CoM_jJWDdcAfapz3NtOd1Haq_PaSa3dwkNKqYEuXkKzx9M9bov16Jzs5pDJYc37OMvWwLbtOo2fWVe4ohyBkRxUIiWB3b8Us0ALAhL9XHjfPBMRG7n-ruXOSx_Yz662lMnnk5UcGjnjhNRK5IUGNV-uD8RuM-ci2T4xhu8CRc9MHyv8OmisUyMegkfY_l8psfgPxLDL) | | Fellow American,

My campaign needs your support before midnight - [**even just $3**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9362bbd91fbf4db3bf7dc0164a49bbb1&_e=YNgbDQu4hPl7i_9AAp_2YEd_QjUig1i-n2JoQa4PvBRqDD4Tk896M0cZ0WROFynYsJFjqc55X50RA7PMbvsn18ur9lFp_MevCWpU6wpEBvCgjBrEK7Kh8HMZmKeuz2RenYAdTjVFcAkOC2FYZ5rqFgZzkyO_YZdGOU2vfsGMbwzOkArh7o0pUIaJUKa1VdftbcV06z7hRmtOMQOshe9YA_OATu6fg-xS3x_Os9CtwDQN_6xzDTXzN8bOrYBkLpWaA5thW-OuwUGQRSDx69nLDnmt5vqAV3L58kIAo5rdFSzo1t7rw7M3Vj7wVzzTTiGFCErtT8Bdt_Bnf7n7pABTaiGmqB3ODXMzPAfufgxlifCBiUbM17Nv1gfBBEVzJLOu) - but first let me explain why even just a couple dollars makes a BIG difference.

1. The Democrats hold a razor-thin majority, and this Utah race is CRITICAL to Republicans WINNING BACK the Senate

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: We Can't Abandon Medical Freedom
body:
| Peter -- For months you've been hearing every GOP candidate saying they will work to restore medical freedom. We have also heard a lot of talk about emergency powers reform, something most candidates for governor say they support. Since then, some GOP contenders for governor have returned to serve in the Senate. You might expect to find them fighting to end vaccine mandates, or pushing hard for emergency powers reform. Instead you'll find them championing large socialist programs and consistently voting to **grow government** , just as they have been for the past decade. Minnesotans want medical freedom. Conservatives also want to see the Never Again Bill passed, as it is the strongest proposal for emergency powers reform. Minnesotans understand how important these two issues are because a **Tyrant** \- Tim Walz - robbed us of our liberties to move around freely, to worship, to make a living, and decide what does or doesn't go into our bodies. This is pure evil, and we as **Americans have a duty** to make sure this evil is rooted out of government at every level. Minnesotans cannot afford another four years of this criminal dictator. Because of indoctrination in our schools, it's going to be tough to beat Walz. It's going to take someone who can **expand the conservative base** through effectively communicating the ideas of Liberty and the Constitution. My opponents are not cut out for this job. It is going to take a fighter. Just like we can't afford four more years of Walz, we can't afford to challenge him with politicians who cower in the face of adversity. Soft Republicans have **_Already_ abandoned medical freedom** and emergency powers reform in favor more socialism, BEFORE the election even takes place. Many Minnesotans, myself included, did not think it was possible to see such blatant authoritarianism in America in our lifetime. Now, the unthinkable has become just another chapter of American history. The career politicians have already forgotten, and are content spending away your money in Saint Paul while asking you for a promotion. **We will never forget.** If we're not careful and principled, this will happen again in America - and history shows us that next time it will be much, much worse. The lockdown battle rages on in Shanghai, China, where people are STILL placed under extreme lockdowns. They can't go outside because robots, drones, and their cellphones track their every move. Even [Communist Chinese citizens are screaming for freedom.](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYQOtKWPXt4ot9M3SqBcApx&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=great_walz_of_china&n=1) In the UK, Boris Johnson is currently facing fines for violating his own government's Covid lockdown orders. When Walz does the same here, he faces no consequences. We must hold our criminal governor accountable. **Make no mistake, if we do not reform emergency powers and restore health freedom soon, liberty in America will continue to deteriorate.** Believe it or not, The US is still seeing [new mandates](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=bzKlrq0UnkNX-ip9hPfjwm4adgaxiqSQi7mA72VmimrYL3VMp0Q8h3RX8wYf_b_x8_TB8ElBsDR5rNKN7oSnQRtxTEhgIqtVJJ-MLZdRV9C-4GJPzoaAZFnbjdS1N864&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=great_walz_of_china&n=2) for masks and vaccines. If we don't take this seriously, the country you hand to your kids will not be the same country that was given to you by your parents. As a father of three, I am not willing to let that happen. This is why I've signed the **Never Again Pledge**. We know that when you give politicians an inch, they will take ten miles. If you're still undecided on who you will be supporting for governor, check to see who is serious about reforming emergency powers. Sadly, only 2 out of 7 candidates have made the hard commitment Minnesotans are looking for. Too many soft Republicans back away from this fight, but I promise you that **I will never back down** or let Walz get away with what he did to you. I can attack Walz from **different angles** that other candidates cannot. My family immigrated to America from the East for the ability to be free, live their lives, raise a family, and pursue the opportunity America offers. I've never bowed down to the scientific establishment. As a physician and business owner who **never complied with mandates,** I will provide serious credibility in this fight against Tim Walz. **I won’t allow a fraud in flannel to continue being our Dictator.** Other candidates will let Walz off too easily, and that is why they cannot win. Our campaign is presenting the MNGOP with the opportunity of a lifetime: a principled **AND** electable candidate who can turn Minnesota RED. As your next governor, medical freedom will be restored on DAY 1, and the Never Again Bill will get signed into law. Our grassroots campaign humbly asks for your **First Round** **Vote** at the State Convention. If you're not a delegate or alternate, [pitch in](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=great_walz_of_china&n=3) to help fund our convention expenses! With your help we will beat Tim Walz and Save Sota! Thank you! Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [ElectNeil.com](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rOkbRklTyTNtmBTRPmVdijk&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=great_walz_of_china&n=4)
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=great_walz_of_china&n=5). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=great_walz_of_china&n=6), software for leaders.

clean_body: I knew when I stepped into this race that things would be tough – but now my opponent is calling on the deep pocketed democrat machine to fund this race and buy her seat back. Just last month it was announced that she’ll benefit from the Democrats’ House Majority PAC ad-buy of $102 million! | Peter, The final numbers are in, and I’m not sure what we’re going to do... My ultra-liberal opponent raised $1 million last quarter and has $3.7 million in cash on hand. I knew when I stepped into this race that things would be tough – but now my opponent is calling on the deep pocketed democrat machine to fund this race and buy her seat back. Just last month it was announced that she’ll benefit from the Democrats’ House Majority PAC ad-buy of $102 million! Here’s the good news: it’s obvious, that Dems are scared that they’re going to lose this seat... In 2020 I lost this very seat by just 9,580 votes, sending my radical opponent to Washington where she rubber-stamped Pelosi’s liberal agenda. We can’t let the Dems buy this seat to send my opponent back to Washington. If we can’t keep pace with my opponent’s massive fundraising haul, we could be finished. Every seat is in play this cycle, and if Republicans are going to regain the majority this November, then it’s essential to win in suburban districts, like the one I’m running in. We can’t save America from the sidelines, and we can’t save America with my opponent in Congress. In service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. name: Morgan Harper
subject: The GOP wants to raise your taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This is just outrageous.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220413-940-footer-ak&t=2&akid=940%2E90090%2E3djik9)
This is almost too wild to be true.
**Our far-right opponent Mike Gibbons said that middle-class Americans don’t pay “any kind of a fair share” of income taxes.**
That’s right: The _multi-millioniare_ front-runner for the GOP nomination for Senate wants to raise taxes on middle-class Ohioans — all while pursuing an agenda that would slash taxes on corporations and the wealthy.
I’m running for Senate to fight for an Ohio where corporations and multi-millionaires like Mike Gibbons finally pay THEIR fair share, not to raise taxes on those who are already struggling. **[Can you chip in right now to help fuel our grassroots campaign and fight back against GOP greed?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31344?t=3&akid=940%2E90090%2E3djik9)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31350?refcode=em20220413-940&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=940%2E90090%2E3djik9)**
These comments resurfaced after Senator Rick Scott, one of the leaders of the national GOP, released an economic agenda that would raise taxes on tens of millions of everyday Americans while cutting them for corporations and the ultra-rich. **I think that’s just wrong.**
Between this and his callous comments about people of color, Mike Gibbons’ mission is clear: **He wants to divide Ohioans based on what we look like and where we come from so he can rip off our communities and put money in the pockets of his wealthy friends.**
We need to stop this by fighting to bring solutions to the problems facing working families: affordable healthcare, a living wage and providing opportunity to all Ohioans.
That’s why I’m in this race for the U.S. Senate, and that’s why I’m asking you: **[can you donate $5 or whatever you can afford to help our people-powered movement stand up against the out-of-touch GOP and their tax-raising schemes?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31344?t=23&akid=940%2E90090%2E3djik9)**
Thanks for being a supporter — I couldn’t do this without you.
In solidarity,
Morgan
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31344?t=24&akid=940%2E90090%2E3djik9)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220413-940-footer&t=25&refcode2=940_90090_3djik9&akid=940%2E90090%2E3djik9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=940%2E90090%2E3djik9)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: New Poll Places McSwain in Strong Second Place
body:
The latest internal poll shows that McSwain has moved into second place among primary voters. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/new-poll-places-mcswain-in-strong-second-place?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| | April 13, 2022
**A Message From Team McSwain**
---
| To our Friends and Supporters,
We are reaching out today to share some very encouraging data from our latest internal poll, conducted by renowned pollster Jon Lerner of Red Sea LLC and Basswood Research. This poll demonstrates that Bill is surging and has moved into second place among primary voters.

Highlights from the poll are presented below:

Respondents are comprised of Republicans who are certain or very likely to vote in the May 17th primary.

**The statewide ballot numbers are as follows:**
Doug Mastriano 20%
Bill McSwain 16%
Lou Barletta 15%
Dave White 7%
Jake Corman 3%
Undecided 38%

McSwain's favorables (29%) and ballot share (16%) are the highest they have ever been. He is the only candidate who has continuously maintained an upward trajectory. At the bottom of this email is a breakdown of each candidate's trajectory from July 2021 through current.

Lou Barletta's ballot share has dropped to his lowest point thus far (15%). Dave White's ballot share has been cut in half since our March poll (7%). Doug Mastriano is holding steady at 20%.

Ideologically speaking, the data confirms that McSwain is the candidate that can unite voters across the conservative spectrum.

The two largest markets in the Commonwealth, which also house the most undecided voters, are also home to the highest number of McSwain voters:

**Philadelphia Media Market**
McSwain 16%
Barletta 14%
Mastriano 13%
White 8%
Corman 2.6%
Undecided 46%. (highest # of undecided)

**Pittsburgh Media Market:**
McSwain 22%
Mastriano 13%
Barletta 12%
White 6%
Corman 2%
Undecided 45% (second highest # of undecided).

All of this data shows that a primary victory is within reach. With your support, Bill McSwain has the opportunity to reach the vast majority of undecided voters and win this nomination.

Thank you for your continued support and we look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail and at future events.

Yours in the fight,

James Fitzpatrick
McSwain for Governor Campaign Manager
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=3398bc6708&e=b1ec95759b)
---
| | [](billmcswain.com)
---
|
---
| Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=98b4e803d4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=98b4e803d4).

clean_body: | | | | Please join Marc LIVE at the gubernatorial debate April 23rd Hi Friend, TIME SENSITIVE (ENDS THIS THURSDAY 4/14). We are so excited to INVITE YOU TO PARTICIPATE in the MOST IMPORTANT EVENT yetfor Marc and the campaign: the held at Mt. Hood Resort in Welches, Oregon, April 22-24. Saturday, April 22 at 6:30 pm is the much-anticipated dinner andGUBERNATORIAL DEBATE. Marc WILL BE ON THE DEBATE STAGE at this invite-only event. THE MEDIA is invited! Peter,

Are our emails still making it into your inbox?

We’re sending out this email to see how many people on our mailing list receive it and open the content within.

name: Team Vasquez
subject: Yvette Herrell is bad for public lands
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44100760/340097830/-241209467?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220413herrell_tv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzE4ZGM0YS02YmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQtmukA6scZQs3HFvNuXn4F9GSwAphe5oh9b5ah162M=)
---
Team, New Mexico is home to an abundance of public land — our deserts, forests, and mountains are connected to our cultures, economy, history, and traditions. Our public lands provide our communities with a diverse range of uses like hiking, fishing, hunting, biking, camping, grazing, and more. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44100762/340097833/-241209467?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220413herrell_tv_90da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzE4ZGM0YS02YmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZQtmukA6scZQs3HFvNuXn4F9GSwAphe5oh9b5ah162M=)
---
Gabe has devoted years of his life toward protecting our public lands and passing on his love of the outdoors to young people, because he firmly believes it’s our responsibility to conserve these special places for present and future generations. One of Gabe’s earliest memories is fishing for catfish with his Dad under the bridge in Hatch.
**Yvette Herrell, on the other hand, is a member of the anti-public lands caucus and puts the interests of corporate CEOs over those of New Mexicans.**
In her short tenure in Congress, Herrell has:
* Voted against a bill to help New Mexico clean up industry-abandoned oil and gas wells that pollute our air, water, and threaten wildlife; and

* Has refused to support Sen. Heinrich’s bipartisan Recovering America’s Wildlife Act, which would fund conservation of threatened and endangered species and provide millions of dollars to Tribal nations for conservation efforts. She’s even referred to endangered species and habitat conservation as “federal overreach.”

And as a state legislator, Herrell:
* Tried to create a commission to study the transfer of federal public lands, a bill that two Republicans joined six Democrats to stop right here in New Mexico; and

* Received the “State Chair of the Year Award” from ALEC, a Koch-funded organization that actively works to undermine environmental regulations and deny climate change.

_If you care about the conservation of New Mexico’s public lands and wildlife, Herrell is not the representative for you. Gabe will fight for our public lands and work to balance energy production with the conservation of our air, land, water, and wildlife._
That’s why Gabe is endorsed by the League of Conservation Voters, New Mexico Wild Action, and the National Wildlife Federation Action Fund!

clean_body: | = Team, New Mexico is home to an abundance of public land — our deserts, forests, and mountains are connected to our cultures, economy, history, and traditions. Our public lands provide our communities with a diverse range of uses like hiking, fishing, hunting, biking, camping, grazing, and more. | = Gabe has devoted years of his life toward protecting our public lands and passing on his love of the outdoors to young people, because he firmly believes it’s our responsibility to conserve these special places for present and future generations. One of Gabe’s earliest memories is fishing for catfish with his Dad under the bridge in Hatch. Yvette Herrell, on the other hand, is a member of the anti-public lands caucus and puts the interests of corporate CEOs over those of New Mexicans. In her short tenure in Congress, Herrell has: Voted against a bill to help New Mexico clean up industry-abandoned oil and gas wells that pollute our air, water, and threaten wildlife; and Has refused to support Sen. Heinrich’s bipartisan Recovering America’s Wildlife Act, which would fund conservation of threatened and endangered species and provide millions of dollars to Tribal nations for conservation efforts. She’s even referred to endangered species and habitat conservation as “federal overreach.” And as a state legislator, Herrell: Tried to create a commission to study the transfer of federal public lands, a bill that two Republicans joined six Democrats to stop right here in New Mexico; and Received the “State Chair of the Year Award” from ALEC, a Koch-funded organization that actively works to undermine environmental regulations and deny climate change. If you care about the conservation of New Mexico’s public lands and wildlife, Herrell is not the representative for you. Gabe will fight for our public lands and work to balance energy production with the conservation of our air, land, water, and wildlife. That’s why Gabe is endorsed by the League of Conservation Voters, New Mexico Wild Action, and the National Wildlife Federation Action Fund! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Team Vasquez | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District.
