[Can you contribute now to help us communicate with voters ahead of the primary?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44106536/340140635/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220413primarydate_tw_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDY0OTM4MC04ZGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJM8W7I46sjTrcV7HzD-mlpbTGyh5JLWgpSIcCca2-I=) | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44106537/340140636/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220413primarydate_tw_90da_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDY0OTM4MC04ZGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJM8W7I46sjTrcV7HzD-mlpbTGyh5JLWgpSIcCca2-I=)

Team Wes has come out in full force to support this campaign. From office openings to fundraising deadlines to policy roll outs, the energy and enthusiasm for this campaign is real. And we believe we have the winning plan to secure the Democratic nomination and flip the Governorship in November.
We know we’ve asked you for a lot lately, but we want to tell you why chipping in _**now**_ is so important for Wes to win the Democratic nomination:
* Changing the primary from June to July means we need to raise even more money to engage voters. We’re already up with ads, but we need to sustain our outreach for a longer period of time and more strategically to ensure voters are aware of our vision for Maryland.

* July primaries are uncommon in Maryland — That means we need to work even harder to turn out voters to secure the nomination. It’s going to take a bigger, stronger, and fully funded field program to mobilize voters.

That’s where you come in.
**Team Wes is all hands on deck for the next 96 days — and we need folks like you to power our winning plan.** [So, if you’re able, chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can now to push this campaign over the finish line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44106538/340140637/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220413primarydate_tw_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDY0OTM4MC04ZGJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJM8W7I46sjTrcV7HzD-mlpbTGyh5JLWgpSIcCca2-I=)

clean_body: Friends, we need all hands on deck for the next 96 days. | = Friends — Late this afternoon, the Maryland Court of Appeals officially confirmed our primary date is July 19 — just 96 days away. = | = Team Wes has come out in full force to support this campaign. From office openings to fundraising deadlines to policy roll outs, the energy and enthusiasm for this campaign is real. And we believe we have the winning plan to secure the Democratic nomination and flip the Governorship in November. We know we’ve asked you for a lot lately, but we want to tell you why chipping in now is so important for Wes to win the Democratic nomination: Changing the primary from June to July means we need to raise even more money to engage voters. We’re already up with ads, but we need to sustain our outreach for a longer period of time and more strategically to ensure voters are aware of our vision for Maryland. July primaries are uncommon in Maryland — That means we need to work even harder to turn out voters to secure the nomination. It’s going to take a bigger, stronger, and fully funded field program to mobilize voters. That’s where you come in. Team Wes is all hands on deck for the next 96 days — and we need folks like you to power our winning plan. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for everything you do, Team Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Team Mondaire
subject: We need Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Friend,
Health care is a human right, yet the United States is one of the few developed countries that does not provide its citizens with universal coverage and instead prioritizes lining the pockets of corporations.
Mondaire is fighting for universal health care because growing up, he watched his grandmother, like so many seniors in our country, work well past retirement age just to afford prescription drugs, dental care, and the basic medical procedures needed to survive. Far too many Americans can say the same.
In the richest nation in the world, too many folks have risked financial ruin or gone without necessary medical care. It’s time for our government to pass Medicare for All to ensure every American has comprehensive health care and to cap the annual cost of prescription drugs.
**[Mondaire is working to guarantee that every American is insured, no matter their employment status. Friend, please add your name next to Mondaire’s to show your support for his efforts to get Medicare for All across the finish line:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44101262/340100365/-1219401548?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220413_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBmZGViMS02Y2JiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=85zY7YAiJmmTAaPg1nLkKeHG7EwmyOZXgDzZmqDU_3M=&emci=598c5bdd-6bbb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d40fdeb1-6cbb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44101271/340100373/-1219401548?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220413_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBmZGViMS02Y2JiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=85zY7YAiJmmTAaPg1nLkKeHG7EwmyOZXgDzZmqDU_3M=&emci=598c5bdd-6bbb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d40fdeb1-6cbb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)**
The coronavirus pandemic has exposed many of the gaps in our existing social safety net. And the global pandemic we face demonstrates the need for health care as a human right, regardless of income or employment, as well as mandatory paid sick leave. Every American should be able to visit a doctor when needed and fill prescriptions without breaking the bank.
This legislation is necessary to protect the health of folks across our nation, and it will also put hundreds of dollars back into the pockets of hardworking Americans and boost our economy. Together, we can support Mondaire’s efforts to pass this critical legislation.
**[So if you agree we need Medicare for All to help ensure every American can receive high-quality health care, please add your name next to Mondaire’s to call on Congress to pass this critical legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44101275/340100382/-1219401548?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220413_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDBmZGViMS02Y2JiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=85zY7YAiJmmTAaPg1nLkKeHG7EwmyOZXgDzZmqDU_3M=&emci=598c5bdd-6bbb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d40fdeb1-6cbb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24719896)**

— Team Mondaire

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: What the midterm elections mean
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s going to be a lot of work from now until November, and we’re relying on our grassroots supporters to help support this fight.
#
Peter,
Pramila has been through several tough fights in her life — as an organizer, as a newly elected House member, and as the Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. She knows the 2022 midterm elections will be one of the toughest fights yet. We need to elect more progressives and protect our Democratic majorities in Congress.
Earlier this year, Pramila supported Greg Casar, a progressive champion in a deep blue district. He won and will add to our fight for the people in Congress.
Last week, Pramila endorsed 5 progressive primary candidates who are unafraid to stand up to corporate greed and fight hard to deliver for the people.
And for months, Pramila has been working hard with the Democratic majority to ensure Democrats in difficult races against Republicans have the support they need to win.
**Peter, it’s a lot, especially as Pramila continues to fight for transformative legislation in Congress. It’s going to be a lot of work from now until November, and we’re relying on our grassroots supporters to help fuel this fight.**
[**Can you chip in $3 right now to help Pramila elect more progressives to Congress and protect our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12363?refcode=em20220413-1182&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1182%2E420207%2E7jvFam) _We set an important goal to bring in 222 more grassroots donations before the end of the week to hit 1,000 total for April._
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12363?refcode=em20220413-1182&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1182%2E420207%2E7jvFam)**
When you donate to our movement, you’re helping fund:
* Our work during an election year to protect and expand our Democratic majorities in Congress. We can’t let the GOP take back power.
* Pramila’s tireless advocacy to combat the influence of corporations and big money special interests.
* Pramila’s work in Congress to deliver for working people, families, and our communities. We can make bold, transformative change happen and pass our progressive priorities.

When you donate to our movement, you're showing up for our urgent fights. Together we have achieved so much since Pramila was first elected to Congress in 2016, and together we'll continue the fight for transformative change so we can deliver for the millions of people that put President Biden in the White House and Democrats in control of the House and Senate.
[**Please, make one of the 222 grassroots donations we need before the end of the week. 2022 is going to be a big year and we need your support.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12363?refcode=em20220413-1182&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1182%2E420207%2E7jvFam)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220413-1182-footer&t=22&refcode2=1182_420207_7jvFam&akid=1182%2E420207%2E7jvFam)**

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: Outspent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You need to see this.
#
Republican self-funding Senate candidate, David McCormick, just released his Q1 fundraising numbers.
And Derek, you need to see this...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47279?refcode=em20220413-5378&t=1&akid=5378%2E434096%2E18FLLA)
David McCormick raised $4.3 million last quarter. For the record, that’s $1.2 million more than our campaign brought in.
**The difference is we raised over $3 million from grassroots supporters across Pennsylvania.** David McCormick’s campaign likely raised a majority of his millions through shady high-dollar donors and self-funding.
Even though we know we raised our funds the right way, it still doesn’t change the fact that we could now be outspent by the McCormick campaign. **That’s why we need all hands on deck to help close the gap and make sure we’re able to keep up with our GOP opponents.**
**[Rush a donation of any amount today to help our campaign close the fundraising gap and make sure the McCormick campaign isn’t able to outspend us. We need to raise an additional $35,000 by Friday at midnight to stay on track.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47279?refcode=em20220413-5378&t=2&akid=5378%2E434096%2E18FLLA)**
**[Rush $5»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47279?amount=5&refcode=em20220413-5378&t=3&akid=5378%2E434096%2E18FLLA)**
From self-funding to dropping over $40 million on TV ads, it’s clear that the GOP thinks they can buy this seat. We can’t let them get away with that, Derek.
John Fetterman is the only Democrat in this race who is beating both Dr. Oz and David McCormick in the polls. **He’s our best chance at flipping this seat blue, and he needs your support.**
**[If you’re ready to defeat these two self-funding conservatives and their super PACs, please consider chipping in a donation of any amount today to help us raise an additional $35,000 before Friday night so we can make sure our opponents aren’t able to outspend us.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47279?refcode=em20220413-5378&t=4&akid=5378%2E434096%2E18FLLA)**
**[Rush $5»](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47279?amount=5&refcode=em20220413-5378&t=23&akid=5378%2E434096%2E18FLLA)**
With your help, we’ll be able to keep up with McCormick, Dr. Oz, and their super PACs through small-dollar and grassroots donations — AKA the way all campaigns should be funded.
We’re just over a month out from the primary. Let’s sprint through the finish line together, okay?
—Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220413-5378-footer&t=24&refcode2=5378_434096_18FLLA&akid=5378%2E434096%2E18FLLA)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

Even though we know we raised our funds the right way, it still doesn’t change the fact that we could now be outspent by the McCormick campaign. That’s why we need all hands on deck to help close the gap and make sure we’re able to keep up with our GOP opponents. From self-funding to dropping over $40 million on TV ads, it’s clear that the GOP thinks they can buy this seat. We can’t let them get away with that, Derek. John Fetterman is the only Democrat in this race who is beating both Dr. Oz and David McCormick in the polls. He’s our best chance at flipping this seat blue, and he needs your support. With your help, we’ll be able to keep up with McCormick, Dr. Oz, and their super PACs through small-dollar and grassroots donations — AKA the way all campaigns should be funded. We’re just over a month out from the primary. Let’s sprint through the finish line together, okay? —Fetterman HQ | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

\- - - - Forwarded Message - - - -

**From:** **Vice President Kamala Harris**
**Subject:** My tie-breaking vote in the Senate
**Date:** Mon, Mar 28, 2022 at 4:11 PM
---
---
With just three days until the first end-of-quarter deadline of 2022, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain what’s at stake in this year’s midterms, **and then make a $7 donation to the DNC to help reach their goal by Thursday.**
---
With a 50-50 split in the Senate, I can cast a deciding vote. **But if we lose just _one seat_ , I can’t break the tie, and the Biden-Harris agenda will be at risk.** That’s why we need to protect Democrats in tough races, and fight to elect more Democrats, too. The DNC is at the forefront of this work, and that’s why I’m coming to you today.
---
**If you can, Friend, chip in $7 to the DNC ahead of Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline. Democrats nationwide will be counting on a strong DNC to maintain and expand our congressional majorities this fall.**
---
---
I won’t sugarcoat it, Friend: Our majorities are incredibly slim, and only a handful of races will determine which party sets the agenda for the next two years. That’s why it’s so important that we support the DNC in building the party infrastructure it’ll take to expand our majorities.
---
**If you’re able, please join me in supporting the DNC with a $7 donation today. Your support is incredibly important.**
---
Thank you for all you do for Democrats and for this country.
---
Kamala
---
Kamala Harris
Vice President of the United States
---
---

Out-of-touch, far-right politicians haven’t gotten anything done. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aJegxlzx0WErTIW4hjJyWkR3J90f6KLMbnzRCJwbZ8APoNXc1Fnu1bI6YqEmlCS0-b6-6kDwkK8tiU_yg7Ov1BVxKLOBeNuac9fCFeufk1FXA5BxTNcRU9cL4N-AvNhp61M7WZNdojV62Bz6dOjzqypyTr3SzOluLPhBtTeaJeDIfd-d9iS7MUUAuivYxEPr-lwJpDBS1-SUkbbpEba1vz6C0VWaqjkPO6AJSirJhQCd9sV__xVhW8htzidO1z6-vQq3jc-XfvJASjMyivfSULc/3l6/CZAxb78eSjWGc-JzXw4_JQ/h0/M7fkgbdKBp-ZGeT-caJp5HGkXoATSX19OPFqxVv-UBs) Peter, Let’s be real, we’ve got some pretty terrible representation up on Capitol Hill right now. Take our Senator, Marsha Blackburn. When she’s not making a fool of herself in Judiciary Committee hearings demanding an exceptionally qualified judge like Ketanji Brown Jackson answer questions like “define a woman,” she’s tweeting this: [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEicKXNrkpRJxtuprXAVVvgQH0C8CVq6P66OOFSJHJsy9-kcyWUH0dL4gyrqKbbJdbQzZpntez--tGSYglD3GXLkpPfe-p2Yto27gFCQ3M39pvOM_gpSSZI-r3TZ4JDdyt_gkO7EmjlYotKv-rE37N4JaEXGHBU-vHGBQQMSSO6vp0liqpQY5FVXsftYivoQl6uVv13t2sizyZwSZIKueZBvqra43kLcMta4rC12gWvV3Tw4rAxeu2_fOBklUj1s-XD6N30SH7URrA8ghFiUu88ugfJVa5CGi5FPEtHx9NDjSfIVQ9gYe2NfFfCY_vIMKWa8OHcEy9VzjOj-1BEsAhECQ/3l6/CZAxb78eSjWGc-JzXw4_JQ/h1/-rpMhbZzPDB7JMx-ZnORKgKFsNwLtN9mx11aabgeQQs) Clearly, Marsha is just posturing for GOP likes. **I don’t know anybody in Tennessee who wants a wall between us and Mississippi (Marsha’s home state), Alabama, or Georgia!** What folks I talk to DO want are representatives who take their concerns seriously, who work hard to make the government and the economy work better for families like yours and mine, and who care about working people. **That’s not Sen. clean_body: Out-of-touch, far-right politicians haven’t gotten anything done. | | | Peter, Let’s be real, we’ve got some pretty terrible representation up on Capitol Hill right now. Take our Senator, Marsha Blackburn. When she’s not making a fool of herself in Judiciary Committee hearings demanding an exceptionally qualified judge like Ketanji Brown Jackson answer questions like “define a woman,” she’s tweeting this: Clearly, Marsha is just posturing for GOP likes. I don’t know anybody in Tennessee who wants a wall between us and Mississippi (Marsha’s home state), Alabama, or Georgia! What folks I talk to DO want are representatives who take their concerns seriously, who work hard to make the government and the economy work better for families like yours and mine, and who care about working people. That’s not Sen. Marsha Blackburn, and that’s certainly not Rep. Mark Green. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Out-of-touch, far-right politicians like Mark Green and Marsha Blackburn haven’t gotten anything done for TN-07 or for Tennessee in years. Every chance they get, they vote against making things easier for working families and vote FOR putting more money in the pockets of corporations and the wealthy. Together, Odessa Kelly | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Tim Aalders
subject: Release: Tim Aalders Crushes Fundraising Numbers to Challenge John Curtis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Aalders for Congress
body:
Highland, UT – Conservative Republican Tim Aalders, candidate for Congress in Utah’s Third Congressional District, revealed in filings with the Federal Election Commission pre-convention report that he raised over $676,000, and had just over $607,000 cash on hand to challenge incumbent John Curtis in the June 28 primary. Curtis’s reports showed he had $772,000 cash on hand, and in a very distant third was Jason Preston who showed just under $18,000 on hand.

| Tim Aalders for Congress
**News Release**
_For Immediate Release
April 13, 2022_
_**Media contact:**_ [info@VoteTimAalders.com](mailto:info@VoteTimAalders.com)
_**Tim Aalders Crushes Fundraising Numbers to Challenge John Curtis**_
**_Has almost $600,000 more than next challenger in race _**
_Highland, UT_ – Conservative Republican Tim Aalders, candidate for Congress in Utah’s Third Congressional District, revealed in filings with the Federal Election Commission pre-convention report that he raised over $676,000, and had just over $607,000 cash on hand to challenge incumbent John Curtis in the June 28 primary. Curtis’s reports showed he had $772,000 cash on hand, and in a very distant third was Jason Preston who showed just under $18,000 on hand.

Aalders stated, **“Challenging an incumbent is tough, and you have to be able to go toe to toe financially in order to win. While I hope that the delegates at the Utah Republican Convention hear what I have to say and choose me as the Republican nominee for the Third Congressional District, history shows that the battle may not be over after the April 23 event. It may not be decided until the June 28 primary. If that were to happen these numbers show that my team will be the only campaign that will have the resources to successfully take on the incumbent in the primary.”**

Aalders continued, **“Campaigns are about winning. If the conservatives in the Republican Party want to change the direction of Washington DC they need to elect conservative members of Congress. But you can’t just be conservative and expect to win. You have to have a team with the resources to make that happen. I want to thank all of those that have supported me in the last month since I declared for this race for their support, and I will work hard to convince them that if they want to win on June 28 that I will need their vote at the Utah Republican Convention on April 23.”**
-30-
* * *
Tim Aalders is a small business owner and longtime Utah based syndicated talk radio host running to become Utah’s next Congressman from the Third Congressional District. For more information see [www.VoteTimAalders.com](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=151901&L=82766&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Alan Keyes Joins Trump and Many Others in Endorsing McGeachin for Governor!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Piercy Robinson Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
Former Ambassador Alan Keyes has joined President Trump, Michelle Malkin, Sen. Wendy Rogers, and others in endorsing Janice McGeachin for Governor. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/04-13-22?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=3a776881e6&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| **I have some exciting news about our campaign to Make Idaho Free Again!** Former Ambassador [**Alan Keyes**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=6b5fd55492&e=823fa8e224) has joined President Trump, Michelle Malkin, Sen. Wendy Rogers, and others in endorsing Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor. The full endorsement from Alan Keyes is below. _“I am endorsing Janice McGeachin to be the next Governor of Idaho. Janice is a committed supporter of the right to life, steadfastly defending the unborn. She is a warrior for freedom, and she is the true fighter Idahoans need right now in their battle to restore individual liberty to the people._ _Janice will work to safeguard the integrity of our elections and to reduce the unfair taxes being imposed on Idahoans. She will continue to fight for school choice and work to make sure parents are supported in their efforts to choose how and where their children are educated. Janice will always be a voice for the forgotten; she will always stand up for conservative principles and ensure that the people of Idaho are represented at the highest level of state government.”_ I wanted to update you on some of the other endorsements we have received. Of course, there is the endorsement from [**President Donald Trump**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=fa5ddf151d&e=823fa8e224): _“I am giving Janice McGeachin my Complete and Total Endorsement to be the next Governor of Idaho. She will make a fantastic Governor, and will never let you down!”_ And the endorsement from the America First rock star [**Michelle Malkin**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7d5609de3b&e=823fa8e224): _“She’s got guts. ... Janice McGeachin is the kind of defiant GOP leader we need and I wholeheartedly endorse (along with Donald Trump). Empty-suit surrenderists won’t keep Idaho and America free, safe and great. Bold, uncontrolled and unafraid fighters on the frontlines will.”_ I have also received the endorsement of election integrity champion [**Arizona State Senator Wendy Rogers**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7d26dff311&e=823fa8e224): _“I endorse Lt. Gov. Janice McGeachin for governor of Idaho. She is a fighter who stands on conservative principles... I encourage all patriots to get behind her campaign to help her protect Idaho from communism.”_ Recently, I received endorsements from [**Dr. James Lindsay**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7a18ea6bfa&e=823fa8e224) and [**Trevor Loudon**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=73e59c9d62&e=823fa8e224) when they were here in Idaho speaking at the Empowering Parents & Teachers Symposium. If you didn't get to attend the event, please watch the videos of their powerful presentations. (Click on their names above to see the videos.) Our children are being targeted and we must fight back!
---
|
---
| I have received numerous endorsements from local committees and organizations including Kootenai County Republican Central Committee, Benewah County Republican Central Committee, Bonner County Republican Central Committee, Lemhi County Tea Party, Republican Liberty Caucus, Conservatives of, and Conservatives of Washington County.
---
|
## Recent Events
In addition to the [Empowering Parents & Teachers Symposium](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=cbd654fcc5&e=823fa8e224), I recently attended the [Bingham County Lincoln Day](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2133200b6d&e=823fa8e224) and the Conservatives of Meridian meeting.
---
|
---
---
|
---
| One final note: **SAVE THE DATE** for the evening of **May 4th!** We have a very special event coming up, which will be announced with more details soon.
---
|
### It's less than _FIVE_ weeks until the Election!
---
| You know how critical this primary election is to protecting Idaho's future. Our individual rights, our state sovereignty, and our traditional conservative values are all in grave danger if we don't succeed! Please help us **Make Idaho Free Again** by [**Donating**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=54e076257d&e=823fa8e224) [**$25**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=9a0aef39e5&e=823fa8e224), [**$50**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=42418995d0&e=823fa8e224), or [**$100**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=bd37ce2808&e=823fa8e224) today!
---
| [DONATE Today!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=5b9a388a3b&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE Today!")
---
| Sincerely,

Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=c1dd6fb903&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7fe2d3e064&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1100394aee&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=cf7b6523e4&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=dacc5bd5df&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---
| | | | | | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=45d9f57728&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1c042b630d&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=f656c197af&e=823fa8e224)
---
| [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=0ae62d1c10&e=823fa8e224)

subject: Paul Gosar is attending a white nationalist party onHitler’s birthday

body:
| | | We have to stop his influence | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xGNgSOcK69V9wA954q_Nti2PkH3kOJjKJc45XfIo9tEwRPc1eLW35HEA3cTkW9XLrHLI0zp72nPpJ87WfpncsNxfiPhAdnGzodEuyylBZ4R6e94bV5yqZkR1hOcYGLLSToqh8zB53dHrczyeHpZtfnBUZjgBYhD3NgRxwFQOSY2Rvoe9fYulS6toZuXc7bcXEx5MbVHYm-1-4_Zfa6lFQnXepA0KueICVdjxon6F07Hx9WrYB0B_b90bXEe7vdXuIK9NErhlTJLYigm5u45kEbiYHCSGAEl928_0oIm960S1XBPsb4cNuMdLb797P2W_6VT07lb1T828HEJDpDzbkAp-r-YCKV1RRTKHKfZmnTO2cVFoTMBrssDjndzfi_xoDk_6x8gkxzJAQ1bhWLojrueLQQXKsia82wKm7nqhMDmAg4ACRqHXaYX496c7qqxKHEpGjJecwpffLeK7WO3l7zzrhpgJFXuJIAyAI6TVP6nwng0l9_U6T4MJGaaF_b5fVUAHGxZEraPvahclm6_SdB/3l6/GCIOGpx4TimEEHDkGgLBag/h0/gA3h2WwkMozadmu7BROdNmvq1voeZ23mUNvQhVx3aDk)

---
| Team, it’s no surprise that Paul Gosar is attending a white nationalist group’s event.

He’s been attending said events for years and repeatedly praises white nationalist leaders. But attending a **white nationalist event on Hitler’s birthday is an embarrassing new low.**

Despite several high-profile moments that should be embarrassing, the reality is that Gosar’s influence is growing in Arizona. And the AZ GOP just sits quietly, scandal after scandal.

**[Team, Gosar is a dangerous white supremacist with far more power and influence than he deserves. His behavior cannot and will not stand. clean_body: | | | We have to stop his influence | | | Team, it’s no surprise that Paul Gosar is attending a white nationalist group’s event. He’s been attending said events for years and repeatedly praises white nationalist leaders. But attending a white nationalist event on Hitler’s birthday is an embarrassing new low. Despite several high-profile moments that should be embarrassing, the reality is that Gosar’s influence is growing in Arizona. And the AZ GOP just sits quietly, scandal after scandal. Republicans both in Arizona and Congress have refused to distance themselves from Gosar, no matter what he says, what he tweets, or which groups he aligns himself with. So, it is up to us to step up and hold Paul Gosar accountable. The GOP has known all along about his actions and what he represents– yet they have done nothing but support him. In fact, Gosar said the lack of ramifications from the GOP allows him to stir up more trouble, and Congressional Republicans have promised to elevate him if they take control once again. name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Shop our new Team Booker Merch →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Whether you’re wearing our t-shirts, putting a sticker on your laptop, or walking around in our baseball cap — rocking our merch is a powerful way of letting folks know that you’re proud to be a part of Team Booker and our historic movement to replace Rand Paul.
#
Check out our new Team Booker merch, Peter!
[](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17733?t=1&akid=1757%2E346206%2ECutJ2T)Whether you’re wearing our t-shirts, putting a sticker on your laptop, or walking around in our baseball cap — rocking our merch is a powerful way of letting folks know that you’re proud to be a part of Team Booker and our historic movement to replace Rand Paul.
**[We hope you’ll check out our online shop to shop all the new items we just added! Every purchase you make goes directly toward funding our people-powered campaign so we can replace Rand Paul.](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17733?t=2&akid=1757%2E346206%2ECutJ2T)**
**[Go to merch store →](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17733?t=3&akid=1757%2E346206%2ECutJ2T)**
We know that if we want to bring real, meaningful change to Kentucky, we need to run a different kind of campaign than Rand Paul.
**That’s why we don’t accept a single cent from corporate PACs or special interests like Big Pharma.** This means we rely on grassroots donations from everyday folks who support our movement to elect a working-class champion to represent Kentucky. _Another critical part of our fundraising also comes from merch sales._
**We set a goal to raise $5,000 from merch sales this week to make sure we stay on track with our fundraising — especially now as we’re gearing up to expand our voter outreach work.**
[**Peter, we really hope you’ll check out our merch store today and make a purchase to help power our movement to replace Rand Paul. Every $5 you spend on campaign merch gives us the funds to reach 100 voters in Kentucky.**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17733?t=4&akid=1757%2E346206%2ECutJ2T)
_And 100% of our items in the shop are made by unionized workers, located right here in the USA!_
Thank you for everything,
Team Booker

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220413-1757-footer&t=5&refcode2=1757_346206_CutJ2T&akid=1757%2E346206%2ECutJ2T)**
---
Email us: [info@charlesbooker.org](mailto: info@charlesbooker.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. To contribute via check, please address to PO Box 4369, Louisville, KY 40204.

We set a goal to raise $5,000 from merch sales this week to make sure we stay on track with our fundraising — especially now as we’re gearing up to expand our voter outreach work. And 100% of our items in the shop are made by unionized workers, located right here in the USA! Thank you for everything, Team Booker Email us: mailto: info@charlesbooker.org

Liberal bureaucrats think they know how to raise your kids better than you do.

It started with anti-science mask mandates for children, and now the left’s delusion is endangering our children once again.

Starting this year, New Jersey Public Schools will start teaching FIRST GRADERS about gender identity.

subject: Liberals are making life unaffordable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor |
body:
It's not just gas prices and groceries. Rent prices rose 20% across Nevada over the last year.| | | [](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=6dd24d1eef164370b128b8a880282523&_e=Xl_DORoOuHvKCWItP_bUyICMW9EcS2LVQ1vbrcEY2UPmCQVhstvNgDqHG-WTjyE1RuM9HHyInb_PiToOBG7Tf-Fl_8eQvK8oC5MXyNjL5vcJ7ZwWEUajNpX4MhdjTPaWJNxmE0-MpHGFp4oZrCmnNKiXthJK2KGBdLK72PBxZ3bR0mA4t_QTyO4t0edX6HYX44GomuMfGLdPjuMxKfIgiLFU5giQcRPhlA_B9ERiVEBLeRhGAHeEJmXXsqm2T4287sf0ST0t4u75PYHOPbLcakcvLTfSR-NRkASMl2Of7LWplsi7fG4yTzUaBMNb9tsFLpOVHF1iJQZv_5Hq2D0NAgr4WgMCCA7MXaTj6TnGsE_PoMRAR4r1pdW_RI34UlGiFzX48uBDPohQRUra4jG6RjZ9GYpB2bQPLxcIo9S7R5vvaWcijCoi8lhXTqxu020OAidL1uZrxIN3SR9j3zePRU3Du5It5kTL4V9vyOjAt6mTjinm8wgss8jBXWf2sgnL)
---
| | Peter, In Nevada and across the country, liberals are making life unaffordable for so many people who were thriving just a short time ago. It's not just gas prices and groceries. Rent prices have skyrocketed **20%** over the last year as wealthy Californians flock to our state, drive up living costs, and bring their liberal agenda with them. **Steve Sisolak is turning Nevada into East California one day at a time, and we must stop him this November.**
---
| | [](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=6dd24d1eef164370b128b8a880282523&_e=Xl_DORoOuHvKCWItP_bUyICMW9EcS2LVQ1vbrcEY2UPmCQVhstvNgDqHG-WTjyE1RuM9HHyInb_PiToOBG7Tf-Fl_8eQvK8oC5MXyNjL5vcJ7ZwWEUajNpX4MhdjTPaWJNxmE0-MpHGFp4oZrCmnNKiXthJK2KGBdLK72PBxZ3bR0mA4t_QTyO4t0edX6HYX44GomuMfGLdPjuMxKfIgiLFU5giQcRPhlA_B9ERiVEBLeRhGAHeEJmXXsqm2T4287sf0ST0t4u75PYHOPbLcakcvLTfSR-NRkASMl2Of7LVZgIzYbmi4uiiI8zW-KG33QGCX5GgeXpnOfAX5YpFYcm-x7FYlkoyikb3DUuDHR9qpwCF4mpdr_WRBPZpsPSypYBw1U_M7GYSFwJIJInPeUQ4IZOuv5OLxFLPDHIw3fMO4JOq6OOl2FnSi4J9oXuRCHrP6pbD2Nu8i1mXJkcRmCdgCPSwahJUWVLSGhOc_GNE7QuuksvPUDFtodjYcPoau)
---
| | Outside of everyday goods and living expenses, the absolute LAST thing we can afford in Nevada is for Steve Sisolak to be governor another FOUR years. We need a governor who understands the struggles we face, knows how to get us back on track, and will **make Nevada affordable again.** Dean is the ONLY true conservative in this race and the ONLY leader who can win the fight for lower taxes, relief at the pump, and a Nevada that we can finally afford –– _but it’s not going to be possible without you!_ _[**Show Dean you’re with him >>>**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=6dd24d1eef164370b128b8a880282523&_e=Xl_DORoOuHvKCWItP_bUyICMW9EcS2LVQ1vbrcEY2UPmCQVhstvNgDqHG-WTjyE1RuM9HHyInb_PiToOBG7Tf-Fl_8eQvK8oC5MXyNjL5vcJ7ZwWEUajNpX4MhdjTPaWJNxmE0-MpHGFp4oZrCmnNKiXthJK2KGBdLK72PBxZ3bR0mA4t_QTyO4t0edX6HYX44GomuMfGLdPjuMxKfIgiLFU5giQcRPhlA_B9ERiVEBLeRhGAHeEJmXXsqm2T4287sf0ST0t4u75PYHOPbLcakcvLTfSR-NRkASMl2Of7LUJVYgRESzXA87ggvD-rvAkuJcYvu80OSyXT8BdItGYQanFMH5MVA0zSwLcpsAhkWOH6QDA2T0QrbzLB5I_4tj-Gi_uktajIL2-dbPllF5_E_M14yMYfQY6Z-IH70iZoXdXliGBCinXPs8nBXSiTBJvQt6ZaKyzHKM6dhY2GTzadNR6AX9pLBv-h18vrNsmEWt0ORtak5OVc9dx4QDesbT2)_
---
[**MAKE NEVADA AFFORDABLE AGAIN**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=6dd24d1eef164370b128b8a880282523&_e=Xl_DORoOuHvKCWItP_bUyICMW9EcS2LVQ1vbrcEY2UPmCQVhstvNgDqHG-WTjyE1RuM9HHyInb_PiToOBG7Tf-Fl_8eQvK8oC5MXyNjL5vcJ7ZwWEUajNpX4MhdjTPaWJNxmE0-MpHGFp4oZrCmnNKiXthJK2KGBdLK72PBxZ3bR0mA4t_QTyO4t0edX6HYX44GomuMfGLdPjuMxKfIgiLFU5giQcRPhlA_B9ERiVEBLeRhGAHeEJmXXsqm2T4287sf0ST0t4u75PYHOPbLcakcvLTfSR-NRkASMl2Of7LVKX1_j-zo4vkRQkl9i_XeZIqa3mLtOo46oxXMEGjL1oncyIVPvTXEaA0HX6NTjbHTgqMMvp8DOCjK5BXxC0tAjjDJYx2DBadaa9w--7Ebo3ebTgoIWiZzYiQZsR6J_F560c3ipl2vzCL_U2a_1zls_-sdqXv5qBB31jkBs8JQr1-G1-sq96m74YDU73oMKJU864tvNDI2i5MBFtaZ9-q8z)
---

body:
Join me as I discuss all of the day's news! | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=81ee1a7379&e=c2296cffff)

| | Hi Friend,
I'm excited to tell you I've once again been asked to appear as a panelist on **Newsmax TV’s** **_Wake Up America_ tomorrow morning _ _** to discuss our conservative values that make America great! So many of you told me you caught me the last time I was on. I hope you'll consider tuning in once again!

We'll be discussing all of the day's news like the federal transportation mask mandate that was just extended by two weeks. I echo our Governor, Ron DeSantis, who called out the Biden Administration for this "COVID theater".

We'll also talk about the GOP's push to shine light on the Hunter Biden investigation. We need transparency - the Democrats cannot get away with hiding the facts any longer!

**Join me tomorrow morning at 9:40 a.m. **

Grab your coffee and make us part of your day!

Amanda Makki ****

**With just 15 days until early voting starts, our campaign is gaining incredible momentum.** [**Will you chip in $5 to help us build on this momentum and spread the word about Erica to every corner of our district? Thank you!
Team Erica Smith
Erica Smith is a single mother, educator, and three-term state senator, who grew up on her family farm and spent her life fighting for rural Eastern North Carolina. Now, she’s running to represent NC-01 — _her home district_ – in Congress, where she’ll fight for economic justice and workers’ rights, universal healthcare, voting rights, and more. **[Add a donation to help us protect this competitive, open U.S. House seat and give power back to working people »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48777?refcode=em20220413-1086-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=1086%2E3698%2EiN-H1y)** **[Donate](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48777?refcode=em20220413-1086-box&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=26&akid=1086%2E3698%2EiN-H1y)**

name: Josh Lafazan
subject: I will never forget our vets
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44104132/340112947/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWZlMjY0NC03OWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wbm4pGHEmEVDG0IH-yZbg2X9BJaI10W5Xf25jr5_xxw=&emci=14bd4c7a-59bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=befe2644-79bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=17773801)
---

| | Peter, Three years ago this month, a convoy carrying U.S. Marine Sgt. Robert A. Hendriks was returning to base near Bagram airfield in Afghanistan when they were ambushed by a car loaded with explosives. Sgt. Hendriks, a proud son of Locust Valley, was killed in the attack, along with two of his brothers in arms. Long Island lost a noble member of our community. America lost a dedicated soldier. And a mother lost her son. Last year, I was honored to lead a community effort to rename a street in Locust Valley after Sgt. Hendriks. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44104137/340112953/924952270?refcode=2022-04-13-hendriks&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=befe2644-79bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWZlMjY0NC03OWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wbm4pGHEmEVDG0IH-yZbg2X9BJaI10W5Xf25jr5_xxw=) It's this simple, Peter: **Our heroes in uniform deserve to be honored.** That's why I fought to pass my Hiring Our Heroes Act in the legislature. It's why, as the pandemic took root, my office began coordinating with local VFWs to deliver care packages and Covid tests to our vets. It's why I'm taking on the VA as they try to close the Northport care facility. **And it's why, in Congress, I'll do more than honor our vets.****Our service members are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to serve our nation, and I will never stop fighting to make sure our nation is ready to serve them.** I keep a picture of Sgt. Robert Hendriks on my desk as a solemn reminder that public service is about sacrifice more than anything else. That's why it's incumbent on elected officials at every level of government to remember that what we do is a privilege. In that picture, Sgt. Hendriks is sporting a shirt that reads "All it takes is all you got." In Congress, I'll give every veteran all I've got. More to come, _Josh_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | Peter, Three years ago this month, a convoy carrying U.S. Marine Sgt. Robert A. Hendriks was returning to base near Bagram airfield in Afghanistan when they were ambushed by a car loaded with explosives. Sgt. Hendriks, a proud son of Locust Valley, was killed in the attack, along with two of his brothers in arms. Long Island lost a noble member of our community. America lost a dedicated soldier. And a mother lost her son. Last year, I was honored to lead a community effort to rename a street in Locust Valley after Sgt. Hendriks. = It's this simple, Peter: Our heroes in uniform deserve to be honored. That's why I fought to pass my Hiring Our Heroes Act in the legislature. It's why, as the pandemic took root, my office began coordinating with local VFWs to deliver care packages and Covid tests to our vets. It's why I'm taking on the VA as they try to close the Northport care facility. And it's why, in Congress, I'll do more than honor our vets.Our service members are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to serve our nation, and I will never stop fighting to make sure our nation is ready to serve them. I keep a picture of Sgt. Robert Hendriks on my desk as a solemn reminder that public service is about sacrifice more than anything else. That's why it's incumbent on elected officials at every level of government to remember that what we do is a privilege. In that picture, Sgt. Hendriks is sporting a shirt that reads "All it takes is all you got." In Congress, I'll give every veteran all I've got. More to come, Josh Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Lafazan for Congress P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: Promises Kept!
body:
Celebrating Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friends, Last Thursday on April 7th, 2022, history was made: after 115 justices over the course of 233 years, the Supreme Court of the United States will finally have a Black woman sit on its bench for the very first time. Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson has earned a seat on the highest court in the land, marking a major milestone in the fight for representation and equity. It is long overdue for our judicial system to more accurately reflect the very communities that they serve. The fight for equity for underserved communities does not end at representation. This is why I would like to ask you to join me tomorrow morning at 10am ET at the White House Virtual Convening on Equity, where over 90 federal agencies will be releasing their Equity Action Plans. Members of President Biden’s Cabinet will outline the strategies that their agencies will take toward addressing the systemic barriers in our nation’s policies that have stood in the way of underserved communities for centuries. You can RSVP for further details below. To ensure that we continue to have a government that works to serve all the people, we must continue to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. If you are interested in learning ways to be a more effective organizer, particularly in a campaign capacity, sign up to join our DNC Campaign Readiness Organizer Bootcamp on May 21st! The deadline to apply is May 8th. You can find more information and a sign-up link below. Lastly, we want to encourage you to help celebrate Black Maternal Health Week by hosting a friend bank empowering your community to vote. Check out the info below and make sure that they have everything they need and are ready to hit the polls! Thank you all for your work and standing by the DNC in the fight for a more equitable nation!
Best,
Brencia Berry
Director of Coalitions & Community Engagement
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
|
---
| **Congratulations, Future Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson!** Since Justice Stephen Breyer announced his retirement, President Biden has conducted a rigorous process to identify his replacement. President Biden sought a candidate with exceptional credentials, unimpeachable character, and an unwavering dedication to the rule of law. Just as important, the President sought an individual who is committed to equal justice under the law and who understands the profound impact that the Supreme Court’s decisions have on the lives of the American people. That is why the President nominated Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to serve as the next Justice on the Supreme Court. Judge Jackson is one of our nation’s brightest legal minds and has an unusual breadth of experience in our legal system, giving her the perspective to be an exceptional Justice. On February 25, 2022, President Joe Biden nominated Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to become the 116th Associate Justice of the United States Supreme Court. On April 7, 2022, a bipartisan group of Senators confirmed Judge Jackson's nomination. We at the DNC is so thrilled for Judge Jackson’s historic confirmation and grateful to President Biden for fulfilling this key campaign promise!
---
|
---
|
---
| **You Are Invited:
White House Virtual Convening on Equity**
**WHEN:** Thursday April 14th, 10AM ET
**WHERE:** The summit will stream live on the [White House Youtube Channel](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7a49b79333&e=d6c5c7d7ec) This Thursday, Ambassador Susan Rice, Director of the Domestic Policy Council, Shalanda Young, Director of the Office of Management and Budget, and members of President Biden’s Cabinet will lay out concrete strategies and commitments that agencies are releasing to address the systemic barriers in our nation’s policies and programs that hold too many underserved communities back from prosperity, dignity, and equality. National equity leaders will also participate in the convening. These Equity Action Plans will expand federal investment and support in communities who have been locked out of opportunity for too long, including communities of color, Tribal communities, rural communities, LGBTQI+ communities, disability communities, communities of faith, women and girls, and communities impacted by persistent poverty.
---
| [RSVP Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5dc9ecc833&e=d6c5c7d7ec "RSVP Here")
---
|
---
|
---
| **DNC Campaign Readiness Organizer Bootcamp** The Campaign Readiness Project is a paid train-to-hire bootcamp program at the DNC with the goal of supporting states in their recruitment, training, and hiring of diverse, talented, and local staff. Participation in these bootcamps will expand opportunities for consideration for campaign roles in states with the aim of helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Ideal candidates for this Campaign Readiness Project Bootcamp are those who are looking to work as a Field Organizer for state parties and/or coordinated campaigns for the 2022 elections. The event will take place virtually on May 21 and applications close on May 8. Sign up below!
---
| [Apply Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c8a3dbd811&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Apply Here")
---
|
---
|
---
| **Black Maternal Health Week Friend Bank** Join Organize Everywhere and Found Director of Mothering Justice Danielle Atkinson to talk about the importance of voting and building power in every community.
---
| [RSVP Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=bab35287ab&e=d6c5c7d7ec "RSVP Here")
---
|
---
|
---
| | | _Copyright © 2022 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=465da9e3f6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=465da9e3f6).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)

America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Peter,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

subject: Joe Biden’s DISASTROUS Energy Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Strahan for Congress
body:
Families are hurting – enough is enough!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/fc9222e7dfb0/voter-registration-deadline-8871673?e=daf3f68050)
https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_fuel-prices?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_fuel-prices_20220411&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=fuel-prices&utm_agency=PG
Peter,

Record-high gas prices are hitting families hard. I’m hearing it everywhere I go.

And the worst part is it DOES NOT need to be this way!

During his first days in office, Joe Biden declared war on American energy. His “Green New Deal”-inspired executive orders, implemented to appease his far-left base, handcuffed our nation’s oil and gas producers. Gas prices have been on the rise ever since.

Now, instead of reversing his disastrous actions, he’s going hat in hand begging nations like Iran and Venezuela for oil.

I’ll lead the fight to UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY in Congress, to bring relief at the pump.

With the primary election now just weeks away I’m counting on your help!

Please rush a $5 (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_fuel-prices?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_fuel-prices_20220411&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=fuel-prices&utm_agency=PG&amount=5) , $10, (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_fuel-prices?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_fuel-prices_20220411&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=fuel-prices&utm_agency=PG&amount=10) $25 (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_fuel-prices?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_fuel-prices_20220411&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=fuel-prices&utm_agency=PG&amount=25) , or $50 donation to fuel our fight to WIN on May 24th >>> (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_fuel-prices?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_fuel-prices_20220411&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=fuel-prices&utm_agency=PG&amount=50)
PITCH IN HERE (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_fuel-prices?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_fuel-prices_20220411&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=fuel-prices&utm_agency=PG)
Our nation was well on its way to energy independence under President Trump. We must get back on track to ending our dependence onforeign oil.

The cost of gas is not only impacting us directly when we fuel up our vehicles... it’s driving up the cost of EVERYTHING as businesses face increased shipping costs!

We need a focused and effective representative to lead the charge in this fight.

I’m running to RESTORE OUR VOICE in Congress, and I’m counting on your help. (http://https//secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_fuel-prices?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_fuel-prices_20220411&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=fuel-prices&utm_agency=PG)

Thank you for any contribution you can send at this critical time.

-Jennifer

name: Ben Samuels
subject: Greitens is dangerous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friend,
Missouri politics is no place for abusers and insurrectionists, yet Josh Hawley remains one of the Senators representing Missouri. Now, disgraced former Governor Eric Greitens, who stands accused of spousal and child abuse, very well could be representing us alongside Hawley come next year.
Democrats need to win up and down the ballot, and it has never been more important that our Senators and Congresspeople represent us with integrity.
I’m running to do just that, but I need your help to win this race. Rush in a donation and elect BETTER leaders from Missouri. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-senate?refcode=220413-email]
Extremism is becoming a greater and greater problem in America every single day, but I know that what unites us is far more powerful than what divides us. Despite his scandalous past, the modern GOP supports candidates like disgraced former Governor Greitens because their only priority is seizing power.
I am fighting for a return to decency and a reinforcement of our nation's values. Democracy is in danger, and people like Hawley and Greitens want to use division to unravel our democratic foundations further.
We need pro-democracy elected officials at every level. We need to fight back against this. Will you join my team and help defend democracy by my side? Donate $15 now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-senate?refcode=220413-email&amount=15]
Missouri deserves better, and together we can make sure we end the careers of these dangerous politicians.
-- Ben Samuels
PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
Ben Samuels for Congress
9621 Olive Blvd.
P.O. Box 8484
Saint Louis, MO 63132-9998
United States

Peter,

The final numbers are in, and I’m not sure what we’re going to do... [**_we’ve been outraised._**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=32a7bf9755ab45afb91a45baabe3cd0c&_e=AjmndHf9Td2kxFfMNGvKSV-RrpdMCPSQbjMRPZ9NAN1bSsb5F3sar7OCTvGlnjNdqk1Qs5z2sDRXF7jaObMMnIUIv8da3DweT09OfBq74qP7TNLf9E8bnf671hbcWhOkQJGtNUg5-ni9cRL5qMkS9dkByL3I8f42DQQ6hIlj1l5uQd9oARlKKYydXBsaNhC3W-gCaRdPJ4afl71ihVq2zAI-Z2V-vmesMLj9T_BRZsF6-CoQlzN-i21EwSPl87YRJXxVv2mM9n89PO_b-MPnV3SKoDCSzMheZfY6lcO0wauLTkqe-8mKoxy6LjJ6PYjO-gPLg-mZRCZMs09pzwJBq0dpZC4QSOa-1h1mWQuFhWJ-Eb4ElUkJ3FD-zYpdIHq7Rjoh__xRNWDKr9xyk9tqbg%3D%3D)

**My ultra-liberal opponent raised $1 million last quarter and has $3.7 million in cash on hand.**

I knew when I stepped into this race that things would be tough – but now my opponent is calling on the deep pocketed democrat machine to fund this race and buy her seat back. Just last month it was announced that she’ll benefit from the Democrats’ House Majority PAC ad-buy of $102 million!

Here’s the good news: it’s obvious, that Dems are scared that they’re going to lose this seat... [**but we can’t leave anything up to chance.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=32a7bf9755ab45afb91a45baabe3cd0c&_e=AjmndHf9Td2kxFfMNGvKSV-RrpdMCPSQbjMRPZ9NAN1bSsb5F3sar7OCTvGlnjNdqk1Qs5z2sDRXF7jaObMMnIUIv8da3DweT09OfBq74qP7TNLf9E8bnf671hbcWhOkQJGtNUg5-ni9cRL5qMkS9dkByL3I8f42DQQ6hIlj1l5uQd9oARlKKYydXBsaNhC3-IGMT857NWb3bxOcIXuQ5N1PsRY9LQzqeGIIxrOGXI8pqP4J0lzJSE_VVvQaSp8IQVn31MO0iVDYfo43m7eNGHc7wFtqGWAd_rRN4iNFmijfdBvuN9TNDklSKcg7d62JYIpdnvG2D6IOYS7NCEj02uSKgkc-I7N-rxVW0TFW9kEHS31eozp5QrkfEbcB1DZsGyueftnRAYNPVQTJAr-9ww%3D%3D) In 2020 I lost this very seat by just 9,580 votes, sending my radical opponent to Washington where she rubber-stamped Pelosi’s liberal agenda.

_We can’t let the Dems buy this seat to send my opponent back to Washington._

name: Letitia James
subject: Re: Yesterday’s tragic shooting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105576/340118997/265476937?refcode=jtk458-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOThlOGZhNC04MWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AlTmkIK4NvV16yh89OfbTM0dhYdTewJ8ewZcqJJ53a8=)
---
Peter,

New Yorkers have always shown courage and resilience in the face of adversity. And yesterday was no different. When a shooter opened fire on a crowded subway car, New Yorkers stepped up.
A group of bystanders treated the injuries of their fellow New Yorkers on the subway platform. A victim was carried to safety by complete strangers. These acts of kindness and bravery have made the difference between life and death. Through and through, it was New Yorkers who stepped up for each other.
So while I’m heartbroken for the people harmed and those who witnessed the tragedy unfold, I am humbled and grateful for the thread of resilience that has brought us all together. This is who we are as New Yorkers: In tragedy, we will always stand tall for one another. And though it will take a while to heal from this tragedy, I know that we will get through this as a community united.
To all those wounded in ways that can and cannot be seen, I vow to continue fighting to put an end to this senseless gun violence.
Thank you for your time.

Letitia James
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9325bf52-5cbb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/b98e8fa4-81bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOThlOGZhNC04MWJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AlTmkIK4NvV16yh89OfbTM0dhYdTewJ8ewZcqJJ53a8=&id=128810098) James for NY
P.O. Box 476
New York, NY 10034
United States | | Paid for by James for NY
---

name: SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: This email is long but important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Sarah released a comprehensive plan to help cut costs for working families and hold corporations accountable. Here's what you need to know about it: This is a long email, but it’s very important that you read it all the way to the end. Thank you in advance.

Sarah has been on the road traveling all over Wisconsin, sitting down with workers and families, and learning more about the challenges they’re facing right now. Folks have shared the same concerns and frustrations in almost every conversation.

Too many families are stretching their pocketbooks just to be able to pay for groceries, fill their gas tanks, or refill their prescription drugs.

Parents — especially moms — are struggling to re-enter the workforce because it’s nearly impossible to find affordable childcare.

Communities can’t offer affordable housing because building costs are way up.

Meanwhile, big corporations and the ultra-wealthy are getting away with price gouging and exploiting consumers — it’s outrageous, and we have a U.S. Senator who refuses to do anything about it.

Instead, Ron Johnson is fighting for his own massive tax cuts and keeping his big political donors happy so they can keep stuffing his campaign warchest. It’s time to replace him with someone who actually gives a damn about working families and is willing to get out there and fight for them.

That’s why Sarah got in this race, and unlike Ron Johnson, she’ll never stop showing up, listening, and working as hard as possible to deliver results. That’s what she has done as State Treasurer, and it’s what she’ll do as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator.

So, as we travel across the state to meet with Wisconsin voters, we like to send you these emails to give you campaign updates, detail our latest policy plans, or ask you to chip in a few bucks to keep our work going. This email includes all three, but we’ll start with this one:

**[Would you consider making a small contribution to Sarah Godlewski’s U.S. Senate campaign? If we want to defeat Ron Johnson, we need to build an organization that can compete everywhere and talk to everyone. That’s what your grassroots donations allow us to do — so please, click here to pitch in what you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105717/340119571/-1761982453?refcode=em22_220413_cutcos_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220413_cutcos_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2UwMjlhNC04MmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1c8sYu3XXaKr92j_kuKNzE2e4gv8QGVQz8ACjI2XeY=)**

Sarah recently released a comprehensive plan to help cut costs for working families and hold corporations accountable. We need commonsense solutions to lower the price tag on everyday needs — and here’s how Sarah believes we can do that:
* Expand access to affordable childcare and make the child tax credit permanent
* Cut the high cost of prescription drugs and crack down on corporate greed
* Provide immediate relief for soaring energy costs with a gas tax holiday and invest in renewable energy now to lower energy costs in the future
* Make housing more affordable, accessible, and sustainable
* Institute a wealth tax and make middle class tax cuts permanent
* Improve the supply chain and address food supply delays by making things here at home

When we’re dealing with the highest inflation rate in 40 years and working families are feeling the effects at the grocery store, the pharmacy counter, or the gas pump — our leaders in Washington shouldn’t just stand by and watch them struggle.

**Sarah’s latest plan puts working families first by cutting costs now and giving them some breathing room for the future. That’s the kind of leadership we need from our next U.S. Senator.**

Our campaign is creating an agenda for all Wisconsinites by meeting folks where they’re at across the state, particularly in places Democrats don’t always go, because that’s what we should expect from the people we send to Washington.

**[We’re going to continue rolling out policy plans based on the issues impacting our communities, and the conversations we’re having on the ground are critical to those efforts. Can you make a small contribution today to help us keep it going? With your help, we can return this Senate seat to the people of Wisconsin.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105718/340119572/-1761982453?refcode=em22_220413_cutcos_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220413_cutcos_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2UwMjlhNC04MmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1c8sYu3XXaKr92j_kuKNzE2e4gv8QGVQz8ACjI2XeY=)**
| [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105719/340119573/-1761982453?refcode=em22_220413_cutcos_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220413_cutcos_fnd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2UwMjlhNC04MmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1c8sYu3XXaKr92j_kuKNzE2e4gv8QGVQz8ACjI2XeY=)
---

The bottom line is this: If we want to defeat Ron Johnson in November, we’ve got to show up, listen, earn trust, and follow through on our word to communities all over the state. That’s why Sarah’s been out on the road meeting with Wisconsin voters and talking about her plan to lower everyday costs. (Stay tuned for photos and stories!)

Your generous support directly funds our work to flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat from red to blue, and we can’t thank you enough for chipping in what you can when you can.

— Team Sarah

**[P.S. You can read Sarah’s full plan to cut costs for working families right here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105720/340119574/-977189693?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2UwMjlhNC04MmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1c8sYu3XXaKr92j_kuKNzE2e4gv8QGVQz8ACjI2XeY=&emci=3ae029a4-82bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3ce029a4-82bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)**

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105721/340119575/1797670526?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2UwMjlhNC04MmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1c8sYu3XXaKr92j_kuKNzE2e4gv8QGVQz8ACjI2XeY=&emci=3ae029a4-82bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3ce029a4-82bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105722/340119576/-1491866496?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2UwMjlhNC04MmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1c8sYu3XXaKr92j_kuKNzE2e4gv8QGVQz8ACjI2XeY=&emci=3ae029a4-82bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3ce029a4-82bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105723/340119577/1977784122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2UwMjlhNC04MmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1c8sYu3XXaKr92j_kuKNzE2e4gv8QGVQz8ACjI2XeY=&emci=3ae029a4-82bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3ce029a4-82bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)
---
Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
---

Submit this form to **[update your contact information](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105725/340119579/2072752189?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2UwMjlhNC04MmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a1c8sYu3XXaKr92j_kuKNzE2e4gv8QGVQz8ACjI2XeY=&emci=3ae029a4-82bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3ce029a4-82bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)**. name: Elana Schrager, CaraveoForCongress.com
subject: BREAKING: Three more CO legislators throw their support behind Yadira
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105731/340119639/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220413mm2endor_esc4c_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmY2MjFjZC04MmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_s5q02GGp4my2Ulb1Jn3-pG9XuvXHyFCItzFqrftak=)
---
We’ve got some MAJOR endorsements this week, Peter! Representatives Jason Crow (CO-06), Joe Neguse (CO-02), and Ed Perlmutter (CO-07) have ALL endorsed Dr. Caraveo. Along with Rep. Degette, that means _the entire Colorado Democratic delegation_ to the House of Representatives is throwing their full support behind our campaign. **Democrats are united, because everything we believe in — choice, environmental protections, uplifting working families, and democracy itself — is on the line in November.[Stand with the Colorado Congressional delegation and support Dr. Caraveo by pitching in today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105732/340119640/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220413mm2endor_esc4c_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmY2MjFjZC04MmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_s5q02GGp4my2Ulb1Jn3-pG9XuvXHyFCItzFqrftak=)** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44105733/340119641/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220413mm2endor_esc4c_allop_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmY2MjFjZC04MmJiLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_s5q02GGp4my2Ulb1Jn3-pG9XuvXHyFCItzFqrftak=)
---
Here’s what they each had to say:
_As a pediatrician, a union representative, and a legislator, Dr. Yadira Caraveo has been fighting on behalf of Colorado families for years. When she gets to Congress, I know she will continue to fight for our healthcare, our environment, and our children._
— Rep. Jason Crow (CO-06).
_Dr. Caraveo has worked tirelessly for Colorado families for years as a pediatrician and a state legislator. I know Dr. Caraveo will be a powerful advocate for Coloradans, and I look forward to working with her in Congress to deliver for working families._
— Rep. Joe Neguse (CO-02).

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Barrett Brigade Updates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | [ ](https://mgcp02
body:
Check out the latest news from the Barrett Brigade | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=625760998a5f66546e389897&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62571bb94528850ca3815a51%26ss_email_id%3D625760998a5f66546e389897%26ss_campaign_name%3DBarrett%2BBrigade%2BUpdates%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-04-13T23%253A45%253A57Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=_R21qDDsPw8kid9QU_Ri7Ko50qM%3D)
---
|
#### **Barrett Named Legislator of the Year by Fire Chiefs**
Last night, I spent the evening honoring firefighters across the State of Michigan. I was grateful to be recognized with the Legislator of the Year Award by the Michigan Fire Chief’s Association. I partnered with firefighters across the state and have led the efforts on spearheading the Michigan Task Force 1 initiative that mobilizes key resources to departments to effectively and efficiently mitigate disasters when they strike.I am proud to protect our firefighters that work tirelessly to keep us safe. See more [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=625760998a5f66546e389897&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F419838033283942&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=p_qdIQrxFTu7a8KrHyLIJoptaHw%3D).
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=625760998a5f66546e389897&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F419838033283942&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=p_qdIQrxFTu7a8KrHyLIJoptaHw%3D)
---
|
---
#### **Rallied for the People of Ukraine**
I joined the Ukraine Support Accelerated organization last Sunday to help raise funds and equipment for the people of Ukraine. It was great to see folks from the community come together to support Ukrainians on the ground with vital resources. There are still ways to get involved! Visit [ussupport.org](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=625760998a5f66546e389897&u=https%3A%2F%2Fussupport.org&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=7C-IQ0JZPI3oD5E6C3ENFgN6YYY%3D) to learn more.
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=625760998a5f66546e389897&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F426035922664153&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=jBHXjfX4xtCwlPkjV4naU2DrFrQ%3D)
---
|
---
#### **Barrett Visits Ingham County Sheriff’s Office**
On Monday, I visited the Ingham County Sheriff’s office for a tour of the county jail, the new facility that is under construction, and did a ride along with a sergeant of the force. Every Michigander deserves safe streets and neighborhoods. Lansing, Michigan was recently named the 9th most violent city in the United States. With crime skyrocketing and cities becoming increasingly more dangerous, it is imperative that we defend our men and women in uniform. Law enforcement is under constant attack and I am grateful for the sacrifice that officers make to keep us safe. See more [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=625760998a5f66546e389897&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F426625585938520&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=7lklpsBGl5Ed7FicZBltB3DMj_s%3D).
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=625760998a5f66546e389897&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F426625585938520&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=7lklpsBGl5Ed7FicZBltB3DMj_s%3D)
---
|
---
#### **Return Your Petitions By Friday 4/15**
Thank you to everyone who helped collect signatures to get Tom on the ballot. We are pleased to announce that we crushed the 1,000 minimum goal, and we could not have done it without your help.If you are still circulating petitions, please make sure they are returned to the campaign by this Friday, April 15. The filing deadline is next Tuesday, April 19 so we need to get them in as quickly as possible. Please contact Alec Faggion at [alec@tombarrettforcongress.com](mailto:alec@tombarrettforcongress.com) to coordinate.
---
---
|
---
